name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: I'm not backing down, and you shouldn't either
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] Hi,

I will never stop fighting to deliver real results for the people of New Jersey. A few recent examples:

✔️ Helping claw back hundreds of thousands of dollars for our North Jersey firefighters.
✔️ Announcing federal action to protect our families and small businesses from package theft.
✔️ Introducing new bipartisan legislation to expand testing and screenings for lung cancer.
✔️Unveiling bipartisan action to help lower health insurance premium costs.

My commitment to finding real solutions that lower health care costs keeps me motivated every day, and I want you to feel hopeful about our progress.

I’m proud of this work because it’s what this job is supposed to be. We’re not here to posture or pick fights. We’re here to deliver.

To continue this important work, I need your support. Can you chip in $ right now to empower us to keep fighting for Jersey Values? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2512?amount=]

DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2512?amount=]

Every dollar you give helps power this work.

Let’s keep pushing,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Hey Peter, it’s Mark Kelly.
Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate.
I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy.
But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something.
So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too.
I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help.
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.
After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do.
[**I’m asking you to split a donation between me and Ruben Gallego, and I hope you know that I wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t important.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-mek-em-mar25.qIyu4X&refcode=em251209-1-160&t=1&akid=4046%2E734936%2E1XPJBS)

Thank you,

name: Haley Stevens
subject: null, I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I'm still looking for another 25 grassroots Democrats to endorse my campaign!

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1600%2E49239%2EE2r-Hj)
null, I wanted to quickly follow up to make sure you got my note.
---
I'm still looking for another 25 grassroots Democrats to personally endorse my campaign to become Michigan's next senator, and**I noticed you haven't had a chance to add your name yet.**
**That's why I'm humbly asking one more time:[Will you personally endorse my campaign to keep Michigan blue, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's disastrous agenda?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10219?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=1600%2E49239%2EE2r-Hj)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10219?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1600%2E49239%2EE2r-Hj)
---
Thank you for your support. It means the world to have you by my side in this race.

Haley Stevens
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: Here's what I’ve heard from folks like you
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10220?t=4&akid=1600%2E49239%2EE2r-Hj)
---
null,
On the campaign trail, I've been talking directly with Michiganders across the state – folks like you who are concerned for the future – and **here's what I've been hearing:**
🛟 People are worried about the future of Medicare and Social Security.

🩺 Folks in Michigan and across the country want improved and affordable access to health care.

💰 Working families need real action to create and protect good-paying jobs.

⛓️💥 And many expressed deep concerns about the future of our fundamental freedoms, civil rights, and American democracy itself.
These aren’t just political talking points, null. They’re _real_ concerns from _real_ people. And they’re exactly why I’m running for Michigan's battleground Senate seat – **because I have a track record of getting things done.**
📌 I helped stabilize the auto industry and save 200,000 Michigan jobs as chief of staff on President Obama's Auto Rescue Task Force.
📌 I played a leading role in passing the bill to grow our manufacturing economy by bringing America’s semiconductor industry back to where it belongs: Michigan.
📌 Most recently, I introduced the Stop Trump's Abuse of Power Act – a bill to ban the president from deploying active duty troops on U.S. soil without consent from state or local leaders.
That barely scratches the surface, and I know there's a _lot_ more work to do. So it's a good thing I grew up the Michigan way: surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work. And I'm in this race now so I can continue fighting for Michigan's working families in the U.S. Senate.
But with polling showing that I'm the Democrat with the very best shot at beating MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, the GOP is getting scared – **and they're gearing up to spend millions to flip this seat red.**
**So, null, I need****you on my grassroots team to help me****keep up my track record of fighting for hardworking Michigan families.****[Will you join me by endorsing my campaign today? My team set an ambitious goal to get 15,000 signatures by midnight, and right now, I’m still 27% short.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10219?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1600%2E49239%2EE2r-Hj)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10219?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1600%2E49239%2EE2r-Hj)
---
Thank you so much for your support,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** Null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10219?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1600%2E49239%2EE2r-Hj) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10220?t=8&akid=1600%2E49239%2EE2r-Hj)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Tobias Read
subject: Add your name: No legal authority. No transparency. No way.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251209em-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251209em-rs]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I’m writing because something deeply troubling is happening inside our federal government, and every voter in Oregon deserves to know the truth.
The US Department of Justice has been requesting your private voter information — including your date of birth, partial Social Security number, and driver’s license number — without legal authority, without transparency, and without any explanation of how they intend to use it.
I refused to hand over that data.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/CfMP30xwgUWZNBhKV-mlDw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CfMP30xwgUWZNBhKV-mlDw2]
No legal authority. No transparency. No way.
What’s more, now we’ve learned that the USDOJ has already been sharing personal voter data with the Department of Homeland Security and funneling it into the SAVE program — a system that watchdogs have repeatedly called inaccurate, insecure, and unreliable.
This is exactly why I said no from the start. And why I’m still saying no — even as they sue me for it.
I will not allow your personal information to be misused to intimidate voters, target immigrants, or tear families apart. That will never be Oregon’s way.
Along with Colorado’s Secretary of State and eight other Secretaries of State across the country, I’ve demanded answers directly from the Attorney General and the Secretary of Homeland Security.
But the federal government needs to hear from you too.
If you agree that personal information should not be used to intimidate voters, target immigrants, or tear families apart, please add your name to my petition now: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CfMP30xwgUWZNBhKV-mlDw2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CfMP30xwgUWZNBhKV-mlDw2]
Oregonians — and all Americans — deserve to know how their data is being used.
We’re standing up because your privacy, your rights, and your vote matter.
Thank you for being part of this fight.
Tobias Read
Secretary of State, Oregon
P.S. You can read the press release regarding our demand for answers from US DOJ and Department of Homeland Security here [https://apps.oregon.gov/oregon-newsroom/OR/SOS/Posts/Post/secretaries-demand-answers-from-us-department-of-justice-us-department-homeland-security-voter-data] .
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251209em-rs]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307

clean_body: [] Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read. I’m writing because something deeply troubling is happening inside our federal government, and every voter in Oregon deserves to know the truth. The US Department of Justice has been requesting your private voter information — including your date of birth, partial Social Security number, and driver’s license number — without legal authority, without transparency, and without any explanation of how they intend to use it. I refused to hand over that data. [] No legal authority. No transparency. No way. What’s more, now we’ve learned that the USDOJ has already been sharing personal voter data with the Department of Homeland Security and funneling it into the SAVE program — a system that watchdogs have repeatedly called inaccurate, insecure, and unreliable. This is exactly why I said no from the start. And why I’m still saying no — even as they sue me for it. I will not allow your personal information to be misused to intimidate voters, target immigrants, or tear families apart. That will never be Oregon’s way. Along with Colorado’s Secretary of State and eight other Secretaries of State across the country, I’ve demanded answers directly from the Attorney General and the Secretary of Homeland Security. But the federal government needs to hear from you too. If you agree that personal information should not be used to intimidate voters, target immigrants, or tear families apart, please add your name to my petition now: [] ADD YOUR NAME [] Oregonians — and all Americans — deserve to know how their data is being used. We’re standing up because your privacy, your rights, and your vote matter. Thank you for being part of this fight. Tobias Read Secretary of State, Oregon P.S. You can read the press release regarding our demand for answers from US DOJ and Department of Homeland Security here [] . CONTRIBUTE [] [] [] [] Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Patriot Cigars
subject: NEW PATRIOT PACK with ACCESSORIES
body:
** NEW PATRIOT PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
INCLUDES: TRAVEL CASE, CUTTER & CIGARS!

The Patriot Pack — Smoke for the Bold and the Free

Stand tall and light up freedom with The Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company — a powerful lineup built for true American patriots. Featuring The “Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case, the Old Glory Cigar Cutter, and three powerhouse blends — TNT, MOAB, and Sidewinder — this set is your all-American arsenal of premium, hand-rolled cigars. Crafted for quality. Fueled by liberty. Made for those who never back down.
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=9f288a7c63&e=fbf55fa623

**
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Patriot Pack
A Bold Salute to Liberty
------------------------------------------------------------

Raise your colors high — the Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company is the ultimate tribute to freedom, made for those who stand proud. This isn’t just a cigar set; it’s a declaration, a statement, and a smoke-filled salute to the red, white, and blue.

** Included Inside the Patriot Pack
------------------------------------------------------------

**
“The Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case
------------------------------------------------------------

Carry your cigars in patriotic style. This rugged yet elegant case is crafted in premium printed leather with the pledge of allegiance, built to safeguard your Patriot Cigars while projecting staunch American pride. Designed for travel, with room for three cigars up to a 60-ring size and a secure closure, it’s more than storage—it’s armor for your freedom smoke.

** Old Glory Cigar Cutter
------------------------------------------------------------

No patriot’s toolkit is complete without a sharp edge. The Old Glory Cigar Cutter is a dual-blade instrument worthy of the name. It slices clean and precise, honoring the flag with every snip (and making sure your draw is perfect).
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Finest Blends Under the Flag
------------------------------------------------------------

** TNT
------------------------------------------------------------

Explosive in flavor and bold in character, TNT is a powerhouse medium to full blend that commands your attention. From first light to the last ember, it burns with authority.

** MOAB (Mother of All Bombs)
------------------------------------------------------------

MOAB delivers a full-bodied punch, a maduro cigar that lives up to its name. Deep, rich, and intense — this is not for the faint of heart but for the true patriot who demands maximum firepower in flavor.

** Sidewinder
------------------------------------------------------------

Sleek, swift, and sly — the Sidewinder rounds out the pack with a medium blend that strikes with finesse. Balanced, bold, and full of character, it’s the curveball every patriotic smoker needs.

The Patriot Pack doesn’t stop there, you’ll also get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.
------------------------------------------------------------

** Why the Patriot Pack Matters
------------------------------------------------------------

This is not merely a sampler or gift set. The Patriot Pack is your on-demand arsenal of American spirit and premium craftsmanship. It’s a perfect companion for travel, a striking gift for fellow flag-bearers, or your own daily reminder that freedom is worth celebrating — one premium puff at a time.

Light up The Patriot Pack. Puff with pride. And let the smoke carry your pledge to liberty.

** Uncompromising Quality, Made for Patriots
------------------------------------------------------------

At Patriot Cigar Company, every cigar is handcrafted in Estelí, Nicaragua, using premium-aged tobacco (aged a minimum of three years). Our blends were born from the desire to bring together the love of premium smokes and the love of our country, forging a brand built on passion and pride.

** NEW PREMIUM
8 CIGAR SAMPLER PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
USE PROMO CODE: EAGLE FOR 20% OFF CIGARS
Experience true American freedom with 8 bold, premium cigars—including the gold-wrapped MOGUL and exclusive Operation Never Tell—only available in the Patriot Cigar Company Premium Sampler Pack.

Cigars Included

1xMOAB
1xTNT
1xMARK48
1xHellfire
1xSidewinder
1xSidewinder Maduro
1x24K Gold Wrapped Mogul
1xLimited Release Unbanded Operation Never Tell

https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=5e99f7470b&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=06fdd37ead&e=fbf55fa623

For the true American cigar patriot, this is the ultimate way to experience the full power, pride, and craftsmanship behind Patriot Cigar Company. The Premium Sampler Pack delivers 8 premium cigars that represent the heart and soul of our lineup—crafted for those who believe in freedom, hard work, and savoring every damn moment.

You’ll receive all 6 flagship blends that built our reputation for bold flavor and uncompromising quality, plus two standouts that make this sampler truly elite: the 24Kt Gold-Wrapped MOGUL, a cigar that radiates luxury and dominance with every draw, and the Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to this pack, and once these are gone, they’re gone.

The Premium Sampler Pack doesn’t stop there. Alongside your 8 cigars, you’ll get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.

8 Cigars. 1 Mission. 100% Patriot.
Light up, lean back, and let freedom burn.
NEW CIGAR LIMITED RELEASE
"OPERATION NEVER TELL"

The Unbanded Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to the Premium Sampler Pack available at MYPATRIOTCIGARS.COM (https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=1ed5b29756&e=fbf55fa623) , and once these are gone, they’re gone.

Don't miss this cigar!

NEW CIGAR ACCESSORIES!

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
They’re furious — and that means we’re winning.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120955896/587914482/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjVjMDdhNy01ZWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vCEfAM1TzQPcyjDAJki6Q2uSZOkvFOGFQDy0-ET08pk=)
Hi team, Robert Garcia here.
You may have seen the headline.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120955897/587914483/789508428?refcode=251209_RG_dismay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjVjMDdhNy01ZWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vCEfAM1TzQPcyjDAJki6Q2uSZOkvFOGFQDy0-ET08pk=)
Let me tell you: I love it.
Because when the work I’m doing is “to GOP’s dismay,” it means we’re getting closer to the truth. It means we’re holding bullies accountable. And it means Donald Trump and his allies are feeling the pressure.
**[Before I go any further, I need to ask — will you donate $10 to help us keep pushing this investigation forward and protect our Democratic House majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120955898/587914484/789508428?refcode=251209_RG_dismay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjVjMDdhNy01ZWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vCEfAM1TzQPcyjDAJki6Q2uSZOkvFOGFQDy0-ET08pk=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120955899/587914485/-309737922?refcode=251209_RG_dismay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjVjMDdhNy01ZWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vCEfAM1TzQPcyjDAJki6Q2uSZOkvFOGFQDy0-ET08pk=)
Here’s what really happened: My team and I combed through more than 20,000 documents — page by page, hour by hour — because the American people deserve answers. When we uncovered emails suggesting Trump knew far more about Epstein’s abuse than he let on, I didn’t hesitate. I released them.
**And the GOP lost it.** They attacked me personally, called me names, and accused me of “sensationalizing” the truth.
I was unfazed because I know why they’re so angry:
_Because the strategy is working.
Because sunlight is working.
Because accountability is working. _
**And because when a bully punches, I punch back — harder.**
**This is our plan: Expose the truth. Force transparency. Build public pressure. Make it impossible for the GOP to bury the facts. That’s how we win this fight — and many others.**
But I cannot do this alone.
**[Will you make a donation today to help me continue this work and defend our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120955900/587914486/789508428?refcode=251209_RG_dismay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjVjMDdhNy01ZWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vCEfAM1TzQPcyjDAJki6Q2uSZOkvFOGFQDy0-ET08pk=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120955901/587914487/-309737922?refcode=251209_RG_dismay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjVjMDdhNy01ZWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vCEfAM1TzQPcyjDAJki6Q2uSZOkvFOGFQDy0-ET08pk=)
Thank you for standing with me. I promise you this: I will never back down.
Robert Garcia
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120955902/587914488/-309737922?refcode=251209_RG_dismay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjVjMDdhNy01ZWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vCEfAM1TzQPcyjDAJki6Q2uSZOkvFOGFQDy0-ET08pk=)

clean_body: They’re furious — and that means we’re winning. = Hi team, Robert Garcia here. You may have seen the headline. = Let me tell you: I love it. Because when the work I’m doing is “to GOP’s dismay,” it means we’re getting closer to the truth. It means we’re holding bullies accountable. And it means Donald Trump and his allies are feeling the pressure. = = Here’s what really happened: My team and I combed through more than 20,000 documents — page by page, hour by hour — because the American people deserve answers. When we uncovered emails suggesting Trump knew far more about Epstein’s abuse than he let on, I didn’t hesitate. I released them. And the GOP lost it. They attacked me personally, called me names, and accused me of “sensationalizing” the truth. I was unfazed because I know why they’re so angry: Because the strategy is working. Because sunlight is working. Because accountability is working. And because when a bully punches, I punch back — harder. This is our plan: Expose the truth. Force transparency. Build public pressure. Make it impossible for the GOP to bury the facts. That’s how we win this fight — and many others. But I cannot do this alone. = = Thank you for standing with me. I promise you this: I will never back down. Robert Garcia = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is how we can win in North Carolina.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Let’s do this again
#
North Carolina is one of the last true swing states on the map, Peter. I should know.
I won both my elections for Governor in years that Donald Trump carried the state. It wasn’t easy, but with a groundswell of grassroots enthusiasm, we prevailed.
In the last few weeks, we’ve begun building out a team that can win here again – this time for a seat in the United States Senate. We have a plan that we know can provide Democrats with success here in NC. And it’s only been possible through your support.
**[I have to ask for that support again today, Peter, because we’re preparing for this to become the most expensive U.S. Senate race in history. With your help, we’ll engage with voters from every corner of this state and prove that our vision for the future is right for North Carolina. Please split a donation between our campaign and State Democrats Committee.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98486?refcode=em20251209-9809&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9809%2E614464%2EytYZ0x)**
Statewide elections here are competitive and expensive. Republicans are already planning to spend hundreds of millions against us because they know this seat is the key to the Senate majority.
But as we begin sharing our message with North Carolinians — a message rooted in respect for the values we share and the fundamental rights we’ve spent so long fighting for — I am confident that we’ll be able to bring voters onto our team.
We can succeed here in North Carolina if we work together.
**[If I can count on you to stand with me in the fight, please split a contribution between our campaign and State Democrats Committee today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98486?refcode=em20251209-9809&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9809%2E614464%2EytYZ0x)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98486?refcode=em20251209-9809&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9809%2E614464%2EytYZ0x)**
Thanks so much,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98486?refcode=em20251209-9809&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9809%2E614464%2EytYZ0x)

body:

Peter,

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251209-movement.fdwOzG&refcode=em20251209-1698&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1698%2E342411%2E90fccz ]Congressman Randy Fine Responding to Representative Ilhan Omar: 'I'm
sure it is difficult to see us welcome the killer of so many of your
fellow Muslim terrorists. The only shame is that you serve in Congress'

THEN: Rep. Mace introduced a resolution to remove Ilhan from her committee
assignments for refusing to be silent in the face of injustice.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251209-movement.fdwOzG&refcode=em20251209-1698&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1698%2E342411%2E90fccz ]Tweet from Rep. Nancy Mace: 'BREAKING: We're filing a resolution to
strip @Ilhan of her committee assignments after her disgraceful remarks on
Charlie Kirk's assassination.'

NOW: Trump called Ilhan “garbage” and added that immigrants like her are
“garbage” too.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251209-movement.fdwOzG&refcode=em20251209-1698&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1698%2E342411%2E90fccz ]Trump on Somalis: 'We're gonna go the wrong way if we keep taking in
garbage into our country. Ilhan Omar is garbage. She's garbage. Her
friends are garbage.'

The GOP is trying to silence progressive voices that speak truth to power,
like Ilhan. Their attacks are rooted in the same Islamophobia, racism, and
xenophobia that have fueled years of right-wing smear campaigns to scare
anyone who dares to fight for a better, fairer country.

It’s disgusting. It’s dangerous. And we will not let them get away with
this.

This is more than an attack on Ilhan — it’s an attack on every progressive
fighting for working families, for justice, and for a democracy that works
for all of us. Now is the time to stand shoulder to shoulder and defend
Ilhan and our progressive champions.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251209-movement.fdwOzG&refcode=em20251209-1698&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=1698%2E342411%2E90fccz ]Will you chip in a $3 donation today to let the GOP know
that their hate will not go unchallenged?

The Squad Victory Fund

name: Urgent Action via MGP for Congress
subject: Support rural kids, not red tape
body:
| | Peter – Rural schools are already stretched thin, and without immediate action from Congress, the situation will get much worse. That’s why Marie is once again fighting for solutions and calling attention to this critical issue.

Last week, a group of bipartisan lawmakers joined Marie in calling on House Leadership to advance bipartisan legislation to reauthorize the Secure Rural Schools (SRS) program.

**We need to prove that a majority of Americans support investments in the equality of our children’s opportunities, making sure rural schools aren’t left behind.** [If you agree that where your kids live shouldn’t determine the quality of education they receive, add your name here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120956186/587921822/-391731991?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_180DO_251209_1_1&refcode2=9aa1e475-60d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWExZTQ3NS02MGQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mLUsCtqaJHLYtbYTGji-73gStsoWi-BY8qowmkw1biw=&emci=96a1e475-60d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=9aa1e475-60d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=31138575)
| **[SUPPORT RURAL SCHOOLS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120956188/587921830/-391731991?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_180DO_251209_1_1&refcode2=9aa1e475-60d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWExZTQ3NS02MGQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mLUsCtqaJHLYtbYTGji-73gStsoWi-BY8qowmkw1biw=&emci=96a1e475-60d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=9aa1e475-60d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=31138575)**
---

A decline in federal funding has already forced school districts in rural Southwest Washington to combine schools and lay off staff – and if they lose funding entirely, it would mean further layoffs, inability to repair aging facilities, and even cutting down to a four-day school week.

**Time is running out to reauthorize the federal funding program upon which these schools rely, and Marie is working hard to bring those dollars home.**

[Our children deserve access to an education that provides opportunities and helps prepare for their futures, regardless of zip code. If you agree, add your name here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120956190/587921837/-391731991?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_180DO_251209_1_1&refcode2=9aa1e475-60d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWExZTQ3NS02MGQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mLUsCtqaJHLYtbYTGji-73gStsoWi-BY8qowmkw1biw=&emci=96a1e475-60d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=9aa1e475-60d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=31138575)
**[SUPPORT RURAL SCHOOLS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120956192/587921842/-391731991?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_180DO_251209_1_1&refcode2=9aa1e475-60d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWExZTQ3NS02MGQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mLUsCtqaJHLYtbYTGji-73gStsoWi-BY8qowmkw1biw=&emci=96a1e475-60d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=9aa1e475-60d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=31138575)**

clean_body: | | Peter – Rural schools are already stretched thin, and without immediate action from Congress, the situation will get much worse. That’s why Marie is once again fighting for solutions and calling attention to this critical issue. Last week, a group of bipartisan lawmakers joined Marie in calling on House Leadership to advance bipartisan legislation to reauthorize the Secure Rural Schools (SRS) program. We need to prove that a majority of Americans support investments in the equality of our children’s opportunities, making sure rural schools aren’t left behind. | A decline in federal funding has already forced school districts in rural Southwest Washington to combine schools and lay off staff – and if they lose funding entirely, it would mean further layoffs, inability to repair aging facilities, and even cutting down to a four-day school week. Time is running out to reauthorize the federal funding program upon which these schools rely, and Marie is working hard to bring those dollars home. Thanks for taking a stand. – Team MGP | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. name: Chair Karen Tallian
subject: They can try, but they cannot silence Hoosiers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, I wanted to share an open letter with you that I wrote ahead of Thursday’s redistricting vote. My message: Hoosiers will not have their voices silenced. **[If you agree that our democracy must prevail, I urge you to make a donation today to our Indiana Redistricting Defense Fund. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120956355/587928105/-1959508450?refcode=251209letter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcwMTYxOC02MmQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WKjqeTXtCqYXlHb3Td28SwzOca3ky3fn4Jvzivo9fQg=)** —---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- In 1788, George Washington was elected unanimously to be the first President of the United States. After two terms, he declined a third, famously stating that the country did not need a monarch. Thomas Jefferson recognized that a two-party system is healthier for a democracy than one-party dominance. Two parties preserve competition, accountability, and meaningful choice; these are the safeguards against authoritarianism. And it has been the NORM in this country for over 200 years. A functioning two-party system creates checks and balances, and oversight against corruption to keep the legislators attuned to WE THE PEOPLE. Yes, there is majority rule, but there are also guarantees for the minority. The Tyranny of the Majority was a concern of the founders. Our two-party system helps to define goals and gives voters clear and meaningful choices. _**When outcomes are totally predictable, elections lose their purpose, and this undermines civic participation.**_ Indiana already has one of the lowest voter participation in the country. And that is a BI-PARTISAN ISSUE. Structural one-party dominance is bad for all of us. Painting the field RED will NOT diminish the differences in our society, it will not eliminate the difference in ideas or beliefs. —----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:** **[Express Donate: $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120956356/587928114/1054557726?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcwMTYxOC02MmQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WKjqeTXtCqYXlHb3Td28SwzOca3ky3fn4Jvzivo9fQg=)** **[Express Donate: $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120956357/587928116/1054557726?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcwMTYxOC02MmQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WKjqeTXtCqYXlHb3Td28SwzOca3ky3fn4Jvzivo9fQg=)** **[Express Donate: $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120956358/587928117/1054557726?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcwMTYxOC02MmQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WKjqeTXtCqYXlHb3Td28SwzOca3ky3fn4Jvzivo9fQg=)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120956359/587928118/1054557726?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcwMTYxOC02MmQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WKjqeTXtCqYXlHb3Td28SwzOca3ky3fn4Jvzivo9fQg=)** —----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Republicans in Chicago, for example, vote in the Democratic primary – it is the only way they get any say in the election. People who think of themselves as Democrats run for Town Council races as Republicans in some rural Indiana communities, because it is the only way to get elected. In the LONG GAME, painting the Congressional maps RED will not eliminate opposition. It will only change what it means to be a Republican or a Democrat. The DOWNSIDE OF PASSING THIS BILL is significant. A democracy only works when there is a _PUBLIC BELIEF_ that elections matter, and that choosing our representatives reflects voter preference. I don’t know the correct number of “Democratic” congressional districts in this state, but I believe it is not zero. Disproportionate representation solely because of map manipulation denies the minority the ability to compete. In doing so, it erodes public confidence in the validity of the system and reinforces the suspicion that our votes do NOT matter. _**When the people lose faith in our system of free and fair elections, something fundamental could be gone forever. **_ The Indiana General Assembly has rules: redistricting happens every 10 years. These rules are not obstacles. They are safety nets. Upholding the rules is not an act of weakness – it is an act of responsibility: maintaining the integrity of the process, and preserving the legitimacy of the Institution. I speak as a former legislator who is concerned about the legitimacy and credibility of the institution. I speak as the current Democratic Party Chair who is concerned about the continued existence of a viable two-party system. I speak as a resident of NWI who is concerned about my community of interests. We should all speak. —----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **[Thank you for reading my letter at this critical time. We must be prepared for any outcome on Thursday, and that’s why we’ve launched the Indiana Redistricting Defense Fund. I sincerely hope you will stand with us and make a donation today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120956360/587928119/-1959508450?refcode=251209letter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcwMTYxOC02MmQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WKjqeTXtCqYXlHb3Td28SwzOca3ky3fn4Jvzivo9fQg=)** Democratically yours,
Karen

body:
When DOJ won't specifically say what they want with personally identifiable voter information, especially given the history of the appointees involved, you can bet it is all about suppressing voters and limiting your access to the ballot.
With attacks on voting rights coming from within the government itself now, Team, it's on us to fight for our fundamental right to vote. RUSH $25 or more right now to defend voting rights nationwide >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120925_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Democracy Docket: Trump Administration Snubs States Asking Why the DOJ Wants Their Voter Data [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120925_2&amount=25]
Team: If you didn't know, the MAGA-ified U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) has been demanding voter data from the states since May, requesting that election officials turn over unredacted copies of voter rolls and every voter registration application submitted in the past 18 months.
Several states with MAGA-aligned Secretaries of State and opponents of voting rights in charge of elections have complied, but 10 states are holding out to protect voters from intimidation , requesting information on how DOJ and the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) intend to use the state voter data they’ve demanded.
The agencies have released contradictory statements on how the data is being used, leading the secretaries of state from Arizona, California, Colorado, Maine, Minnesota, Nevada, New Mexico, Oregon, Vermont and Washington to send a joint letter demanding clarity before they turn over the sensitive registration information and expressing concerns about the “ potential lack of compliance with federal law .”
The issue is simple: The U.S. Constitution entrusts the states, not the president or his agencies, to run elections. There's no legal basis for the DOJ to demand such sensitive and personally identifying information. It's yet another overreach by a president fueled by lies and taken by sycophants who are more loyal to his every whim than the rule of law they swore an oath to uphold.

clean_body: Congrats, you are invited! | | | | EXCLUSIVE OFFER FROM THE DESK OF DONALD J. TRUMP Dear Patriot, President Trump requests your presence in the 47th President Founders Club. You’re not asleep! But yes, most people would dream of receiving an email like this one. I personally created the 47th President Founders Club for one reason only: To permanently honor the patriots who founded and carried the entire MAGA movement from Day One! The ones who never wavered, never surrendered, and refused to let them destroy our country twice. I had my team pull the very best files, millions of patriot names, and I went through them myself. Your name rose straight to the top. ** That’s why I’m personally inviting you to become a Charter Member of my 47th President Founders Club. Only 4,700 spots exist in the entire country. I’m holding one for you! ** Don’t miss your shot to stand with the patriots who made the greatest comeback in American history. Your name could be one of them. I am counting on you. Don’t let me down. Thank you and God bless you, President Trump | | | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Wow
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We set some serious goals, and it’s looking like we might actually hit them. But to do it, we’re going to need a strong push tonight.
#

Folks, it’s Mark.
Reaching out one more time before midnight.
A report is supposed to hit Pete Hegseth’s desk by tomorrow. That report is going to determine how he might try to punish me for speaking out against his boss. The possible actions they may take go all the way up to recalling me to active duty and court-martialing me.
I’ve never had to face anything like this before, but I knew I had to be ready by the time that report hit.
So, late last week, we launched an emergency fundraising drive. This team has always had my back, and I hoped you still would. Since then, the outpouring of support has been absolutely unbelievable. Just, wow.
We set some serious goals, and it’s looking like we might actually hit them. But to do it, we’re going to need a strong push tonight.
The clock is ticking down, so I am humbly asking:
[**Chip in anything — even as little as $1 — before midnight tonight.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.FHtwNx&refcode=em251209-3-1mil&t=1&akid=6287%2E6688874%2EL3rKvB)

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: It’s official: I’m running for Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Together, we’re going to flip Texas blue
| Y’all, it’s Jasmine.

I’m reaching out with big news, and I wanted you to hear it from me first: **I’m officially running for the United States Senate here in Texas.**

Let me be clear: With our current wannabe dictator in the White House, I’m not launching this campaign to play nice. **I’m doing it to fight — because Texas deserves someone who doesn’t back down when the bullies come for her._It deserves someone who fights back._**

But to win this race, we’ll have to take on Donald Trump, the Texas Republican political machine, and all of their shady special interest donors. _And to be blunt, that won’t come cheap._

[That’s why I’m asking you to become one of my founding donors as we launch this historic grassroots campaign. I’m counting on your support now more than ever before so that we can hit the ground running and finally flip Texas blue. Will you answer the call by splitting a donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98598?t=6&akid=22154%2E878179%2ESLhaYq) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jasmine Crockett and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98599?t=7&akid=22154%2E878179%2ESLhaYq)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98600?t=8&akid=22154%2E878179%2ESLhaYq)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98601?t=9&akid=22154%2E878179%2ESLhaYq)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98608?t=10&akid=22154%2E878179%2ESLhaYq)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98598?t=11&akid=22154%2E878179%2ESLhaYq)
Let me be clear: **When there’s a fight worth having, I don’t flinch. I don’t shrink._I don’t back down._**

Just ask the communities I’ve fought for as a civil-rights attorney, the defendants I’ve represented as a public defender, and the people of Dallas that I serve in Congress. **I’m a lifelong fighter for justice.**

So Donald Trump can run his mouth all he wants. All his attacks show is that he’s terrified of what I represent — and what I’m bringing to the Senate when we win this race: **truth, accountability, and a future where power answers to the people.**

[If you believe that insults won’t silence us — if you believe in a Texas that stands for justice, equity, and real representation — I need you. We’re launching a campaign to change the game. But real campaigns need real support. That’s why I’d be so grateful if you could pitch in $10, $25, or more to help us hit the ground running. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98598?t=12&akid=22154%2E878179%2ESLhaYq)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jasmine Crockett and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98599?t=13&akid=22154%2E878179%2ESLhaYq)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98600?t=14&akid=22154%2E878179%2ESLhaYq)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98601?t=15&akid=22154%2E878179%2ESLhaYq)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98608?t=16&akid=22154%2E878179%2ESLhaYq)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98598?t=17&akid=22154%2E878179%2ESLhaYq)
Thank you,

Jasmine
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22154%2E878179%2ESLhaYq). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22154%2E878179%2ESLhaYq).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=22154%2E878179%2ESLhaYq) to request fewer emails. Peter,

This just hit my desk...

#### _**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference:](https://substack.com/redirect/a3022ff7-5e6e-4693-ba2b-f99014dd1a96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/a3022ff7-5e6e-4693-ba2b-f99014dd1a96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
**Katie Phang** and I went _all in_ on this one. We started with my half-baked book idea about personal responsibility in a time of fraud, corruption, and broken systems, and it turned into this raw, honest conversation about masculinity, burnout, Kamala, Jasmine Crockett vs. James Talarico, Trump's chaos, and what accountability actually looks like for each of us. This one's messy, emotional, political, and very, very human.
* [**00:01:07**] The seed of the book idea, and how personal responsibility collides with a corrupt political system and my own mental health.
* [**00:09:45**] Masculinity, loneliness, and why the right keeps capturing angry young men while we avoid the conversation.
* [**00:18:30**] MAGA as a "big tent," Trump selling AI chips to China, and what a functional Congress would do instead.
* [**00:27:40**] Jasmine Crockett vs. James Talarico, and the tension between brawlers and bridge-builders in Democratic politics.
* [**00:38:55**] The Kamala Harris conversation: racism, misogyny, polling, and the real work of accountability.

This episode cuts right to the heart of what so many of us are feeling -- stretched thin, trying to stay grounded, and still fighting for a country that aligns with our values. If conversations like this matter to you, help me keep them alive and accessible.
**[Become a paid subscriber to Endless Urgency today»](https://substack.com/redirect/a3022ff7-5e6e-4693-ba2b-f99014dd1a96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

We started with my half-baked book idea about personal responsibility in a time of fraud, corruption, and broken systems, and it turned into this raw, honest conversation about masculinity, burnout, Kamala, Jasmine Crockett vs. James Talarico, Trump's chaos, and what accountability actually looks like for each of us. This one's messy, emotional, political, and very, very human. [00:01:07] The seed of the book idea, and how personal responsibility collides with a corrupt political system and my own mental health. name: Lauren Toncich, Turning Point USA
subject: I’ve never seen students more eager for this...
body:
Only days left...| | |
---
| | Hi Fellow Patriot,

My name is Lauren Toncich -- and for the past seven years, I've helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event.

Making sure the lights hit at the right moment, the music is pumping through the crowd, and tens of thousands of people walk into something unforgettable.

I've never emailed you directly before.

But if you've ever seen the opening night of AmericaFest... felt the electricity of a Student Action Summit crowd... or watched one of our massive rallies ignite a room...

Then you've witnessed the kind of energy Charlie dreamed of -- brought to life by our incredible events team.
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=acd547c65a7846f7ac747482ac424074&_e=haCg-BkVa4SlYrpTza2G8W7Kg3nEm57gdFLN866svB5fxYJKTAnbozez4sg8Otm7uVNr9cGI1D0KenM3QnYM3WVP6DAlgzp2uTfhOtjzw7JuD1f9bFzvonEdpGNghQt9OKOzvQ-Scmfs7vbuibWGGnyhEBL8GH1pofBeiPip0dj_9gTdDj1tFdwD-2lhrLyWR9EdXgyrrit5w0ByX4k4xGRKOXjNMuoIz7IABzivJiPWSYNe-Cd64b_1-FHlgCVh5rsQEkO318utKyhgxZ_GpJpGGzSQt6cWek0FkTYIwGTtZmkL3n6IfwQ45LK359sDK_cH_HoAPfAWG2BVGuHngil_z247MoloRUraskvjelirvWNs8zO1NKoNUdFOCz1c2pDaFVYfZG1RpLlLZnjw2LS8j_iEF-WS-k79ZWW6KDxUYQQnJOgU8T4mkCdGzaMqXLJDS1AxlrC2OKeAMfp6Xb16J8cIc5GE6cALzJAeQVCj9yooLWmkL8kzo42X-XLFZQnQY5oieV9V4BhkSobC3jo14MR9DddfBi-hvZ_Ly4OQC1ftMtwLNy-FjWoDAKU3y04eM2MUuF5f0-MsfoI4juTx5-TW5qPh-GKdDMrRxUkgWezMeaVk-huFb7xTHMIlh5TrIcNZCG-6VkQp8DTJfd3XK8IDtnuW75qnkqsdt_pqQt0v_108Ecs5drtzklmq)
---
_Above: That 's me with Charlie, backstage at last year's AmFest making sure every detail was perfect before showtime. _
---
At the heart of every single Turning Point event is this one truth: _Young Americans deserve a stage worthy of the fight they 're in. _

**And AmericaFest -- especially this year -- is our most important stage of all. **

**This December 18 -21 in Phoenix, thousands of students will walk into the most powerful conservative gathering in America. **

It will be our first AmFest without Charlie.

This is the stage he built -- with vision, grit, and sky-high standards.

Charlie poured everything into these events, because he believed students deserved more than beige ballrooms and lazy lectures.

He believed they needed to _FEEL_ the mission -- That they were part of something unstoppable... something big enough to change the world.

Backstage, I can still hear him directing the show: _" Louder music... more sparks... bigger energy... how full are we looking?" _

Not because he wanted flash for the sake of flash...

But because he knew energy moves people. Environments shape conviction.

_And atmosphere matters when you 're calling students into the fight of their lives. _
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=acd547c65a7846f7ac747482ac424074&_e=haCg-BkVa4SlYrpTza2G8W7Kg3nEm57gdFLN866svB5fxYJKTAnbozez4sg8Otm7uVNr9cGI1D0KenM3QnYM3WVP6DAlgzp2uTfhOtjzw7JuD1f9bFzvonEdpGNghQt9OKOzvQ-Scmfs7vbuibWGGnyhEBL8GH1pofBeiPip0dj_9gTdDj1tFdwD-2lhrLyWR9EdXgyrrit5w0ByX4k4xGRKOXjNMuoIz7IABzivJiN4R8dfi4HoZ489p7TtzNPaMk6W4FrnaIyQsMooO8DZmhOy-LJYZysxf2_vUxKcLpz2lw31dlFCp7lONPL0YSTlDYx34s196eerpZjlgaUF--LtKRXGYgTvl_RaH2i9SsBNcOw5tE_jqzDUFjntjcIbyv-64ovau8x4k8WsdkoX-g6Ab-vBOV3_PnxJYqQjIBkfHRtVlhIXxfD5C6jU0W36wY5zndbFKg7Ymo57cmG56kWBLm2sy9NrGPZ4PvYa2kB9bA55h2HUbWEqEzKyhgNrvEdbR2gXmhDLc-Xi8Iy2u6Lkr8y3CnXSzEv2JWMTK450tT03pjPlPiXADuTGNwogh4Y8wRJCBB0Aal7auXIkjCBEsxL1JUKa9g-g3DNCkcxi5y_DmecanqkZd8m0O7TKT3GtDcshcfNnKLfzi1srqYc5s7dodO5p_de54mvueBs6jNhEHwz37X0p32XmGieD)
---
This year's AmFest?

_I 've never seen more students eager to be part of it. _

**Nearly 6,000 are registered. Another 2,200 are on the waitlist. **

**And we only have a few days left to get them in. **

Fellow Patriot, these students aren't looking for entertainment...

They're looking for courage, purpose, and a movement to belong to.

They're stepping onto hostile campuses. They're getting flak from Leftist professors.

Many are leading Turning Point chapters in places where they're told to sit down, shut up -- or worse.

**They want to stand for America... _They just need a chance to stand with others who will, too. _**

And when they get to AmFest, it's not just the main stage that changes their lives.

Behind the lights and cameras, they sit in smaller breakout rooms -- face-to-face with staff and speakers who show them exactly how to lead.
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=acd547c65a7846f7ac747482ac424074&_e=haCg-BkVa4SlYrpTza2G8W7Kg3nEm57gdFLN866svB5fxYJKTAnbozez4sg8Otm7uVNr9cGI1D0KenM3QnYM3WVP6DAlgzp2uTfhOtjzw7JuD1f9bFzvonEdpGNghQt9OKOzvQ-Scmfs7vbuibWGGnyhEBL8GH1pofBeiPip0dj_9gTdDj1tFdwD-2lhrLyWR9EdXgyrrit5w0ByX4k4xGRKOXjNMuoIz7IABzivJiNSUOQOb-Jn8aUHKeYdA16s5tP-pbqxWsd6SdECuzg_IlmcPOtzA9m8rijF_s9_bAP6LwRueGFi2eolxasHz6WwkExzZ5iFw8YP7KKNeVlg_JpbL1BlJT3yVrNtHOTN-TER8yCUf-udcMG6r7pZ_m7sM_I3Kv4IpmxGltv5MSN4ZfibZwye4PCXp6iGL2A6chGOESkz6AcKIys0SEcmj7DMlfr6o4p1A0y8hSrBIubzaYgbtc_BzxBPRU0ryFjpIEwXwQJInWEPM-B9FJNhH3-7ar0Ja5kGPOJDwwFamHDR8kddmJuJJpAxwZh7tEswHm_yVkap5DWrgYvuOf1goD_Tv2xhbRKtDLReAhf_VDJakBajo77xeiE7Nm0pJkOdc2lhSsOT4CBjldMEnAJd5jhK1OW70MYy727o9YCiQdvfBELncZ-jZU5OcylEPAcgEVVfsMIMs-fHtGMWhM5InBhR)
---
They learn how to organize. How to launch and grow chapters. How to push back against the Left -- strategically and fearlessly.

They're trained to fight -- and win.

Because inspiration is just the beginning. We want every student walking out of AmFest equipped for the battlefield they're stepping into.

**Fellow Patriot, that 's where you can make a difference. **

**Every $50 you give today helps sponsor a student to attend AmericaFest. And today, your gift will be MATCHED -- dollar-for-dollar. **

That means:

🔥 $50 sends TWO students
🔥 $100 sends FOUR
🔥 $250 sends EIGHT, and more.

**[You can be the reason a future leader walks into AmFest this December — instead of staying home wondering if they’re alone in this fight.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=acd547c65a7846f7ac747482ac424074&_e=haCg-BkVa4SlYrpTza2G8W7Kg3nEm57gdFLN866svB5fxYJKTAnbozez4sg8Otm7uVNr9cGI1D0KenM3QnYM3WVP6DAlgzp2uTfhOtjzw7JuD1f9bFzvonEdpGNghQt9OKOzvQ-Scmfs7vbuibWGGnyhEBL8GH1pofBeiPip0dj_9gTdDj1tFdwD-2lhrLyWR9EdXgyrrit5w0ByX4k4xGRKOXjNMuoIz7IABzivJiPn_N5VZatnlALk9azr0Ka9YVk1_rGu7TtwcFmZy8-rMctYcyZ93VM6HF_Zr_R7fEvJLLzGUm24MzKdJNd9Ab9EHLBrfyGmiK4-4klmStL0hXf4ka3BEcXk2r5dvuUzyeYNKd4sLZsTtJfCiuMZ8HmqlRlnE5h3aVjNmNL-L_c2c690jOsUAMrGbyRnuYhZ93eLdsTEMLWCNXAAZkDj94DOmrCNHsvwSMvk7FwdbruQe17FXAs0JbWU7nFGHLGgqBNyDp5Q1iwbpbRPiRUSGqJdfBfgZeQoL58b3Vhdrc5LuUnCbELfEDinubfUhw8b30nbLSIwF_vyZT1mMXXmyL7rRr1lK-NKBBDV5BO3NSrzk2TGEDp4FNmLeHoMGLlm0iaHj8HgqEk4t4MpF-OKoIp5mjLHxtYF73RD3C5KkxkpwH4FQGYBkoZLjpCokXOOm7CHwuCf2YRF-CTlITDccD98)**
---
[ **Sponsor a Student for AmFest
****& Double Your Impact**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=acd547c65a7846f7ac747482ac424074&_e=haCg-BkVa4SlYrpTza2G8W7Kg3nEm57gdFLN866svB5fxYJKTAnbozez4sg8Otm7uVNr9cGI1D0KenM3QnYM3WVP6DAlgzp2uTfhOtjzw7JuD1f9bFzvonEdpGNghQt9OKOzvQ-Scmfs7vbuibWGGnyhEBL8GH1pofBeiPip0dj_9gTdDj1tFdwD-2lhrLyWR9EdXgyrrit5w0ByX4k4xGRKOXjNMuoIz7IABzivJiPjBFSQQDhokVMd03_AE9JKPQHkN8gn0he7TrckXfehIRrRVaLWFeATZCCIedR0m8drOV39m8KXB0kGgeUNmoEwTvRZJQ_JEJc3krlxBk6NTUQVe2_8jYUcyKIe_Kv8kJo4qA6GSipstwQILLOB4N7OO41bHs-uW7cooN0jh456vHN6cxK63ZCyTDGM6JzHl-Mbiqmx0k8aUFWghpirx5XU5Yc06STawaf2UoBSLO9Ito_wpVhPDYOL4Ol8UGZcj2MftnFfBcc8P3gxUmUaRHtPb-epASQk4cVc2_TQwahx-C7IDgG_i09obbxS_GjCX_LGYgZZrzV_Rgodwqmk2dfeilPf4wwdHUQsb_sCfC7xyAu1eMhdBJjRVroh2a4BqZMnD822TnrplJk8SeuBhvmYTNsBocX4fZTSQgifixDufTuYYjELbL63tn-gSX39TgM3ewA5ryCwVBQIKuIUDvft)
---
Every year, I see it firsthand:

Students walk in with doubts, with fears, with barely enough money to afford the flight.

They walk out with confidence, connection, and a new sense of calling.

I've seen them go home and start chapters. I've seen them run for office.

Many tell me -- even years later, that this one event changed everything.

_So no -- I'm not just asking you to sponsor an "event." _

**I 'm asking you to help change the trajectory of a young patriot. **

[**A young patriot who could be the next leader, the next fighter, the next firebrand that helps save this country.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=acd547c65a7846f7ac747482ac424074&_e=haCg-BkVa4SlYrpTza2G8W7Kg3nEm57gdFLN866svB5fxYJKTAnbozez4sg8Otm7uVNr9cGI1D0KenM3QnYM3WVP6DAlgzp2uTfhOtjzw7JuD1f9bFzvonEdpGNghQt9OKOzvQ-Scmfs7vbuibWGGnyhEBL8GH1pofBeiPip0dj_9gTdDj1tFdwD-2lhrLyWR9EdXgyrrit5w0ByX4k4xGRKOXjNMuoIz7IABzivJiP9aJDRU7kZoa5gHDX7jjJU1aqrZfbOXwpRCXFP2PcduQz7g2oZgezS_-f-8xcBj0DmuTT5Jz07wsgIRQ4FQhILvsLRbes44GSn_PkiY0Ci3jVqhntz4ZAu_r2-lMAI_Rn2VdOTOXE0uVGw9mdmknkMSfEyRPzP53uZB46gXHxW_42Y5xwFJxLjOMF4x6nLGd0Q0kT88yekkFMZVIyVgCZ7dPds27hmNl0miGdXnnqRM-SuH64rtCeu-FFJdDLcYBlLIxUpvp9-nnocma2Iu3lmjj5f17eNEgeE2upIsu2BsS5CCOpM4jS6qX_5HsntQBDL-bMhWPbLnrC-n19Ld97AJDKfCQHNHZhGpJAWl51_7p-xbR4WTdVZHZjwYPHr8qfOGYvboUIcmbgEzMMoI32Qu5_kJ3DcjiRp0BJhPiRH7kig5QAZmB68W2K3GxTgNv0Wfl3IVidmfLgEOjQxMmTJ)
---
[ **Sponsor a Student for AmFest
****& Double Your Impact**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=acd547c65a7846f7ac747482ac424074&_e=haCg-BkVa4SlYrpTza2G8W7Kg3nEm57gdFLN866svB5fxYJKTAnbozez4sg8Otm7uVNr9cGI1D0KenM3QnYM3WVP6DAlgzp2uTfhOtjzw7JuD1f9bFzvonEdpGNghQt9OKOzvQ-Scmfs7vbuibWGGnyhEBL8GH1pofBeiPip0dj_9gTdDj1tFdwD-2lhrLyWR9EdXgyrrit5w0ByX4k4xGRKOXjNMuoIz7IABzivJiPZla7YsmoLtjASSj9BkVy5cbLdNFthwm8VGid-ykhR6gr7mLe6zNCYwG3mt2M1RZ3CUepxnuYy1Ay8HwtmwJBseD7qlwBAOx49fZZgaeKojHq372LDd0ubNbd0_vHYwGiH-ykULZeG4zeFNVi5LfdGNw0yejOwcOXptUk6rI_NoIZoG58fxJuoBm93GsXmPUs-TkJiHSWGKAotf2dbs3TGAxxlLlKuCFlsu8fg3tAAlZUcY51yS9dxy719IS6T1rF8d3yYZ1SRu5bohdqw3yTTBwfpsj5QF8XZMvhKJg5lUOX1s15a_cVq0UVgjWmn8rJCJx3Y0xMVxDd20wUZtAzeP19Nlm--iUvHn8htKUFVsx8ZHJsFQHfoCC4TiHd2iAgsfAdHLDr4b8vrATGq0ABS_GPjFNQh19iI7Vnm-xU8mhJPA8C3UrNQZilEXoqSsvhNjz1wkUvsW6U4S58c-4lU)
---
Fellow Patriot, I know what Charlie would want right now.

He'd want every seat filled. He'd want AmFest to echo with boldness and fire.

He'd want us to fight like he's still backstage -- still calling for more sparks.

Most of all, he'd want every student who made the trip to believe they were part of something bigger than themselves.

To walk in searching for purpose -- and leave filled with it. .

Let's make sure every young patriot who wants to fight for this country gets their chance -- and gets to Phoenix this December.
---
| | **For Charlie, **

**Lauren Toncich **
Vice President of Events
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=acd547c65a7846f7ac747482ac424074&_e=haCg-BkVa4SlYrpTza2G8W7Kg3nEm57gdFLN866svB5fxYJKTAnbozez4sg8Otm7uVNr9cGI1D0KenM3QnYM3WVP6DAlgzp2uTfhOtjzw7JuD1f9bFzvonEdpGNghQt9OKOzvQ-Scmfs7vbuibWGGnyhEBL8GH1pofBeiPip0dj_9gTdDj1tFdwD-2lhrLyWR9EdXgyrrit5w0ByX4k4xGRKOXjNMuoIz7IABzivJiO7ErqYNUEfLsSULHxWWGJi42nD4bM3_59j5_JQlgi9HkUUUO3_PPMiuhSbsMlicOvinAwElzS_nCLCe7N7QRzzbwrNTX8F30a8h6iUljeWPXXOIV8F59iBtMf0pDtaa8azmfU_dfiI3CZBIkHwupRd-dmPT0cGrtxGyByfrm6gySyklDnX-3KcCIv6Z2uRR9QwIKsaa3-0WYV8sNQs-unKH0i5qgvf9xz2M6OR_c1Zb8ET1wu1l1WGQPHcS8j_K5v36qd_Kl43wMAqCpKU3mK39Fu6HZpPVIPEdWJvnjIav94K8BbrVURmYXG8B2IXBi7N22HdMgXtqlnT7LEzWt0XBW80KddsaDNkmKgVPjeQqaI7493WX3pYZH7gFgO1t3he-vUT5UdknPyao015AE4ooG6ce9Z8uMheXQ1Ij099OzAvzFvSTikjCrsWwXF50b1O0PZZ-Gs240rE0b4H_8I7)

clean_body: Only days left...| | | | | Hi Fellow Patriot, My name is Lauren Toncich -- and for the past seven years, I've helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event. Making sure the lights hit at the right moment, the music is pumping through the crowd, and tens of thousands of people walk into something unforgettable. I've never emailed you directly before. But if you've ever seen the opening night of AmericaFest... felt the electricity of a Student Action Summit crowd... or watched one of our massive rallies ignite a room... Then you've witnessed the kind of energy Charlie dreamed of -- brought to life by our incredible events team. Above: That 's me with Charlie, backstage at last year's AmFest making sure every detail was perfect before showtime. At the heart of every single Turning Point event is this one truth: Young Americans deserve a stage worthy of the fight they 're in. And AmericaFest -- especially this year -- is our most important stage of all. This December 18 -21 in Phoenix, thousands of students will walk into the most powerful conservative gathering in America. It will be our first AmFest without Charlie. This is the stage he built -- with vision, grit, and sky-high standards. Charlie poured everything into these events, because he believed students deserved more than beige ballrooms and lazy lectures. He believed they needed to FEEL the mission -- That they were part of something unstoppable... something big enough to change the world. Backstage, I can still hear him directing the show: " Louder music... more sparks... bigger energy... how full are we looking?" Not because he wanted flash for the sake of flash... But because he knew energy moves people. Environments shape conviction. And atmosphere matters when you 're calling students into the fight of their lives. This year's AmFest? I 've never seen more students eager to be part of it. Nearly 6,000 are registered. Another 2,200 are on the waitlist. And we only have a few days left to get them in. Fellow Patriot, these students aren't looking for entertainment... They're looking for courage, purpose, and a movement to belong to. They're stepping onto hostile campuses. They're getting flak from Leftist professors. Many are leading Turning Point chapters in places where they're told to sit down, shut up -- or worse. They want to stand for America... They just need a chance to stand with others who will, too. And when they get to AmFest, it's not just the main stage that changes their lives. Behind the lights and cameras, they sit in smaller breakout rooms -- face-to-face with staff and speakers who show them exactly how to lead. They learn how to organize. How to launch and grow chapters. How to push back against the Left -- strategically and fearlessly. They're trained to fight -- and win. Because inspiration is just the beginning. We want every student walking out of AmFest equipped for the battlefield they're stepping into. Fellow Patriot, that 's where you can make a difference. Every $50 you give today helps sponsor a student to attend AmericaFest. And today, your gift will be MATCHED -- dollar-for-dollar. That means: 🔥 $50 sends TWO students 🔥 $100 sends FOUR 🔥 $250 sends EIGHT, and more. Every year, I see it firsthand: Students walk in with doubts, with fears, with barely enough money to afford the flight. They walk out with confidence, connection, and a new sense of calling. I've seen them go home and start chapters. I've seen them run for office. Many tell me -- even years later, that this one event changed everything. So no -- I'm not just asking you to sponsor an "event." I 'm asking you to help change the trajectory of a young patriot. Fellow Patriot, I know what Charlie would want right now. He'd want every seat filled. He'd want AmFest to echo with boldness and fire. He'd want us to fight like he's still backstage -- still calling for more sparks. Most of all, he'd want every student who made the trip to believe they were part of something bigger than themselves. To walk in searching for purpose -- and leave filled with it. . Let's make sure every young patriot who wants to fight for this country gets their chance -- and gets to Phoenix this December. | | For Charlie, Lauren Toncich Vice President of Events Turning Point USA P.S. This is our first AmericaFest without Charlie. But it will be the most important one we've ever hosted. Help us fill the room he loved -- with students ready to carry his mission forward. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

### Nothing to say on healthcare, electricity prices, jobs...
| | [Conor Lamb](https://substack.com/@conorlambpa)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/84d7c0d9-0102-4ea7-9b99-4cc6d8f0aec6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Late in the '24 campaign, Trump posed in the drive-thru window of a McDonald's outside Philadelphia, aiming for its blue-collar customers. The visit attracted large in-person crowds and earned coverage in the [New York Times](https://substack.com/redirect/4c0081ca-a7c6-4eda-9147-a61fb8b7d43a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The stunt seemed to show that Trump had his finger on the pulse of blue-collar voters.
We've talked all year about how Trump failed to deliver (see, e.g., [my post here](https://substack.com/redirect/6e5e46c6-57b7-489f-88a3-859b5ea55c13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), and those arguments don't need to be rehashed. What was important about tonight's speech is that it demonstrates how far -- how very far -- out of touch Trump has become.
If you weren't following the build-up to tonight: Trump is trying to reset the conversation about his economic record. For his first speech, he chose a casino in northeastern Pennsylvania -- somewhere between Allentown and Scranton -- as the venue. The choice of a casino is interesting in itself. It's a place where the odds are stacked against you, and you're basically on your own. A casino doesn't say, "I'm on your side," but rather, "I expect that you will keep losing money." But Trump is comfortable in places like that, so that's where he went.
Anyway, if _you_ were the president and _you_ were coming to a state like Pennsylvania, where half of households earn less than $75,000 a year and a third earn $50,000 or less, you'd want to strip things down to the basics and address the very real stress that people are feeling. You wouldn't want to say people were "[stupid](https://substack.com/redirect/a5402c21-8130-4a73-9797-019969cc5cce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" for pointing out his lack of focus, which is what Trump did tonight.
* Take, for example, healthcare. How could someone not have flagged for him that today, the very day of his speech, a Pittsburgh newspaper [reported](https://substack.com/redirect/cde2d513-26e9-4cf4-b25a-1739d461ee03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that two people are dropping Obamacare coverage for every one person buying it. The article even put (quite scary) numbers on it: 38,000 people have opted not to renew their plans so far on Pennie, our state exchange, compared to 19,000 who have renewed it. Last year about 500,000 people in our state relied on Pennie for coverage, so you can see how much of a disaster it will be if this trend continues. _**And yet in his speech Trump had no plan to cover these people, and instead continued to claim he was going to send them money. (Which of course does nothing to make an insurance company offer them anything they can afford).**_
* Let's take another basic issue on the mind of every blue-collar voter: monthly bills, like electricity. More than 270,000 Pennsylvanians had their electricity turned off this year. A 21% [increase](https://substack.com/redirect/2047b206-0fb7-4cc1-b06b-a048cb00cc05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) since Trump became president! Seems bad, especially since I remember Trump saying in Erie, during the campaign, that he would [cut](https://substack.com/redirect/957f802b-f2e0-42b4-84b7-b6b00d10114c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) electricity prices by 50%. _**And yet tonight Trump announced no new idea to help people pay their bills, much less to lower them. He simply said they 'd be coming down "soon." Not soon enough if your power was already shut off. **_
* How about jobs? Recently an in-state [poll](https://substack.com/redirect/55201037-90f8-4dfd-ad4e-ce3998f78fca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) found about half of Pennsylvania voters said Trump was "below average" or "failing" at job growth. This [report](https://substack.com/redirect/c5a1bbb6-bf77-4830-bce5-5ca7c6dde73d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) seems to suggest why. It comes from a neutral, business-minded outlet in the middle of the state. Definitely no coastal or political bias. It says that hiring in and around Lancaster, PA came in lower than expected even though the number of openings was increasing (i.e. they really wanted to hire, but didn't). According to the article, this mismatch was a result of the climate of uncertainty created by the tariffs. _**And yet he had nothing to say tonight about ending these destructive tariffs, and instead seemed to promise that the["beatings will continue until the morale improves."](https://substack.com/redirect/0b6f1205-2bbe-42ba-8a19-9f0a08a74ae2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_

I suppose all of this reveals that Trump just never understood the difference between campaigning and governing. It reminds me of how he thought he could bluster his way through the pandemic, even though he plainly didn't understand it. At least in that situation, he was dealing with something novel. But now, the basics of our economy are not new. And real people in our state are suffering. He still has the chance to gain back some ground, at least on the healthcare issue, by backing an ACA extension offered by [members of his own party.](https://substack.com/redirect/b557587c-7a78-4a26-abdc-dd67cc7a97dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) But he won't. It's another thing he didn't even bother to mention tonight.
