[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..zXSTy-wxdNI27nKDlwi3FaadZNpidp7E1nwuXyaxa6A?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=181240686)
* * *
**Even though recent focus for immigration enforcement has been** on the New Orleans for **[Operation Catahoula Crunch,](https://substack.com/redirect/dc24a2c4-d2ad-4722-98f5-3004f1a9c281?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that does not mean Homeland Security operations have slowed down in other parts of the country.
The snow on the ground in the Chicago area provided the backdrop for a recent raid by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement a few days ago. Agents were targeting an alleged Tren de Aragua member in the suburb of Elgin. Problems started after the target, Jesus Acosta Gutierrez, intentionally rammed an officer's vehicle into a tree. Acosta then fled on foot and barricaded himself into an apartment of a person he did not know.
Naturally, this commotion got the attention of the neighborhood and a crowd started to form once people realized there were ICE officers in the area. Since this is 2025 and leftists have been conditioned to attack federal law enforcement these days, the crowd became unruly. It did not matter who the target was to these people, they wanted ICE out of their neighborhood.
_**A message from our sponsor (Piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Together with American Hartford Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/d41cb9ed-9ba3-47cb-baa1-21535b11a573?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **$2.4T Gone! AI Bubble Has 401(k) 's Trapped in a Firestorm**
### **Billions are vanishing from the markets by the hour. The window to a safe exit is closing ...**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d41cb9ed-9ba3-47cb-baa1-21535b11a573?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**You 've been warned for years of the underlying risk in your retirement savings account. The three week period between October 29-November 21, 2025 served as your wake up call.**
Seeking Alpha reported a $2.4 Trillion dollar loss for the S&P 500 during this time, sending panic waves across the world. Billionaire Peter Theil's hedge fund dumped the entire firm's holdings of the market darling, NVIDIA. They didn't sell some of it, they sold ALL of it.
When whales and institutions start running for the exits, it means **[the"AI Bubble" isn't just leaking... it's exploding.](https://substack.com/redirect/d41cb9ed-9ba3-47cb-baa1-21535b11a573?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **As the market whales sell off their holdings, stock prices plummet, even those index funds you were told were "safe and reliable".
**If your retirement wealth is held in a 401(k), IRA, TSP, or pension when the market opens next week, you are volunteering to potentially lose much or all of your life savings.**
You can follow the smart money to safety, not by selling for cash, but by moving to the ultimate safe haven... Physical Gold.
Gold is trusted by the wise and wealthy, as it stands firm in value when the paper economy burns.
**You can use a little-known IRS loophole to move your retirement funds into a Gold IRA, backed by physical gold that you own, as soon as today. This loophole allows for a tax-free, penalty-free transfer that gets you out of the fire and into security.**
**[Click Here for Your FREE 2026 Wealth Protection Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/d41cb9ed-9ba3-47cb-baa1-21535b11a573?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and take the path to protection.
**[>> Get Your Free WEALTH PROTECTION GUIDE <<](https://substack.com/redirect/d41cb9ed-9ba3-47cb-baa1-21535b11a573?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Get My Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/d41cb9ed-9ba3-47cb-baa1-21535b11a573?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**(Piece continues below)**_
Crowd control measures had to be deployed to keep the mob back because, "The local police department refused to protect ICE law enforcement officers," **[according to DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin.](https://substack.com/redirect/12a7acff-da33-4d24-953d-78f2846edcff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"This suspected TdA gang member entered the country illegally in April 2023 and was released by the Biden administration. Then, the Biden administration granted him Temporary Protected Status (TPS). This once again underscores the lack of vetting the Biden administration did on aliens they allowed into American communities," McLaughlin continued.
"Despite the violent agitators and the lack of help from local police, this TDA member was arrested and is in ICE custody."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6dfa101a-e8b4-4270-97e9-8647817ccc60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Elgin Mayor Dave Kaptain had harsh words, not for the suspected gang member, but for the federal agents.
"It discourages me, it disgusts me the actions of the federal agents that came to our city. This city was founded on its diversity and self-respect and the mutual respect between our residents. These ICE people have not shown that respect to this community and that really angers me," **[Kaptain said in a statement.](https://substack.com/redirect/68fd99fb-0f8a-4f14-800f-37c322adbf5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Kaptain likewise had no words of condemnation for the violent actions of the crowd that showed up.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..zXSTy-wxdNI27nKDlwi3FaadZNpidp7E1nwuXyaxa6A?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=181240686)
It is beyond insanity people are willing to at a moment's notice to attack law enforcement because...enforcing federal immigration law has been "mean." Beyond that, Leftists have whipped themselves up into a frenzy by now claiming the Trump administration is carrying out **["ethnic cleansing."](https://substack.com/redirect/90c12870-e187-4bf8-afb7-266e19c40dc9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
If there is anyone to blame for the mess that is our immigration system, most of it should be laid upon the Biden-Harris administration for purposefully opening our borders for four years. They knew what would happen if they undid the steps President Donald Trump took in his first term, and they did it anyway and did nothing meaningful to solve it.
The only thing they tried was pushing for an open borders bill at the last minute because it was the election year and then blamed the GOP for not passing it.
* * *

They knew what would happen if they undid the steps President Donald Trump took in his first term, and they did it anyway and did nothing meaningful to solve it. The only thing they tried was pushing for an open borders bill at the last minute because it was the election year and then blamed the GOP for not passing it. | A guest post by| Reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media. Subscribe to my newsletter for original content as I travel the United States and beyond. You're currently a free subscriber to . name: MAGA make-a-wish
subject: Donald’s dictator delusions reach a whole new level
body:
This is dictator-level delusion, reminiscent of the stunts pulled by North Korean dictator Kim Jong Un.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001diLJU5HCXTMH1jPDi8Zh0_bdGFTSznj5HnSzK4pWXlzdnQpWSXZQ3N9ThlN3JqPa46xhrWT5g43Hf2797IY6w6mjV3NmMReNKJqbWd3YEvKunJ9Tjew3_S54k-uaRSGPcRvJUSPaALdquT3eQ2BhC_CXJflRx12q-i_aM3qjukrK17w1tLoH2T1dQ1uDiP4TBMkxAjdlx_UxWu528wDpLJjK1kJKz9Zu&c=BTGFdg6HrWDFFqshv_GwDfX4fziTE_8XuMS9q1zFUykZ-LSKMz2z1w==&ch=jZqgjZMgXI4EXuG6Em9cc3ZBRjX9ZP_31a8sSjCf3pWquZ1sOPqykQ==)
---
|
Peter,
In a pathetic display of vanity, Donald Trump accepted a completely made-up 'peace prize' from FIFA, an award created out of thin air solely to make his dream of receiving a peace prize come true like a make-a-wish dream.
This is dictator-level delusion, reminiscent of the stunts pulled by North Korean dictator Kim Jong Un.
The irony would be hilarious if his actions weren't so sickening--unleashing violence everywhere he looks.

---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001diLJU5HCXTMH1jPDi8Zh0_bdGFTSznj5HnSzK4pWXlzdnQpWSXZQ3N9ThlN3JqPa46xhrWT5g43Hf2797IY6w6mjV3NmMReNKJqbWd3YEvKunJ9Tjew3_S54k-uaRSGPcRvJUSPaALdquT3eQ2BhC_CXJflRx12q-i_aM3qjukrK17w1tLoH2T1dQ1uDiP4TBMkxAjdlx_UxWu528wDpLDe5o4Vjk0D8&c=BTGFdg6HrWDFFqshv_GwDfX4fziTE_8XuMS9q1zFUykZ-LSKMz2z1w==&ch=jZqgjZMgXI4EXuG6Em9cc3ZBRjX9ZP_31a8sSjCf3pWquZ1sOPqykQ==)
---

Abroad, he has us on the brink of war with Venezuela, where he is threatening military action and indiscriminately murdering fishermen in international waters.
But the violence isn't just overseas.
Here at home, my hometown of Chicago and cities across this nation are facing down the brutality ICE is unleashing in our communities. They are snatching people off the street with no due process, firing tear gas and rubber bullets into crowds, and brutalising and persecuting peaceful protesters.
This is a regime of violence. He indiscriminately murders abroad and brutalizes our neighbors at home, all while clutching a fake trophy and demanding we call him a peacemaker. Trump is dangerous, insecure, and completely out of control.
We desperately need a Congress that will reign him in. When I get there, I will move immediately to dismantle his corruption, oppose his warmongering, and hold his officials accountable for their crimes against humanity. But I cannot do it without the resources to fight back.

clean_body: This is dictator-level delusion, reminiscent of the stunts pulled by North Korean dictator Kim Jong Un. | | | | | == | Peter, In a pathetic display of vanity, Donald Trump accepted a completely made-up 'peace prize' from FIFA, an award created out of thin air solely to make his dream of receiving a peace prize come true like a make-a-wish dream. This is dictator-level delusion, reminiscent of the stunts pulled by North Korean dictator Kim Jong Un. The irony would be hilarious if his actions weren't so sickening--unleashing violence everywhere he looks. | == Abroad, he has us on the brink of war with Venezuela, where he is threatening military action and indiscriminately murdering fishermen in international waters. But the violence isn't just overseas. Here at home, my hometown of Chicago and cities across this nation are facing down the brutality ICE is unleashing in our communities. They are snatching people off the street with no due process, firing tear gas and rubber bullets into crowds, and brutalising and persecuting peaceful protesters. This is a regime of violence. He indiscriminately murders abroad and brutalizes our neighbors at home, all while clutching a fake trophy and demanding we call him a peacemaker. Trump is dangerous, insecure, and completely out of control. We desperately need a Congress that will reign him in. When I get there, I will move immediately to dismantle his corruption, oppose his warmongering, and hold his officials accountable for their crimes against humanity. But I cannot do it without the resources to fight back. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | From Venezuela to Chicago, his cruelty knows no borders. name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m ending my race for U.S. Senate
body:
Peter,
I officially ended my campaign for U.S. Senate and filed to run for Congress in Texas’ 33rd Congressional District.
I didn’t come to this decision lightly – I’ve put everything I had into my Senate campaign over the last five months, traveling to every corner of the state, talking to as many Texans as I could, building on the incredible grassroots campaign we started last year.
While it was clear that many Texans were ready to support me to the end, it was also clear that the Democratic primary would end up in a bruising and costly runoff in May. And if we want to prevent another MAGA loyalist from representing our state for six more years, that’s simply a risk we can’t afford to take.
So, today I am announcing my campaign to represent the newly drawn 33rd district in Texas. If you’d still like to see me head to Washington in November, I hope you’ll consider splitting a donation between me and Real Texas to get my new campaign off to a strong start today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=121025_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Colin Allred and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=121025_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=121025_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=121025_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=121025_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=121025_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=121025_1&amount=25]
District 33 was racially gerrymandered by Republicans in an effort to further rig our democracy, but it’s still the community where I grew up attending public schools and watching my mom struggle to pay for our groceries. It’s the community where Aly and I are raising our two boys. It is my home.
The threats that our democracy and our way of living are facing right now are real. It’s harder than ever for kids like me to get a shot, and for single moms like mine to afford their basic needs. But I am more confident than I have ever been that together, we can beat these threats. That’s why I am humbly asking for your help to return to Congress to fight for North Texans, our democracy, and the American Dream.
If you can, please split a donation of a few bucks between my campaign and Real Texas to help me get started. Thank you for reading, and for all of your continued support as we fight to get Texas representation we can be proud of. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=121025_1]
Colin Allred
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=121025_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=121025_1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=121025_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=121025_1]

Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. body:
And our A.I. task force

# [The robocall wars continue](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=181245487&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMjQ1NDg3LCJpYXQiOjE3NjUzODI4NTcsImV4cCI6MTc2Nzk3NDg1NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.qmhvausvDTCqOKMF7dxwuYkJJf4Aa0TdrPb5aW9Ixx4)
### And our A.I. task force
| | [Jeff Jackson](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---
| Dec 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=181245487&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMjQ1NDg3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NTM4Mjg1NywiZXhwIjoxNzY3OTc0ODU3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTE0NTAyMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.w7IW-M0J6pFCwDuRTeysVWPGnDayJlVt-tpHYvVWsGo&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=181245487&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMjQ1NDg3LCJpYXQiOjE3NjUzODI4NTcsImV4cCI6MTc2Nzk3NDg1NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.qmhvausvDTCqOKMF7dxwuYkJJf4Aa0TdrPb5aW9Ixx4&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=181245487&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMjQ1NDg3LCJpYXQiOjE3NjUzODI4NTcsImV4cCI6MTc2Nzk3NDg1NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.qmhvausvDTCqOKMF7dxwuYkJJf4Aa0TdrPb5aW9Ixx4)
---
| | [](https://substack..yiOzHByjBMj1Vw6DoM2rwLk4ajS9zxF5jSbN7HHyuok?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jeffjacksonnc/p/the-robocall-wars-continue?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

A few weeks ago, I called the Republican attorney general for Utah, Derek Brown.
I asked if he would join me in leading a bipartisan, AG-led task force on A.I. abuse.
He was great. Agreed fast.
Then we sent out word to other AGs, and they're joining fast, too.
Here's the idea:
A.I. will be used for good - and bad.
When it comes to the bad stuff, my prediction is that Congress is going to do very little, as we saw with social media and internet privacy. Almost nothing from them, after all these years.
Meanwhile, we're already seeing A.I. used by criminals to target kids, seniors, and the rest of us. Attorneys general make sense as a response group because our core job is keeping people safe.
This kind of effort could easily get pulled in a dozen directions, so we're staying focused. The plan is to set clear priorities around the most egregious abuses and then band together to do something practical and helpful.
That's the rough plan. I've got ideas for where we should start, and I'll report back soon.
### **The Robocall Wars - Phase 1 Complete**
Three months ago, I told you I was getting more aggressive on robocalls.
Specifically, I said I was going after the middleman companies that pass these calls along even when they know they're illegal and should be blocked.
So I publicly posted the names of 37 of these telecom companies and sent each of them a letter.
I gave them three weeks to comply with the law.
If they chose not to, they could end up like one company - Articul8 - which ignored us when we told them to stop patching through illegal robocalls. We drove it out of business and hit it with a $5 million fine.
Then I posted this [video](https://substack.com/redirect/3691e71f-b191-430b-b99a-a83e1472afb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) directly calling out those 37 companies, letting them know what the consequences would be if they looked the other way. It got over a million views - presumably including the CEOs of those companies.
Our effort worked.
The vast majority of those companies are now blocking robocalls. Most of the ones that refused have been removed from the federal database, which means all of their traffic is now being blocked.
That brings us to the end of Phase 1.
Phase 2 has just begun, and it involves going upstream to some of the largest telecom companies in the country. We've been laying the groundwork for this for months. I'll be able to share more in a few weeks.
As I have told these companies, when it comes to fighting robocalls, voters have given me more than a mandate - they've given me a _commandment_.
I did a telephone town hall with AARP last week. When it was time to take questions, 90% of them were about the nonstop robocalls hitting our seniors. There is precisely zero sympathy for companies that are part of the problem.
I am not messing around on this. These robocall companies can get right or they can get torched. Up to them.
### **Points for Honesty**
Owen, our 10-year-old, is a very normal kid in that he uses his iPad a lot to play games with his friends.
But last week I decided it was time to set some daily limits. I used the parental controls, and he and I even agreed together on the amount of time.
Two days later, he came to me, staring at his feet.
"Uh, Dad, you have to change the password for the parental controls. I know it and, um, I know that I'll totally use it to give myself more time... so you gotta change it."
I thought that was awesome. So I gave him a hug, told him I was really impressed, added ten minutes to his allowed time - and changed the password.
### **Our Lighthouse Fund**
One quick behind-the-scenes note.
Our Lighthouse Fund exists for one purpose: to make sure updates like our robocall video actually reach independent voters. Unless we pay to put these updates in front of people, they could go years without hearing from me at all. As you know, lots of folks don't follow political accounts or read newsletters like this - but they do scroll.
That's how we stay on their radar in a steady, credible way - not by showing up out of nowhere during campaign season, but by keeping people posted as the work happens. It's not expensive, but it's not free.
If you believe in that approach, I hope you'll consider supporting our Lighthouse Fund either **[here](https://substack.com/redirect/b351da3d-a5c5-42fa-afbe-e4f74d676745?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** (ActBlue) or **[here](https://substack.com/redirect/23358dbe-7428-4cb7-ad6f-c8b0879f71ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** (non-ActBlue).
Best,
Jeff
**P.S. -** Avery came to drill with me for our annual family day. She did great, and yes, she wore her own uniform. She carried a plastic knife on her hip, but fortunately it wasn't needed. A fun day for both of us.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5a44e5dd-435e-4230-9ec0-f844f6ba417b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

clean_body: And our A.I. task force | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more And our A.I. task force | | | Dec 10 | | | | | | | | | | | | A few weeks ago, I called the Republican attorney general for Utah, Derek Brown. I asked if he would join me in leading a bipartisan, AG-led task force on A.I. abuse. He was great. Agreed fast. Then we sent out word to other AGs, and they're joining fast, too. Here's the idea: A.I. will be used for good - and bad. When it comes to the bad stuff, my prediction is that Congress is going to do very little, as we saw with social media and internet privacy. Almost nothing from them, after all these years. Meanwhile, we're already seeing A.I. used by criminals to target kids, seniors, and the rest of us. Attorneys general make sense as a response group because our core job is keeping people safe. This kind of effort could easily get pulled in a dozen directions, so we're staying focused. The plan is to set clear priorities around the most egregious abuses and then band together to do something practical and helpful. That's the rough plan. I've got ideas for where we should start, and I'll report back soon. The Robocall Wars - Phase 1 Complete Three months ago, I told you I was getting more aggressive on robocalls. Specifically, I said I was going after the middleman companies that pass these calls along even when they know they're illegal and should be blocked. So I publicly posted the names of 37 of these telecom companies and sent each of them a letter. I gave them three weeks to comply with the law. If they chose not to, they could end up like one company - Articul8 - which ignored us when we told them to stop patching through illegal robocalls. We drove it out of business and hit it with a $5 million fine. Then I posted this directly calling out those 37 companies, letting them know what the consequences would be if they looked the other way. It got over a million views - presumably including the CEOs of those companies. Our effort worked. The vast majority of those companies are now blocking robocalls. Most of the ones that refused have been removed from the federal database, which means all of their traffic is now being blocked. That brings us to the end of Phase 1. Phase 2 has just begun, and it involves going upstream to some of the largest telecom companies in the country. We've been laying the groundwork for this for months. I'll be able to share more in a few weeks. As I have told these companies, when it comes to fighting robocalls, voters have given me more than a mandate - they've given me a commandment. I did a telephone town hall with AARP last week. When it was time to take questions, 90% of them were about the nonstop robocalls hitting our seniors. There is precisely zero sympathy for companies that are part of the problem. I am not messing around on this. These robocall companies can get right or they can get torched. Up to them. Points for Honesty Owen, our 10-year-old, is a very normal kid in that he uses his iPad a lot to play games with his friends. But last week I decided it was time to set some daily limits. I used the parental controls, and he and I even agreed together on the amount of time. Two days later, he came to me, staring at his feet. "Uh, Dad, you have to change the password for the parental controls. I know it and, um, I know that I'll totally use it to give myself more time... so you gotta change it." I thought that was awesome. So I gave him a hug, told him I was really impressed, added ten minutes to his allowed time - and changed the password. Our Lighthouse Fund One quick behind-the-scenes note. Our Lighthouse Fund exists for one purpose: to make sure updates like our robocall video actually reach independent voters. Unless we pay to put these updates in front of people, they could go years without hearing from me at all. As you know, lots of folks don't follow political accounts or read newsletters like this - but they do scroll. That's how we stay on their radar in a steady, credible way - not by showing up out of nowhere during campaign season, but by keeping people posted as the work happens. It's not expensive, but it's not free. If you believe in that approach, I hope you'll consider supporting our Lighthouse Fund either (ActBlue) or (non-ActBlue). Best, Jeff P.S. - Avery came to drill with me for our annual family day. She did great, and yes, she wore her own uniform. She carried a plastic knife on her hip, but fortunately it wasn't needed. A fun day for both of us. | | ---|---|--- Jeff Jackson is a member of the NC Army National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the DoD. ? | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Jeff Jackson Jeff Jackson for Attorney General, P.O. Box 470882 Charlotte, NC 28226, United States ? ?

| | | Hi -- it's Adam Schiff, DSCC Vice Chair.

**In a moment, I'm going to talk to you about something deeply important, both to me personally and to the future of our nation. But first, I have to ask:[_Will you chip in $5 right now to help flip the Senate blue and take power away from the MAGA majority as they work to enact Trump's dangerous agenda?_](https://go.dscc.org/go/22085?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251210-AdamSchiff-SchiffSpecialElection-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251210-AdamSchiff-SchiffSpecialElection-Pros-sl1&akid=22013%2E9716520%2EmCoSmH)**

I'm going to put it plain and simple -- **Democrats have a huge opportunity to pick up Senate seats -- including in a pair of special elections on the calendar.** We've got a chance to capture seats that wouldn't have been up for years -- and in this moment, after all that we've seen from Donald Trump and his lawless administration, we have to fight for every opportunity to defeat them.

As someone who has won a special election to the Senate, I cannot emphasize enough the importance of this. Democrats only need a few seats to flip the Senate majority, and with the GOP defending more seats than they were expecting, we have a real chance to catch them flat-footed.

But we can't just sit around and cross our fingers -- **we must do what we can right now to secure the resources we need to win seats like Ohio and Florida, defend blue battleground seats across the country, pick up key seats, and defeat Trump's handpicked enablers.**

**[These special elections are among a tiny handful of races that could decide the majority, so I have to ask: Will you chip in $5 to help Democrats win key elections like these and flip the Senate majority? In critical races, every dollar counts.](https://go.dscc.org/go/22085?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251210-AdamSchiff-SchiffSpecialElection-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251210-AdamSchiff-SchiffSpecialElection-Pros-sl1&akid=22013%2E9716520%2EmCoSmH)**

name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: Help us finish 2025 strong
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=4UMh2TV9x4HqXFYqe5vsKHzTSCg4taeKM7lM7G6u2eUUeaiZA+dovFukjD99VsGTUw645b15xsgCIFsVMiMlgnEK4/3VtCadE/PTsZ5GBShOyhFFOCHD0FRhCuBG2vWf [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=4UMh2TV9x4HqXFYqe5vsKHzTSCg4taeKM7lM7G6u2eUUeaiZA+dovFukjD99VsGTUw645b15xsgCIFsVMiMlgnEK4/3VtCadE/PTsZ5GBShOyhFFOCHD0FRhCuBG2vWf]
Dear Peter,
In the spirit of giving and gratitude, I want to express my thanks to you for your OLCV membership. Our mission – to protect Oregon’s environment and climate, elect pro-environment leaders to office, and hold our elected leaders accountable – would not be possible without you.
We’ve got a lot of work ahead of us in 2026 and we need you by our side again. Will you show that commitment to our important work again by making a donation to OLCV today, Peter? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2]
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=4UMh2TV9x4HqXFYqe5vsKHzTSCg4taeKM7lM7G6u2eUUeaiZA+dovFukjD99VsGTUw645b15xsgCIFsVMiMlgnEK4/3VtCadE/PTsZ5GBShOyhFFOCHD0FRhCuBG2vWf]
We have the opportunity to make important progress next year. The 2026 Legislative Session is going to be jam-packed and here’s just some of what your donation today will go toward helping us achieve:
* Passing legislation that holds polluters accountable and makes them pay for the ever-worsening climate disasters;

* Securing sustainable funding for conservation and wildlife with the 1% for Wildlife bill;
* and defending our state from federal rollbacks on climate, as well as from gas and oil industry influence.
We’ll be in the Capitol every day of session pushing for progress and defending against threats to our climate and environment. Will you help fund this critical work by making a donation today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2]
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=4UMh2TV9x4HqXFYqe5vsKHzTSCg4taeKM7lM7G6u2eUUeaiZA+dovFukjD99VsGTUw645b15xsgCIFsVMiMlgnEK4/3VtCadE/PTsZ5GBShOyhFFOCHD0FRhCuBG2vWf]
What we’re able to accomplish in 2026 depends on you. Your generous contribution will keep OLCV in the fight for a climate safe and just future.
Yours in the fight,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Lindsey.png]
Lindsey Scholten (she/her)
OLCV Executive Director
P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, please fill out this form here to opt-out [https://secure.everyaction.com/c2_U_ki-NEyU8Gdkttquug2] but still remain on our general email list!

1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Pete's not wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Hill: Buttigieg doubles down on scrapping Electoral College: 'It's undemocratic' [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=121025_1&amount=25]
Friend - leaders like Pete Buttigieg, Bernie Sanders, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Robert Reich are leading the charge to ditch the Electoral College and switch to a national popular vote system. Why?
➜ The Electoral College is the reason Trump won in 2016, despite losing the popular vote by millions
➜ Joe Biden nearly lost the presidency in 2020, even though he won the popular vote by a historic margin
➜ Every day, new leaders join our movement, which means we can abolish the Electoral College and give us a true democracy
We’re so close to getting rid of the Electoral College, but we need to bring in more pro-popular vote supporters across the country to cross the finish line. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today and help us ditch the Electoral College? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=121025_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=121025_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=121025_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=121025_1&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=121025_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=121025_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=121025_1&amount=35]
We keep talking about this because it's true: 16 states plus DC have already indicated that they're willing to scrap this electoral scheme and move to a national popular vote.
It's clear that our democracy needs reform to be protected. But we're only going to be able to forge the country we deserve if we stand up for our rights, push back against the gerrymandering and voter suppression, and finally make a national popular vote a reality. Too much is at stake for us to give up now.
Help put us over the top in the states we need to end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=121025_1&amount=25]
Thank you,
The Voter Action Project Electoral College Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121025_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121025_1&amount=20]

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: More rural hospitals are shutting their doors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Communities are losing access to care
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KC4FCRB8E9BCTPFBRHSDYK0Y_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KC4FCRB8E9BCTPFBRHSDYK0Y_1)
---
| | | | Dear Peter, **Rural families are driving hours for emergency rooms and vital healthcare services, because Republicans continue to block increased access to care and allow insurance companies to operate without sufficient regulation.**

Hospital closures have become all too common across our state, leaving communities without the care they need and deserve. Pregnant mothers have to drive hours while in labor before reaching a hospital to deliver their child.

**No Tennessean should have to wonder if help will arrive in time or if a mother will arrive at the hospital before her child is born.**

We are working on solutions to keep hospitals open, but we need your help.
---
| | [ Protect Rural Healthcare Now ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KC4FCRB8E9BCTPFBRHSDYK0Y_2)
---
| The Tennessee House Democratic Caucus

name: Fatima, United We Dream
subject: A personal story
body:
No matter what happens, we have each other’s backs. | | | Peter, I’m incredibly proud to be part of the team at United We Dream, and to have this chance to tell my story. To me, working at UWD means feeling confident that the work I do aligns with my moral compass and my personal values. Every day, I get to work with peers and members who love immigrants and understand the power that we hold. I can’t imagine working anywhere else. Immigrant youth are at the heart of everything we do, and they will always be our top priority. Their dreams and potential inspire our mission every day! One of my favorite programs I was part of this year was our Summer of Dreams. I loved being a part of it — I got to see our members put together beautiful, safe, and meaningful community events in their cities. Having spaces like that during this turbulent time allowed members to connect and bring their friends, families and communities together. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvvSptAA5-xC0ZLMh3sw_H8hyCmECnODiQzfTWOA-yBFywOLXLID3SEx63HSE3kpjnnmNM3BTdM1ww1En4GzUe9gC0QK6suo6T94TKdybR7SOOQQFRvV9hLtIIXYPDE7fDFmbRdXzn_9uQoMRaS7wn9Qp3PTVmpoA5d1YYQOgezLn9Pv4O2Vw04GaZQvN7VVMKVMg-M0ddkepX3jX0RTsYp5XwTew_XG6f987JZmfMUBBdMKKRo7zt9KbJHf3vl1VN4SPN8qNe2f1_gkCxDgeffa3QLRnwGZcIzKe9h_kTu9SYBxE0ZH8jyF3h6kXLmHqjaNbncKqtwoYbiVHURsKHfs77v6kXvVmvSLtSUdIkNe405XyEOkPG-G15vYRxh-p6aVdp_5LY3h0khAgoo7NUI/4mb/PIZnwzIKTQic7WyLwJycLg/h0/h001.mnFvr6rloPCBiTgGFBQoqY55u4bE4DEZZOeY3QDU7dw) I can't think of a better way to prioritize collective care and truly support one another — spreading joy, love, and hope through food, games, bonfires, and so much more! Getting to help our members plan and bring their events to life during the Summer of Dreams has been an incredibly rewarding experience for me. One of the things I most appreciate about working at UWD is that it’s inspiring and hopeful. We don’t give in to the negative, but always look ahead — because immigrant youth, along with our members and allies, are working for the future our communities need. At the end of the day, even if ONE person saw our work and felt moved to join the movement, our work has been worthwhile. **** ******** **[You can help be the spark for the next person. We have an ambitious $100,000 goal for our end-of-year campaign. Give today to help us hold more programs like Summer of Dreams. Your donations this year have helped us fight back against attacks on our communities, and with your support now, we can continue this vital work in 2026.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvvSptAA5-xC0ZLMh3sw_H8hyCmECnODiQzfTWOA-yBFywOLXLID3SEx63HSE3kpjnnmNM3BTdM1ww1En4GzUe9gC0QK6suo6T94TKdybR7SJs03awsbxAYWih4slO8rh4gaPmhSmUROkGd_MrX7lXkXoniQoD_VuE6r8kg7lEb4l-yo_ngoVY-QR15NIomSoGbdPK4HJJY9VN2pyvtIAz-zlGO4cGsQ87NxTC9UGVPu_6k1CA2h8F4WS5CNTmfA_3S5CisDe720kSGXPSj_xw5WIN1CU4yURDENVL68BqyLwjA0lhspnIbh1k-LRCDEv9e_WtLmIzTiAZ7ZaS4C977Rii1POufIovcGiqPUes7IzU-E4FXNlu04VEaG2ACbutmVerPtqYwKUL_KOlqN_kI/4mb/PIZnwzIKTQic7WyLwJycLg/h1/h001.wCgi9Peo-5iuWJKWkBAABAWUISwyVqdj_h7Ux-OCwfo)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $25](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvvSptAA5-xC0ZLMh3sw_H8hyCmECnODiQzfTWOA-yBFywOLXLID3SEx63HSE3kpjnnmNM3BTdM1ww1En4GzUe9aJOHACCpQg2UbJKlLwmZo9BKfJBoDK3ooh-NfMRfXvEtAtMx3zA5_6FdxRAOYBa88256P8K3vLqcJB1V7r2W24yakxsBNIP_pEBBttc8JhFLpX1hK-tDXt-mB2EBq69rskE_cifIyiEb89OHuYAns24jH5uk9ZCYSdia27SxYimdnOa_x41fMAByiRK2f6oHScFq0V7Rc8QxIKdUoqdM4Qxm2YGUvao29z7RZ3zqxr9r6M4GlPDcyKM6vglHRPe1fTe5w79HJDtzygsb0B0ZXCMaTmmEybf2fLoPHlH18ayWr46gOsXa87CYzSawIVDUUPT3nHIiLZJ3HVwbv6o1sg/4mb/PIZnwzIKTQic7WyLwJycLg/h2/h001.m8ddzvyYxZVvAWjoZpiwuHWciSeVrooMZKaMiyv4U1U)

clean_body: No matter what happens, we have each other’s backs. | | | Peter, I’m incredibly proud to be part of the team at United We Dream, and to have this chance to tell my story. To me, working at UWD means feeling confident that the work I do aligns with my moral compass and my personal values. Every day, I get to work with peers and members who love immigrants and understand the power that we hold. I can’t imagine working anywhere else. Immigrant youth are at the heart of everything we do, and they will always be our top priority. Their dreams and potential inspire our mission every day! One of my favorite programs I was part of this year was our Summer of Dreams. I loved being a part of it — I got to see our members put together beautiful, safe, and meaningful community events in their cities. Having spaces like that during this turbulent time allowed members to connect and bring their friends, families and communities together. I can't think of a better way to prioritize collective care and truly support one another — spreading joy, love, and hope through food, games, bonfires, and so much more! Getting to help our members plan and bring their events to life during the Summer of Dreams has been an incredibly rewarding experience for me. One of the things I most appreciate about working at UWD is that it’s inspiring and hopeful. We don’t give in to the negative, but always look ahead — because immigrant youth, along with our members and allies, are working for the future our communities need. At the end of the day, even if ONE person saw our work and felt moved to join the movement, our work has been worthwhile. ** **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. ** Thanks for being a part of this, Fatima, United We Dream | Follow us on: | | | | |

| Peter,
MAGA is getting smoked in states where it was once thought unimaginable. In yesterday's elections, Democrats broke the almost three decade Republican hold on Miami's mayorship and also took an unexpected ruby red State House seat in Georgia.
If deep red Republican strongholds like Miami and Georgia are in play for Democrats, that means swing states like Michigan and Arizona are on track to go deep blue. However, just like MAGA's plan to win the midterms by rigging them via redistricting, they've also got a plan to cheat their way out of losing states like Michigan, Georgia, and Arizona:
Stealing their state supreme courts via obscure judicial elections.
If these efforts are successful we could see something truly horrific happen on Election Night 2028.
Imagine, it's November 7th 2028 -- Michigan, Arizona, and Georgia, are all called for Democrats in landslide blue wave victories and a Democrat wins the Presidency.
However, in the following days state courts slowly but surely invalidate these Democratic victories citing a rehash of the 2020 election denial spiel (Soros, illegal immigrants voting, etc). Ultimately the Democratic presidential victory is nullified. Trump is declared the victor.
It sounds like a nightmare and too dark to be true but this is exactly why MAGA is working overtime to steal these courts. Defend our Courts just foiled one of these attempts in Pennsylvania. Now MAGA is attempting the same playbook in AZ, MI, and GA this 2026 and we must mobilize once again.
Obscure state supreme court races are not sexy, they are hard to fundraise for, but the stakes are life and death. name: Haley Stevens
subject: Why I introduced articles of impeachment against Robert F. Kennedy Jr today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Over the past few months, I've traveled all across Michigan - from small towns to big cities, union halls to senior centers - and the one thing I keep hearing from everybody: There's intense anxiety and fear about the future.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.Q9MPjXF_bs4veT1tudAcfRKSgNfomdP9gBvDnpFvm4M?) for more
---
# [Why I introduced articles of impeachment against Robert F. Kennedy Jr today](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=181180440&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMTgwNDQwLCJpYXQiOjE3NjUzODM0OTYsImV4cCI6MTc2Nzk3NTQ5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pPZ7qzBLpqFtk8IIg-WiXDchUGBTIuBqzATMhdN3_RM)
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Dec 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvaGFsZXlmb3JtaS9wL3doeS1pLWludHJvZHVjZWQtYXJ0aWNsZXMtb2YtaW1wZWFjaG1lbnQ_.649KNmskJDMtuEbK6io_PvpGNmn8H8ZS5IceXdYfr5s?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/why-i-introduced-articles-of-impeachment?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Over the past few months, I've traveled all across Michigan - from small towns to big cities, union halls to senior centers - and the one thing I keep hearing from everybody: **There 's intense anxiety and fear about the future.**
It's not just the day-to-day stress. It's deeper than that. There's confusion about where to turn for reliable health information. Frustration with rising insurance costs and fewer services. And fear about what happens if a loved one gets sick - and the health care system has been gutted.
And over and over again, the word that keeps coming up? **Chaos.**
Not just in rising medical costs. Not just in insurance paperwork. But at the very top - in Washington - in the agency that's supposed to guide public health in America.
Because let's be clear about something: The person currently leading the Department of Health and Human Services is a fringe conspiracy theorist who has no business being anywhere near that job.
**Today, I 'm officially introducing articles of impeachment against Robert F. Kennedy Jr., Donald Trump's appointed Secretary of Health and Human Services.**
Why? Because the man charged with protecting America's public health is instead creating chaos: peddling misinformation, purging scientists, and dismantling lifesaving research - all while lying to Congress and undermining public trust in science itself.
Let's talk about what RFK Jr. has actually done:
* **He fired the CDC director** , sparking mass confusion and leaving key leadership posts vacant during a critical moment for public health.

* **He terminated or forced out career scientists and doctors** , many of whom had spent their lives researching cancer, HIV, addiction treatment, and vaccine development.

* **He gutted entire research initiatives** - including pediatric cancer research and mRNA technologies that helped curb the worst of the COVID pandemic and continue to hold promise for fighting cancer.

* **He misled the Senate under oath,** contradicting known facts and misleading lawmakers about his anti-vaccine crusade.

* And most infamously, he stood beside Donald Trump as he told pregnant women not to take Tylenol - suggesting, without any scientific evidence, that it could cause autism. The exact words? Pregnant women should "tough it out."

_Tough it out?_ That's not medical advice. That's cruelty. It's dishonest. It's dangerous. And it's disqualifying.
RFK Jr. isn't just spreading misinformation and fringe conspiracy theories - he's using the full weight of the federal government to codify them. And Michigan families are paying the price.
I've talked to moms in rural counties who can't get a straight answer about vaccine availability. I've met with retirees whose clinics are scaling back services because federal funding streams have been frozen. I've heard from families blindsided by double-digit insurance premium increases with no safety net in sight.
These aren't headlines. They're real conversations I'm having with real people. They're scared. And I get it.
When I see this level of fear and dysfunction, I can't just shrug and say, "That's Washington." I was sent to Congress to fight for working families - and that means holding people accountable when they violate their oaths of office.
That's what this impeachment is about.
**It 's about restoring trust in science.** It's about putting qualified professionals back in charge of our public health system. It's about telling the truth - even if you have to stand up to the president and his allies.
That's why I'm introducing articles of impeachment.
Because RFK Jr. has made a mockery of the office he holds. Because the consequences of his decisions aren't theoretical - they're happening right now, to every community I visit. And because when someone this dangerous holds power, we don't look the other way.
**We stand up. We fight back. We do what 's right.**
With grit,
Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Today I'm introducing articles of impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
We need leaders who tell the truth.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1559%2E49239%2En5onHu)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10023?t=2&akid=1559%2E49239%2En5onHu)
---
Null,

Over the past few months, I’ve traveled across Michigan – and everywhere I go, I hear the same thing: People are scared.

Scared about what happens if a loved one gets sick and they can’t afford care. Scared about rising health insurance costs. Scared because the federal government’s public health department is in chaos.
And the person behind that chaos? Robert F. Kennedy Jr.

RFK Jr. is Donald Trump’s hand-picked Secretary of Health and Human Services – and he has absolutely no business running one of the most important departments in our government.
That’s why today, I introduced articles of impeachment.

Because here’s what RFK Jr. has done:
* **Fired the CDC director** and left critical public health leadership posts vacant
* **Purged expert scientists and researchers** focused on childhood cancer, HIV, addiction, and vaccine safety
* **Dismantled cutting-edge research** into mRNA technology – research that saves lives and powers Michigan’s innovation economy
* **Lied to the U.S. Senate** about his anti-vaccine crusade
* And stood by Trump as he **told pregnant women not to take Tylenol** – falsely claiming that it could cause autism

RFK Jr. isn’t just spreading conspiracy theories – he’s using the full weight of the federal government to turn them into policy. And Michigan families are paying the price.

I’ve heard from moms who can’t get answers on vaccines, retirees losing access to care, and doctors worried we are losing the fight to combat cancer.
I’ve had enough.

We need leaders who tell the truth. Who believe in science. Who protect the people they serve – not endanger them.
RFK Jr. has failed us at every turn. And if he won’t step down? Then I’ll do everything I can to remove him from office.

We don’t back down from fights like this – not in Michigan.
More soon,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10222?t=3&akid=1559%2E49239%2En5onHu) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10023?t=4&akid=1559%2E49239%2En5onHu)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Jesse (Team Walz)
subject: Hey Peter, I’m the new Campaign Manager.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
It’s an honor to be on Team Walz with you.
# [](https://act.timwalz.com/go/195?refcode=em20251210-267&t=1&akid=267%2E34582%2EW1dN9i)
Hey there, Peter. I wanted to take a minute to introduce myself.
My name is Jesse Brooks, and I’m the new Campaign Manager here on the campaign to re-elect Governor Tim Walz. I couldn’t be more excited to spend the next year supporting a kind and effective leader like Tim and keeping Minnesota on the road to progress.
But I’ll be honest with you: this is shaping up to be the toughest reelection fight of Tim’s career.
Almost a dozen Republican candidates are vying for the chance to take him on in next November’s general election, and many of them are far-right extremists who want to bring their dangerous MAGA agenda to Minnesota. Not on our watch.
**The end of the year is approaching in just a few weeks, and with it comes our only public filing deadline on December 31st.** It’s a key moment for us to show just how strong of a people-powered movement we’re building to back the governor and win this thing, no matter who ends up being the Republican nominee.
**[I’m ready to give it my all to keep building the momentum across every corner of Minnesota and re-elect Tim — are you with me, Peter? Pitch in $5 or more to keep us on track to reach our goal before our only public filing deadline of 2025!](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251210.gIqAT4&amount=5&refcode=em20251210-267&t=2&akid=267%2E34582%2EW1dN9i)**

It’s an honor to be on Team Walz with you.
Jesse Brooks

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Georgia’s Senate race is statistically tied
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
National Republicans see this race as their best opportunity to stop Democrats from retaking control of the Senate, and they’ve already spent millions of dollars on ads attacking Jon.
Hey, Peter!
**[If you can afford it, we’re humbly asking you to split a $10 contribution between Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign and Heartland Patriots.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98385?refcode=em20251210-9796&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1&akid=9796%2E614464%2EIf4RU6)**
Sorry to be so direct, but Jon is the ONLY Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state Trump won. **He is without a doubt MAGA’s number one target.**
The latest polls show this race statistically tied. And experts at the Cook Political Report have officially named this race a “Toss-Up.”
National Republicans see this race as their best opportunity to stop Democrats from retaking control of the Senate, and they’ve already spent millions of dollars on ads attacking Jon.
So we’re asking for your help to ensure we have the resources to respond to the onslaught of right-wing money flooding into Georgia and set the record straight.
**Because the truth is we either respond now or risk losing Georgia to a full-blown MAGA takeover.**
**[Please, split a donation of $10 between Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign and Heartland Patriots today. We wouldn’t ask if it was not so important.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98385?refcode=em20251210-9796&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=9796%2E614464%2EIf4RU6)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jon Ossoff and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98385?refcode=em20251210-9796&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=9796%2E614464%2EIf4RU6) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98385?refcode=em20251210-9796&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=9796%2E614464%2EIf4RU6) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98385?refcode=em20251210-9796&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9796%2E614464%2EIf4RU6) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98385?refcode=em20251210-9796&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9796%2E614464%2EIf4RU6) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98385?refcode=em20251210-9796&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9796%2E614464%2EIf4RU6) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98385?refcode=em20251210-9796&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9796%2E614464%2EIf4RU6) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98386?refcode=em20251210-9796&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9796%2E614464%2EIf4RU6)
---
This team has won in Georgia before. We know what it takes. And together, we will do it again.
Thanks so much for chipping in, Peter.
We promise, if we all do our part, it will pay off on Election Day.
Gratefully,
Team Ossoff
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98386?refcode=em20251210-9796&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9796%2E614464%2EIf4RU6)**

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Big voter swing to Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
I keep writing to you because I see the writing on the wall and I want you to know that you’re integral to our efforts in holding the Senate

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9EZWNlbWJlci1aTUlOR08tVGlja2luZ18yMDI1MTIwOCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PURlY2VtYmVyLVpNSU5HTy1UaWNraW5nJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1In0/hGhCci8ZqLbWIiho_UIU3w)

| | Fellow Conservative, Republicans are better at governing - period. I know that. You know that. However, the socialist Democrats and their more-than-willing partners in the corporate media are trying to convince Americans to think otherwise. There have been a handful of special elections so far this year, and on average, the swing towards Democrats is 15 points. Not good. If we were to apply that onto the entire Congressional map, we'd lose 43 seats in the House, plus our majority, and the Senate _could_ go blue, too. I don't know what you need to hear to become more engaged with my team and me, but I'm shouting as loudly as I can that we can stop the worst from happening if we mobilize the support of conservatives like you everywhere. I know many patriots like you have stepped up but if you haven't had a chance yet or can do more again, PLEASE consider a donation to my campaign today of**$15** so I can continue making the case to every American that Democrats are simply unfit to govern. **[< <Contribute Now>>](https://trk.email.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9EZWNlbWJlci1aTUlOR08tVGlja2luZ18yMDI1MTIwOCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PURlY2VtYmVyLVpNSU5HTy1UaWNraW5nJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1In0/G5zYerQAhRPU-J5Rr5zh-g)** Thanks, Ted Cruz

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: “With her little turban”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Last night, Trump went off the rails:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1992%2E791427%2ETBwEXR)
Friend — Last night, Trump went off the rails:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251210-1-180&t=2&akid=1992%2E791427%2ETBwEXR)
This MAGA hate rally was already bad enough, but he kept going:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251210-1-180&t=3&akid=1992%2E791427%2ETBwEXR)
**Donald Trump wants to put me and my community in jail.**
We will not be intimidated by his fascist threats and sham investigations.
**Donald Trump likes to make fun of my religion and my name.**
He’s a racist bigot and a failed president, desperate for attention.
**Donald Trump called me “crooked.”**
But he himself is a convicted felon and the head of the most openly corrupt administration in US history.
**Donald Trump wants to “send me back” and says I’m here illegally.**
He can lie all he wants, but it won’t change the truth.
As much as he would like to, **_he can’t send me back.**_ I’m here to stay and the only place my constituents have been interested in sending me back to is Congress.
Friend, these attacks are meant to divide us. To intimidate our movement out of the arena. But if you can show that you’re with me today, I’ll have everything I need to show up and do the work every single day, no matter what Trump throws our way.
These last few weeks have been tough, but I’m humbly asking you to have my back once again by making a contribution today.
**[Please: Chip in whatever you can afford and power my campaign to fight back against these disgusting personal attacks and threats from the most powerful man in the world. We have a responsibility to defeat hatred, defend democracy, and protect our Minneapolis community from Trump’s continued targeting of our most vulnerable.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251210-1-180&t=4&akid=1992%2E791427%2ETBwEXR)**

In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: This is an email about the DMV — but I promise, it’s interesting.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I know that the government only works well if it works for the people.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1118%2E181023%2E-a-jHX)
Team —
For years, Michiganders complained about the DMV — it took too long, it was not convenient, and it needed to catch up to the 21st century. **When I took office, I did something about it.**
I made it my priority as secretary of state to modernize the DMV, cutting down wait times and making more tools available online. **Under my leadership, the department went from having some of the longest wait times in the country to a model for other states to follow.** I eliminated wait times and created over 150 self-service stations to serve Michiganders in every corner of the state.
Now, you can renew your car registrations, driver’s license, and state identification cards from home — online or by mail, or while grabbing groceries at one of the dozens of self-service stations we installed at stores across the state. That saves you time and aggravation, and it makes our department more efficient.
**Team, I know firsthand that the government only works well if it works for the people.**
[**That’s what I’ll continue to do as governor — take real issues people are facing and come up with real solutions. Can you help me get there by chipping in today?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/269?c0=jmb-em-q42025.Xe0G0T&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251210_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1118%2E181023%2E-a-jHX)

---
I will bring real solutions to Lansing as our next governor — not political games or inaction. That means making government more efficient for working families, whether it’s saving them time when accessing government services or saving them money by standing up to special interests. **It means both listening to the concerns of Michiganders and actually taking action to fix them.**
That’s my pledge to you. I’m ready to bring the leadership required to solve the biggest issues Michigan faces today.
**[Every dollar right now helps us build this campaign. Can you donate today and help?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251210_AM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=1118%2E181023%2E-a-jHX)**

Thanks,
Jocelyn

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: They come for me because I fight for YOU.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado
body:
I don’t back down. Not now, not ever. When you stand up to a bully... you win.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A4p-RheLKGpdTR-aOZKOsz50ZSKhnGD-W-joALDtGbn0Jt8mOhKlrLyJIHrRJfUoNC8nkWY8STZmrBknkH74bOVoCfSAEBd0WsRyhw6hb5i_YD8DN0Z5kJ8NgfOfcOTil5TnXDac8LvkzJOYk57eDRc5rrUxPF8meeYzSi5E0rNvQWxuZhGhak09qEEPvhva94blYHaa1PRvToH6ftOr5FpNxBSLuITDp9XOUGXTZbw=&c=cse5A4-I5Lmu0JwX_DFBho9l2EN0O3bFEZgWgj7UdKsHC2NnbsX_mA==&ch=H5PIbVesIvOpM9YMlYESbzuMBUjX4NadROP7LbHmwKSksNWqAAo78A==)

Peter, Let me be very clear about something: I don't back down from a fight.
Not when Donald Trump attacks me. Not when extremists try to silence me. Not when bullies threaten my office, my staff, or my community.
If you've followed the news, you already know exactly what I mean:
---
---
| | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A4p-RheLKGpdTR-aOZKOsz50ZSKhnGD-W-joALDtGbn0Jt8mOhKlrLyJIHrRJfUo03pjBt9ekq9-1EmzVraBar55o3t62U8Au0YSr_oRi9JfDArrvAmHbAK0ksyIw98RxFzaGfO1OH2pXuvIq1I0pFENJ7xkYQ3UWc8AOAUSX1_TRgzCIa7s27JZ534g5LWEl7w-TYMCA3DtTR3W0aY-iSz5Ix-a0cIU&c=cse5A4-I5Lmu0JwX_DFBho9l2EN0O3bFEZgWgj7UdKsHC2NnbsX_mA==&ch=H5PIbVesIvOpM9YMlYESbzuMBUjX4NadROP7LbHmwKSksNWqAAo78A==)

| | [DONATE NOW ->](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A4p-RheLKGpdTR-aOZKOsz50ZSKhnGD-W-joALDtGbn0Jt8mOhKlrLyJIHrRJfUo12391eV2bsxn5VZKEE0LmL_kHKJ1eb-x4fb5qcAfmnaHUq0E87o1jViRt8HgLOvUpN80w2cUoCL4V6G83bJNXUQZGh5EguILGf4jHRMztY7SZKrwLpVWEeYEwyvZOeeggg7kk-KFOT4pj2aXU5kBy7Td7HN0I9IpWypz6JyOnyM=&c=cse5A4-I5Lmu0JwX_DFBho9l2EN0O3bFEZgWgj7UdKsHC2NnbsX_mA==&ch=H5PIbVesIvOpM9YMlYESbzuMBUjX4NadROP7LbHmwKSksNWqAAo78A==)

| They've thrown everything they can at me -- insults, smear campaigns, threats -- all because I tell the truth. All because I refuse to let corruption, white supremacy, or criminality go unchecked. All because I will always, always, stand up to a bully.
But here's what those headlines don't show:
Every time they come at me, I get more determined. Every time they try to intimidate me, I fight harder. Every time someone tells me to sit down and be quiet, I stand taller and speak louder.
Because I'm not fighting for myself -- I'm fighting for the people who deserve a government that actually works for them.
And now, I'm taking that fight to the United States Senate.
Texas deserves a Senator who won't fold under pressure, who will call out injustice wherever it shows up, and who isn't afraid of Donald Trump or the MAGA Movement.
That's why I need this team with me from the very start. This race will be brutal. They will lie, spend, and smear without hesitation. But if we show our strength early -- if we show them that this movement doesn't scare easily -- we can win this.

clean_body: I don’t back down. Not now, not ever. When you stand up to a bully... you win. | | | | | == Peter, Let me be very clear about something: I don't back down from a fight. Not when Donald Trump attacks me. Not when extremists try to silence me. Not when bullies threaten my office, my staff, or my community. If you've followed the news, you already know exactly what I mean: | | == | | == | They've thrown everything they can at me -- insults, smear campaigns, threats -- all because I tell the truth. All because I refuse to let corruption, white supremacy, or criminality go unchecked. All because I will always, always, stand up to a bully. But here's what those headlines don't show: Every time they come at me, I get more determined. Every time they try to intimidate me, I fight harder. Every time someone tells me to sit down and be quiet, I stand taller and speak louder. Because I'm not fighting for myself -- I'm fighting for the people who deserve a government that actually works for them. And now, I'm taking that fight to the United States Senate. Texas deserves a Senator who won't fold under pressure, who will call out injustice wherever it shows up, and who isn't afraid of Donald Trump or the MAGA Movement. That's why I need this team with me from the very start. This race will be brutal. They will lie, spend, and smear without hesitation. But if we show our strength early -- if we show them that this movement doesn't scare easily -- we can win this. == | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | Texas is worth fighting for. Democracy is worth fighting for. And I'm ready -- as always -- to fight like hell. Are you? Jasmine Crockett | | | | == | | == | Donate by mail: Fair Fight Colorado == == | Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado. Registered agent: David Scott Martinez. | | | | | | Fair Fight Colorado | 1601 Arapahoe Street FL 10 | Denver, CO 80202 US | |

name: Brad Lander
subject: I'm running for Congress
body:
Mayor-Elect Zohran Mamdani, Sen. Bernie Sanders, Sen. Elizabeth Warren, and more have joined us. Now I need you!
#
Friend, it's Brad. Let me confirm the worst-kept secret in New York City.
**I'm running for Congress in New York's 10th Congressional District!**
We've already earned the endorsements of Mayor-Elect Zohran Mamdani, Sen. Bernie Sanders, Sen. Elizabeth Warren, Public Advocate Jumaane Williams, and the Working Families Party! Let me tell you more:
**This is an urgent moment for our democracy.** Donald Trump is abducting our neighbors and destroying our institutions, and Republican yes-men and weak-willed Democrats are letting him do it.
[](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22112?t=1&akid=1396%2E2118727%2EpWMwfm)
**We have to stand up to this authoritarian president together.** When Trump’s ICE agents kidnapped our neighbors, I put my body on the line to stop them. When Trump and Musk stole $80 million from New York, I uncovered it and forced the City to get it back.
**This moment in history needs leaders who fight, not fold.** The people of NY-10 don't want leaders who think it’s business as usual. We deserve a Member of Congress who will fight like our lives depend on it, _because they do_.
**[But to do that friend, I'm counting on your help. Our campaign has set an ambitious goal of reaching 1000 Launch Day Donors before midnight tonight. Will you watch our launch video at this link — and then chip in 10 dollars or more to join our campaign?](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22112?t=2&akid=1396%2E2118727%2EpWMwfm)**
**[BECOME A LAUNCH DAY DONOR](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22112?t=3&akid=1396%2E2118727%2EpWMwfm)**
**Friend, I've spent decades organizing in my community to deliver for working people.** As an affordable housing leader at the Fifth Avenue Committee, I brought neighbors together to stop evictions and build new homes.
In the City Council, I built broad coalitions that won 1️⃣ paid sick leave, 2️⃣ banned stop-and-frisk, 3️⃣ desegregated the middle schools of Brooklyn's District 15, and 4️⃣ brought participatory budgeting to NYC.
As Comptroller, I rooted out corruption, grew New York's pension funds to over $300 billion, divested from fossil fuels, and saved 50,000 families from being kicked out of their homes.
_I could go on._
**Friend, I love New York City.** This place is my home — the whole diverse, beautiful tapestry. I'm proud of the work I've done fighting for it over the last decade and a half. Now, I'm stepping in to fight Trump and stop his attacks on New Yorkers.
So, I'm running for Congress because the challenges we face can't be solved with _strongly worded letters_ or _high-dollar fundraisers_ OR by doing AIPAC's bidding.
[](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22112?t=4&akid=1396%2E2118727%2EpWMwfm)
In this district, we know our safety, our freedom, our thriving is bound up **together**. And with my campaign, we know our new mayor can have an ally in Washington, not an adversary in his own backyard.
**[I know what's at stake this moment, and I'm ready to meet it. But I need your help. Can you chip in today and become 1 of the 1000 Launch Day Donors we need to help me put NY-10 on the front lines of protecting our country?](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22112?t=5&akid=1396%2E2118727%2EpWMwfm)**
**[BECOME A LAUNCH DAY DONOR](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22112?t=6&akid=1396%2E2118727%2EpWMwfm)**
In solidarity,
Brad Lander

**LeftNet is an online political network fighting for progressive causes and candidates focused on social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=7&akid=1396%2E2118727%2EpWMwfm)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/update_your_information/?t=8&akid=1396%2E2118727%2EpWMwfm)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leftnet.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=1396%2E2118727%2EpWMwfm)

Email us: [team@leftnet.org](mailto:team@leftnet.org)

Hi Peter _**–** did you catch Jonathan Nez’s last message?_

As the former President of the Navajo Nation, Jonathan Nez led through tough times. He knows what decisive leadership looks like, and he’s ready to bring that same urgency to Congress.

Arizonans can’t afford more gridlock or delay. Jonathan Nez is prepared to get to work and become the first Native American representative from Arizona. [**If you believe in real leadership focused on people, not politics, please consider chipping in to our last mid-month goal before the Election year and read below to learn more:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121006816/588049380/-970579511?amount=5&source=EM_NBI_NEZ_20251211_FR_MMFR_0_LO_JonathanNez_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjE1MjkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjE4MDM1ODUtZTlkNS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ALmTsfYps7vqFRrirj22C5_g_x-ZfMbW1eHiu3BSVbM=) | | [Donate Now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121006817/588049381/-970579511?amount=5&source=EM_NBI_NEZ_20251211_FR_MMFR_0_LO_JonathanNez_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjE1MjkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjE4MDM1ODUtZTlkNS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ALmTsfYps7vqFRrirj22C5_g_x-ZfMbW1eHiu3BSVbM=)

If I win this race, I'll be the first Native American to ever have the honor of serving Arizona in Congress, and our district is one of the most competitive in the whole country.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I’m not done fighting back
body:
---
Derek, Republicans love to preach a “pull yourself up by your bootstraps” and “no government handouts” mentality — until they’re talking to a billionaire. They love to claim that we simply don’t have the money to pass policies that will help working people, but they’ll miraculously find the money to subsidize tax cuts for corporations and the wealthy. I’m done being surprised at their hypocrisy, but I’m not done fighting back. Simply put, the rules work differently for different groups of people — and I’m doing everything in my power to put a stop to this rigged system and change this. Democrats win when we fight like hell for working people. When we champion bold ideas, even if billionaires don’t like them. When we stand up to the extremism of Donald Trump’s administration. We do not have to accept MAGA extremism or the billionaire agenda. We can defeat them. [**Will you pitch in $7 or anything you can to the DNC to power this critical work? We can — and we must — make our government actually work for working people. I know we can. But we can’t take our resounding victories in 2025 as permission to take our foot off the gas. We need to carry this momentum straight into 2026.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251210_5488_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5507_22930333_TVS8Qq&akid=5507%2E22930333%2ETVS8Qq) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251210_5488_fr&refcode2=5507_22930333_TVS8Qq&akid=5507%2E22930333%2ETVS8Qq)**

name: Mike Rounds
subject: Before the year ends, I want to hear directly from you.
