This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=34814%2E3013755%2Ee7bThl).

* Traders getting worried about Oracle earnings due today
* Trump unveils $12B aid package for America's farmers

* Banks given the green light to handle Crypto transactions

* **⚠ ️✅CBOE VIX Volatility Index: 17.08 (⬆️ 0.89%)**
* **🔴 Gold: $4221.40 (⬇️ 0.33%)**
* **✅ Silver: $61.00 (⬆️ 0.26%)**
* **✅ Bitcoin: $92,765 (⬆️ 4.22%)**

* * *
## The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left-Wing Journalism
[Support What We Do](https://substack.com/redirect/9e5cba1a-9d41-4692-89be-abe27e95c8f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# **SpaceX 's 2026 IPO is calculated to be at a $1.5T Valuation**
Elon Musk's SpaceX is charging toward a **[blockbuster 2026 initial public offering,](https://substack.com/redirect/fc5bcd68-d731-4340-b573-66d575ed1c1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/fc5bcd68-d731-4340-b573-66d575ed1c1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)aiming to raise over $30 billion at a staggering $1.5 trillion valuation to fuel ambitious space-based data centers.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fc5bcd68-d731-4340-b573-66d575ed1c1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Massive Valuation Leap** : SpaceX targets a $1.5 trillion company-wide listing, eclipsing recent $800 billion private sale rumors dismissed by Musk as inaccurate.
* **Revenue Surge Projected** : Expects $15 billion in 2025, climbing to $22-24 billion by 2026, with Starlink driving most growth through stabilized satellite internet services.
* **Strategic Fund Deployment** : IPO proceeds earmarked for pioneering space-based data centers, including bulk chip acquisitions to power orbital computing infrastructure.
* **Timeline Flexibility Built-In** : Mid-to-late 2026 debut eyed, but advisers warn of potential slippage to 2027 amid volatile market conditions and external factors.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Ifrah Law](https://substack.com/redirect/7842a669-460f-4615-8e53-d92ce7cb911b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/7842a669-460f-4615-8e53-d92ce7cb911b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7842a669-460f-4615-8e53-d92ce7cb911b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/7842a669-460f-4615-8e53-d92ce7cb911b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# **Oracle 's billion dollar bet on OpenAI is scaring people ahead of earnings**
In a debt-laden sprint to fuel OpenAI's trillion-dollar AI ambitions, Oracle's massive datacenter buildout has **[sparked investor panic](https://substack.com/redirect/b201d5df-1ce4-4662-a9c9-7e9b5a4e787b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , erasing stock gains and spiking default risks just ahead of Wednesday's earnings reveal.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b201d5df-1ce4-4662-a9c9-7e9b5a4e787b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Massive OpenAI Contract** : Oracle's $300 billion deal with OpenAI exposes unprecedented revenue reliance on one unprofitable client heightening single-customer risks even as hyperscaler investment has fueled a 71% growth in cloud services.
* **Debt Surge Signals Alarm** : Record-high credit default swaps against Oracle highlight borrowing strains from their AI infrastructure spending, amid an industry-wide $400 billion spending frenzy in 2025.
* **Diversification Push Emerges** : A new $20 billion Meta Platforms booking bolsters Oracle's cloud bookings, and they are projecting $166 billion revenue by 2030 which would be beyond their OpenAI dependency.
* **Bubble Fears Loom Large** : Scrutiny is intensifying over OpenAI's funding opacity and lagging real-world AI adoption, threatening Oracle's aggressive expansion amid competitive pressures from Google, Amazon and Microsoft.

* * *
* * *
# **Trump unveils $12 Billion aid package for American Farmers**
President Donald Trump **[unveiled a $12 billion aid package](https://substack.com/redirect/75bdfc00-e66a-438c-b337-657b68d36d70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to shield U.S. farmers from the fallout of his escalating trade war with China, channeling tariff revenues into emergency "bridge payments" for soybean and crop growers battered by Beijing's retaliatory soybean boycott and soaring input costs.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/75bdfc00-e66a-438c-b337-657b68d36d70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Tariff Funds Fuel Relief:** $11 billion funneled to USDA's new Farmer Bridge Assistance for one-time payouts to row crop producers, with $1 billion held for market volatility assessments.
* **China 's Soybean Stalemate:** Beijing halted key U.S. imports during 2025's fall harvest but resumed partial buys in October, hitting just 12 million metric tons by February--far below the 25 million annual target.
* **Biden-Era Blame Game:** White House slams prior administration for $1.2 trillion trade deficits and "woke" policies, positioning Trump's aid as a gateway to fresh export deals and safety nets.
* **Democrats Decry Damage:** Critics like Schumer and Wyden blast the package as inadequate, arguing Trump's tariffs have driven up fertilizer prices and bankruptcies without restoring lost markets.

**SCREWWORM CRISIS: FDA OKs Merck Drug to Save U.S. Herds!**
In a swift move to **[combat a parasitic screwworm outbreak](https://substack.com/redirect/5a0caa2c-7a72-45e8-abb5-a09e89aeeecd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** ravaging cattle from Mexico, the FDA on December 4 approved Merck's EXZOLT CATTLE-CA1 topical treatment for U.S. beef herds, aiming to halt a border-driven decline that has shrunk inventories to 1951 lows and spiked beef prices nationwide.
* **Approval Accelerates Urgency** : FDA's conditional nod on December 4 for fluralaner-based pour-on solution, developed via July discussions, ensures 21-day protection against screwworm and fever ticks, with shipments already en route to vets by December 20.
* **Herds Hit Historic Lows** : U.S. cattle on feed dropped 2% to 11.7 million head by November 2025, exacerbated by 2024 border closures blocking over 1 million annual Mexican calf imports--3.3% of total U.S. crop.
* **Industry Faces Plant Closures** : The Screwworm-fueled shortages prompted Tyson Foods to shutter its Lexington, Nebraska beef facility and slash Amarillo, Texas operations in November, amplifying market volatility and economic strain on ranchers.
* **Multi-Year Battle Looms** : Experts forecast prolonged screwworm persistence in Mexico, demanding ongoing treatments despite 98-day meat withholding for safety precautions. Ranchers like Texas's James Clement III hail it as an "essential" tool amid drought and tariff pressures.

* * *
* * *
# **Banks unleashed, OCC gives the thumbs up to begin Crypto transactions**
In a bold pivot under the Trump administration, the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency on Tuesday[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/9aaaefa9-97cd-4bad-af3f-35f1c3caee9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[greenlit U.S. banks to intermediate crypto transactions](https://substack.com/redirect/9aaaefa9-97cd-4bad-af3f-35f1c3caee9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** via riskless principal trades, scrapping prior Biden-era hurdles and fueling fears of volatile assets infiltrating Wall Street's stability.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9aaaefa9-97cd-4bad-af3f-35f1c3caee9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **OCC Guidance Issued Swiftly** : Federal regulator's new directive permits banks to buy and sell crypto assets simultaneously between counterparties, bypassing inventory holding and advance approvals for seamless intermediation.
* **Biden Barriers Dismantled** : Trump-era regulators revoked 2022 restrictions, including the need for pre-engagement nods, echoing March approvals that already eased some crypto custody and stablecoin rules.
* **Pro-Crypto Policy Surge** : Move aligns with administration's rule rewrites, aiming to bridge legacy finance with digital assets amid ongoing federal efforts to deregulate the sector.

* * *
* * *
# **OPENAI scoops Slack 's CEO to be "Chief Revenue Officer" **
In a bold move to supercharge its enterprise push, OpenAI on Tuesday named Slack CEO Denise Dresser **[as chief revenue officer,](https://substack.com/redirect/e8ad7d8d-71b5-47e1-ac49-5b1f91ba0eb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** tasking her with scaling global strategies for customer success and business integration amid explosive AI growth.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e8ad7d8d-71b5-47e1-ac49-5b1f91ba0eb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Dresser Scales AI Platforms:** Tech veteran Dresser, who helmed Slack since 2023 after over a decade at Salesforce, brings proven expertise in transforming enterprise tools for massive adoption.
* **Rapid Revenue Surge:** OpenAI eyes hundreds of billions in sales by 2030, building on a $20 billion annualized run rate this year fueled by ChatGPT's 800 million weekly users and 1 million business clients.
* **Intensifying Rival Pressure:** Facing fierce competition from Google and Anthropic, OpenAI has committed over $1.4 trillion to infrastructure, sparking debates on AI investment sustainability.
* **Enterprise Transformation Focus:** Dresser will be expected to drive reliable AI deployment for industries worldwide, echoing her past successes in cloud scaling.

* * *
* * *
# **JPMorgan Stock Crashes on 2026 Cost Projection Bombshell**
JPMorgan Chase's shares **[plunged nearly 4% Monday,](https://substack.com/redirect/e920b09b-3233-452a-bc94-687cc1d50e9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** dragging down the Dow, after the banking giant warned of $105 billion in expenses next year--fueled by fierce credit card competition and massive AI investments.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e920b09b-3233-452a-bc94-687cc1d50e9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Expenses Surge to $105 Billion** : The bank projects 2026 noninterest expenses at $105 billion, up sharply from $96 billion tracked through 2025's third quarter and exceeding October's $100 billion analyst consensus.
* **AI Investments Fuel Spending** : Technology outlays hit $18 billion this year, with future hikes tied to AI advancements, branch expansions, and inflation-driven real estate costs amid broader growth strategies.
* **Charge-Offs Signal Consumer Strain** : Credit card losses drop to 3.3% for 2025 but expected to climb to 3.6%-3.9% in 2026, as unemployment rises and pandemic savings buffers erode, heightening fragility for households and small businesses.
* **Q4 Business Edges Higher** : JPMorgan expects Investment banking fees to grow low single-digits year-over-year, while markets revenue surges in the low teens, offering some offset to rising costs in a cautiously optimistic outlook.

body:
Hey you!

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Hey you!
Yes, you, Peter.
No, not your laptop. The person looking at it!
I was really hoping to reach you today.
This is Congressman Troy Downing, and I want to thank you for opening my message. Can I borrow just one more minute of your time?
**President Donald J. Trump and House Republicans have accomplished a historic eleven-month run unlike anything in modern American history.**
_🇺🇸 We secured the border 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We brought back American jobs 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We cut taxes for working Americans 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We reduced government waste 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We eliminated the woke agenda 🇺🇸_ The tide has turned in our favor.
**_BUT!!! BUT!!! BUT!!!_**
**WE CAN’T REST ON OUR LAURELS NOW!!!**
The Democrats are more desperate than ever.
They’ve doubled down on extremism with their unhinged socialist economic policies, woke DEI agenda, and aggressive climate change plan.
They’ve become a dangerous cabal that **CANNOT BE TRUSTED** with America’s future.
If the pro-Trump GOP can hold the majority through 2028 and solidify America’s Golden Age.
But we need the funds to make it happen NOW!
The further we fall behind the Democrats in fundraising, the closer we get to losing our chance.
**_Peter, do you consider yourself a true Patriot? It’s time to prove it._**
I’m not asking you to risk life and limb for your country (though I think you would). I’m just requesting $17 to lock in a Republican House Majority for two more years. [Is it worth it to you?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[CHIP IN $17 RIGHT NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._y9vRinWXLINAksmkOA)–Troy| |

BUT!!! BUT!!! BUT!!! WE CAN’T REST ON OUR LAURELS NOW!!! The Democrats are more desperate than ever. They’ve doubled down on extremism with their unhinged socialist economic policies, woke DEI agenda, and aggressive climate change plan. They’ve become a dangerous cabal that CANNOT BE TRUSTED with America’s future. If the pro-Trump GOP can hold the majority through 2028 and solidify America’s Golden Age. But we need the funds to make it happen NOW! The further we fall behind the Democrats in fundraising, the closer we get to losing our chance. Peter, do you consider yourself a true Patriot? It’s time to prove it. I’m not asking you to risk life and limb for your country (though I think you would). I’m just requesting $17 to lock in a Republican House Majority for two more years. –Troy| | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. Troy Downing For Congress P.O. Box 20333 Billings, MT 59104 To unsubscribe from Troy Downing for Congress,

| Peter, Every campaign has a moment where the energy shifts – when supporters gather, momentum takes shape, and the race ahead begins to feel very real. **For Bryce Reeves, that moment arrives Tuesday, December 16.** Hosted by Fitz Johnson and Lonnie Carter, this Campaign Finance Kickoff Dinner marks the official start of Bryce's journey toward the United States Senate. It will be an intimate evening at one of Fredericksburg's most iconic restaurants – **Ristorante Renato, 422 William Street, at 6:00 PM.** _This is the room where the early coalition forms. Where conversations matter. Where campaigns find their first surge of strength._ Tickets begin at **$250,** with higher sponsorship opportunities available for those who wish to deepen their support as Bryce begins this campaign: $500 Couple | $1,000 Sponsor | $2,500 Benefactor | $3,500 Co-Host | $7,000 Host | $14,000 Finance Committee

name: Veronica Slajer
subject: Our Communities Depend on Clerks—Help Us Tell Their Story Statewide
body:
Happy Local Government Week in Alaska. Having just wrapped up the 60th Annual Alaska Association of Municipal Clerks Conference—alongside several affiliate professional gatherings—today also launches the Alaska Municipal League’s 75th Anniversary Annual Conference. This week offers a rare moment to honor and elevate the people who keep Alaska’s communities functioning every single day.| | |
---
| | Dear Supporter, Happy Local Government Week in Alaska! Having just wrapped up the **60th Annual Alaska Association of Municipal Clerks Conference** , alongside several affiliate professional gatherings, today is the launch of the **Alaska Municipal League’s 75th Anniversary Annual Conference**. This week offers a rare moment to honor and elevate the people who keep Alaska’s communities functioning every single day. Across more than 230 communities, municipal and tribal local government professionals form the foundation of civic life. And among them, clerks are the heartbeat of our institutions. They run elections, safeguard public records, support councils and assemblies, maintain transparency, and provide continuity in communities facing significant demographic and workforce challenges. Alaska depends on these public servants far more than most residents ever see. To help Alaskans better understand and appreciate this vital profession, [Build Alaska’s Future Education Fund](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121015127/588077869/-1512324198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTQyMDIzNS1mOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sCG6djh2eJd_iJJcn_dTYi_ypnyVOPbPIXjw6eq_pg=&emci=ff464e89-f6d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=05420235-f9d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399) created **ClerkStart** , a storytelling initiative designed to elevate local government roles and inspire the next generation of civic leaders. **This week, in celebration of Local Government Week, we are on the ground at both AAMC and AML interviewing and filming clerks and other local government officials** for a high-quality, five-minute video spotlight. Their experiences, insights, and deep pride in serving their communities are at the center of this work. We are honored that the [Rasmuson Foundation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121015128/588077870/1855462595?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTQyMDIzNS1mOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sCG6djh2eJd_iJJcn_dTYi_ypnyVOPbPIXjw6eq_pg=&emci=ff464e89-f6d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=05420235-f9d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399)[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121015129/588077871/1855462595?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTQyMDIzNS1mOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sCG6djh2eJd_iJJcn_dTYi_ypnyVOPbPIXjw6eq_pg=&emci=ff464e89-f6d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=05420235-f9d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399) and [RurAL CAP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121015130/588077872/-2119356680?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTQyMDIzNS1mOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sCG6djh2eJd_iJJcn_dTYi_ypnyVOPbPIXjw6eq_pg=&emci=ff464e89-f6d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=05420235-f9d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399) have already stepped forward with generous support. Their leadership has allowed us to begin capturing these stories—but [additional support is needed](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121015131/588077873/-412970717?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTQyMDIzNS1mOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sCG6djh2eJd_iJJcn_dTYi_ypnyVOPbPIXjw6eq_pg=&emci=ff464e89-f6d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=05420235-f9d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399) to complete the project and ensure voices from across the state are included. _**[WHY YOUR SUPPORT MATTERS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121015132/588077874/-412970717?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTQyMDIzNS1mOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sCG6djh2eJd_iJJcn_dTYi_ypnyVOPbPIXjw6eq_pg=&emci=ff464e89-f6d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=05420235-f9d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399)**_ To tell a truly statewide story, we must bring the film crew to **rural Alaska** , where clerks often carry multiple responsibilities and anchor some of the state’s most remote communities. These perspectives are essential to understanding the real challenges—and enormous value—of local government work in Alaska.We are appealing to you to**[join the Rasmuson Foundation and RurAL CAP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121015133/588077875/-412970717?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTQyMDIzNS1mOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sCG6djh2eJd_iJJcn_dTYi_ypnyVOPbPIXjw6eq_pg=&emci=ff464e89-f6d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=05420235-f9d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399)** in supporting this effort. Your contribution will help us:
* Bring the film crew to rural communities to capture these critical stories
* Complete and edit the five-minute statewide video
* Share the final film with schools, youth programs, civic organizations, and local governments
* Highlight workforce pathways in municipal and tribal government—roles Alaska urgently needs to fill

Your support also sustains the broader mission of Build Alaska’s Future: strengthening public trust, increasing transparency around federal investments, and developing a resilient civic workforce to support Alaska’s future. [**THIS LOCAL GOVERNMENT WEEK, WILL YOU HELP US CLOSE THE GAP?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121015134/588077876/567411139?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTQyMDIzNS1mOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sCG6djh2eJd_iJJcn_dTYi_ypnyVOPbPIXjw6eq_pg=&emci=ff464e89-f6d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=05420235-f9d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399) Please consider making a [tax-deductible donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121015135/588077877/-412970717?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTQyMDIzNS1mOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sCG6djh2eJd_iJJcn_dTYi_ypnyVOPbPIXjw6eq_pg=&emci=ff464e89-f6d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=05420235-f9d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399) today to ensure these stories—from Anchorage to the most rural corners of the state—are captured and shared. Your gift, at any level, will make a meaningful impact and help build Alaska’s future. Donate today at [BuildAlaska.org/donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121015136/588077878/-412970717?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTQyMDIzNS1mOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sCG6djh2eJd_iJJcn_dTYi_ypnyVOPbPIXjw6eq_pg=&emci=ff464e89-f6d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=05420235-f9d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399). Thank you for supporting strong communities, transparent government, and the civic workforce that keeps Alaska moving forward. **Wishing you a warm and hopeful holiday season,** **Veronica Slajer** Founding Board Member
Build Alaska’s Future Education Fund
[www.buildalaska.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121015137/588077879/-83532908?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTQyMDIzNS1mOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sCG6djh2eJd_iJJcn_dTYi_ypnyVOPbPIXjw6eq_pg=&emci=ff464e89-f6d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=05420235-f9d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399)

| | Dear Peter,
---
Threats to redwood forests and the animals that live among them have **[intensified](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121015225/588078197/963248475?sourceid=1168291&utm_source=ea-advocacy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=esa-12102025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyMDllNGEwLWY5ZDUtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2cqo21hjStT3o8VFW9YO-WsxErZHN9pUUyYrkkochCU=&emci=88544f1d-20d2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3209e4a0-f9d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=1504551)**. Now is the time to speak up.
---
The Department of the Interior has just unveiled four harmful proposals that could dismantle the Endangered Species Act (ESA), our nation’s most powerful safeguard for vulnerable wildlife and their habitats. What’s at stake? If enacted, these proposals would: • Remove automatic protections for species listed as threatened • Shrink the definition of “critical habitat”• Make it easier for development and extraction projects to override conservation needs • Limit protections against future threats
---
---
Habitat loss is the greatest danger to wildlife, and weakening the ESA puts redwood ecosystems in jeopardy. Thousands of species—including endangered northern spotted owls and Humboldt martens—call these forests home. If these proposals move forward, future protections for redwood landscapes could vanish, leaving forests vulnerable to unchecked degradation. Your voice can make a difference—submit a public comment opposing these proposals by December 21.We’ve made it easy: use our pre-written comment, complete with official docket numbers and a clear message to the Department of the Interior.
---
[ **Click to comment** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121015226/588078198/963248475?sourceid=1168291&utm_source=ea-advocacy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=esa-12102025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyMDllNGEwLWY5ZDUtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2cqo21hjStT3o8VFW9YO-WsxErZHN9pUUyYrkkochCU=&emci=88544f1d-20d2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3209e4a0-f9d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=1504551)
---
Don’t let these changes slip through unnoticed during the holiday season. Stand with us to protect the redwoods and the wildlife that depend on them.Together, our voices can make a real difference.
---
| | Thank you for your unwavering support,
---
Save the Redwoods League
---

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision
body:
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121015692/588079895/-1516755731?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDM0OTU5NzItZmFkNS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_tBK3P9h3yXIVmHRp8q-opCzsJu61caBz5ghxEFAwVc=)
Hey, it’s Mark Kelly.

Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate.

I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy.

But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something.

So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too.

I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help.

We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.

After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do.

**[I’m asking you to split a donation between Derek Tran and me, and I hope you know that I wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121015695/588079898/-623790748?refcode=em-12.10.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDM0OTU5NzItZmFkNS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_tBK3P9h3yXIVmHRp8q-opCzsJu61caBz5ghxEFAwVc=)**

clean_body: We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. | = Hey, it’s Mark Kelly. Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate. I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy. But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something. So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too. I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help. We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you. name: JB Pritzker
subject: This race could decide the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
Let me cut to the chase.

| | |
---
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1688?t=1&akid=6141%2E400544%2EBQ8e1h)
Friend — JB Pritzker here.
Let me cut to the chase: **New Hampshire’s Senate race could decide whether Democrats take back the majority — _and_ Republicans know it.**
Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP see this seat as one of their best shots to expand their power.
They’ve already got a Republican governor in New Hampshire, and they’re betting they can flip the Senate seat next. If they win here, our chances of taking back the Senate drop to zero.
_We can’t let that happen._
Chris Pappas is a proven fighter for working families — taking on Big Pharma, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government actually works for the people it serves.
I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and _I want him in the Senate._
I know Chris can win, but there’s no way around it: **_This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks._**
The GOP is ready to flood New Hampshire with attack ads and dark money. The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. That’s where you come in, friend:
**[If you can, please split a $5 donation right now between Chris Pappas and Deb Haaland to put Democrats on the path to a Senate majority.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1689?amount=5&t=2&akid=6141%2E400544%2EBQ8e1h)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Chris Pappas and Deb Haaland:_ | | | [Donate $10](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1690?t=3&akid=6141%2E400544%2EBQ8e1h)

JB Pritzker
Governor of Illinois

clean_body: | | | | | I’ve got some big news to share with you, Friend: With encouragement from my family, President Trump, Speaker Johnson, and—most importantly—my constituents, I filed OFFICIALLY for re-election in North Carolina’s 6th Congressional District. 🇺🇸 Serving you this past year has been the honor of my life. I am proud of the work we’ve done together to push back against the reckless agenda of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris and begin restoring common sense in North Carolina and across America. But our mission is far from finished. President Trump endorsed me for re-election because he needs America-First fighters who will stand with him, defend our values, and deliver REAL results for North Carolina. | | Thank you, Addison McDowellCongressman, NC-06 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by McDowell for Congress Copyright(C) 2025 McDowell for Congress Our mailing address is: McDowell for Congress PO Box 97275 Raleigh, NC 27624 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . subject: Trump’s SCOTUS ENDING birthright citizenship?!

body:
Not on our watch.
| | **_BREAKING:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/birthright?source=VPP_20251210_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=22165%2E878179%2EwCnKBB) Donald Trump’s MAGA Supreme Court majority is on the verge of ENDING birthright citizenship — **_despite it being in the CONSTITUTION!_**

**This is AUTHORITARIANISM. If Trump destroys birthright citizenship, NO right or freedom is safe from his attacks.**

[**So we’re conducting a flash poll of 40,000 Democrats:
Should the Supreme Court END Birthright Citizenship?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/birthright?source=VPP_20251210_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=22165%2E878179%2EwCnKBB) | [NO, ABSOLUTELY NOT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/birthright?source=VPP_20251210_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=22165%2E878179%2EwCnKBB)

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Last chance to send your letter about stopping the SAVE Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
While the 2026 midterms might be the first election it would impact, the SAVE Act is really about all of our elections. Disenfranchising millions of voters isn't about " election security ," it's about elected officials choosing who gets to vote for them in an attempt to preserve their hold on power.
Please, send a letter to your Senator right now demanding that they oppose the SAVE Act before it is too late >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Folks,
Donald Trump recently pardoned top MAGA allies who aided his bid to subvert the 2020 election , including Rudy Giuliani, Mark Meadows, and dozens of others. This is another dangerous and embarrassing blow to American democracy from a White House dead set on rigging the 2026 midterms.
Trump has stacked his administration with election deniers who back his claim that the 2020 elections were stolen . These Trump loyalists are overseeing the midterms, and they’re dismantling systems meant to secure voting and striking fear into election officials.
Republicans in Congress are backing Trump’s power grab by pushing the SAVE Act — a devastating voter suppression bill that will make it harder for tens of millions of people to cast their ballots.
Send a message to your U.S. Senators: Stop the SAVE Act! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
Trump has tried to make mail-in voting illegal and registering to vote extremely difficult . He so-called election monitors to California and New Jersey who could seize ballot boxes and fix the election for him. Governor Gavin Newsom said, “ Deploying these federal forces appears to be an intimidation tactic meant for one thing: Suppress the vote .”
Fueled by the far-right’s propaganda about so-called “non-citizen voting,” the SAVE Act would require people to prove that they’re citizens in order to vote by providing a birth certificate, passport, or naturalization papers. 21 million eligible voters don’t have these documents readily available.
Opponents of voting rights in the U.S. House already jammed the bill through , so we must stop it in the Senate.
Block Trump’s attempts to steal the 2026 midterms, add your name to oppose the SAVE Act today >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121025_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121025_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=UAcrGvvwrHWxSNtRq78ksDKP1zyzEMS90rfZ2ZRftRBFyE2faV7iQRjKP5P%2BTA55FDvLc6dv6uvZcU%2Fdn6Vkalx%2FwWs2XpVFrBFY00vKjGY5WTjqMiQpkEst1sST06QUtYncZB%2FIUgcsdxPQWE04y6uBde6JKfNGJi9Y%2B7O4dFlmgC804Al0%2BrdNkCLkLJ%2Bhc7oo9MaNq1WFCC4rDyymsTnW1YNuC8HLTqb73akLhaPvPRRvslKQ9KmLYwW3ymA3%2FUtWcixgmiEtKb9NSuF%2B7KgHsVzT5D4k%2Fj%2BZF5UwWSKGAgCO3LjmhFj0cUaC5ho4pBwC31%2F7csMqYUu9JhV9209xfIauL3hsf83cdOBSMI5J4CX%2Fq%2FJuWC8mwLuGoZ4dUgV6t0%2BYYfRp61t92GpzrZ7VyqJ8eN7wQlgQYYyeEsU%3D .

He so-called election monitors to California and New Jersey who could seize ballot boxes and fix the election for him. Governor Gavin Newsom said, “ Deploying these federal forces appears to be an intimidation tactic meant for one thing: Suppress the vote .” Fueled by the far-right’s propaganda about so-called “non-citizen voting,” the SAVE Act would require people to prove that they’re citizens in order to vote by providing a birth certificate, passport, or naturalization papers. 21 million eligible voters don’t have these documents readily available. Opponents of voting rights in the U.S. House already jammed the bill through , so we must stop it in the Senate. Block Trump’s attempts to steal the 2026 midterms, add your name to oppose the SAVE Act today >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] Voter Action Project [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

Drama, division, and constant national embarrassment -- instead of solutions, service, or stability. But now, with Marjorie Taylor Greene resigning, we finally have a chance to change the story. This district shouldn't have to worry about who their representative is fighting with, what feud they're starting, or which headline they're chasing next. Families here deserve a representative who shows up, listens, and puts people before politics. **_And for the first time in a long time, we can build the GA-14 we want_** _ -- a district known for community, not chaos... dignity, not division... and leadership that brings people together instead of tearing them apart._ I'm running for Congress because I believe this moment is bigger than a resignation.**It 's a chance to reset. **To rebuild. To prove that Northwest Georgia is ready for something better -- and that we can step into this new chapter with hope instead of fear. [**But opportunity only becomes progress if we organize now. Republicans will do everything they can to keep this seat locked in dysfunction. Grassroots power is how we break that cycle. name: Roy Cooper
subject: Radical Left Lunatic
body:
Here’s what he said:
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)
Peter, at this point, there’s nothing President Trump could say that would shock me. His tirades and rants make the news every day. _And last night, he directed one at me._ Trump attacked me personally because he doesn’t like that I stand up to the far-right’s chaos and corruption. Even more than that, Trump is _terrified_ that this campaign can defeat his handpicked candidate here in NC and take back power for the American people. Peter, I’m not afraid of the president calling me names or riling up his MAGA base against me. But I know that this is just the start of the GOP directing all their attention at us. We’ve seen it time and time again: When Donald Trump attacks a candidate, the GOP money-machine revs up against them, too. **[I need your help to face what’s ahead. I’m asking you to chip in whatever you can afford so we can have the resources to fight back.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2533?t=7&akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)** So, you may be wondering what exactly Trump said about me. He called me a _“radical left lunatic.”_ **If fighting for lower prices, affordable health care, abortion access, voting rights, good schools, and a livable planet makes me a “radical left lunatic,” then so be it.** You know where I stand and what I’m fighting for, Peter. I need to know if you’re with me. **[I’m not asking because I want to, but because I have to. This is the most consequential Senate race on the map. Chip in if you can, and help me take on Trump and the national GOP.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2533?t=8&akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2534?t=9&akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2535?t=10&akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2536?t=11&akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)
---
[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2537?t=12&akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2538?t=13&akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2539?t=14&akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)
---
Let’s do this,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2533?t=15&akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=16&akid=146%2E124072%2EKHUGn_)

Hi friend, Growing up as a child of Cuban immigrants, I always understood the gift of a healthy and functioning democracy. I became a journalist because I knew that democracy only works when people have truthful access to their government. **But our democracy is failing.** From restricting press access at the Pentagon to meddling in elections, Trump has done everything he can to kill transparency, accountability, and the rule of law. [**That’s why I need your help. If we want to stop Trump’s attacks on our democracy, Democrats HAVE to flip the House next November. Please, chip in $5 or anything you can to my campaign to flip a critical House seat >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121017296/588085395/-423659337?amount=5&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.10_Democracy_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTAwZTNiMzItZmVkNS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7rGMGeoM0XePbOGDmdAR1aRJ48nv2tn-EYoVMLt_ogw=) When my parents fled Cuba, they left a dictatorship for a democracy where they could build a better life for their family. But their dream wouldn’t be possible in 2025. Because of politicians like **Trump and my opponent, Gina Swoboda,** attacks on immigrants have grown exponentially. Just last week, the Trump administration **_indefinitely paused_** _all immigration applications from 19 countries, including Cuba._ **Team, this is exactly why I’m running for Congress – and why I have to ask for your support.** The only way to save the gift of democracy is to organize and fight back against the people who are determined to destroy it. _**[We deserve representatives in Congress who will fight tooth and nail to protect our democracy. subject: Prices are going up *again*

body:
Prices have continued to rise with Donald Trump in office.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251210-5697-footer&t=1&akid=5697%2E420207%2EBJGYVz)
Peter,
While Donald Trump has been claiming he’s brought prices down, working people who actually know what the word “groceries” means know that’s just not true.
**In fact, prices have continued to rise with Donald Trump in office, and they’re set to jump again early next year:**
[****](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251210.yafS_1&refcode=em20251210-5697&amount=3&t=2&akid=5697%2E420207%2EBJGYVz)
---
While Trump and his MAGA allies in Congress continue to pass more tax giveaways for billionaires while gutting programs like SNAP and Medicaid, their reckless tariffs are raising prices on _everything_ for working people.
Pramila knows we need tariffs that actually work for working people, not billionaires. That means smart, targeted policies that defend jobs without crushing everyday Americans — not blanket tariffs applied to every country and every product in the world.
**[If you’re tired of Trump’s lies and broken promises, will you pitch in $3 to help Pramila keep fighting for an economy that works for working people?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251210.yafS_1&refcode=em20251210-5697&amount=3&t=3&akid=5697%2E420207%2EBJGYVz)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251210.yafS_1&amount=3&refcode=em20251210-5697&t=22&akid=5697%2E420207%2EBJGYVz)**
Together, we can take back the House in 2026 and put a stop to Trump’s billionaire-first agenda.
— Team Jayapal

name: Representative Vikki Breese-Iverson
subject: Join me in Terrebonne on Dec. 15th!
body:
Want to oppose the gas tax hike? Find your nearest signing location for Sign Across Oregon this Saturday.
|
---

#
Hi there! I hope this message finds you well! I'm reaching out to personally invite you to an important town hall meeting that Commissioner Tony DeBone and I are hosting. **What:** Town Hall Discussion
**When:** Monday, December 15th, 4:30pm - 6pm
**Where:** Terrebonne Elementary School Cafeteria (1199 B Ave, Terrebonne) We'll discuss key issues affecting our community, including wildfires in north Deschutes County and transportation/gas taxes. Your voice and concerns matter, and we want to hear from you! This is a great opportunity to ask questions, share your perspective, and help us better represent your needs. We hope to see you there and get your feedback on these important issues! Warmly,
**Vikki Breese-Iverson**
State Representative | House District #59

Representative Vikki Breese-Iverson
PO Box 249, Prineville, OR 97754

Hi there. I wanted to share a piece I wrote for _[Common Dreams](https://substack.com/redirect/2c09205f-c983-4b83-81a1-e8ece126234f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ about Tim Robinson's latest television show, _The Chair Company_ , which--with the highest ratings for a new comedy in HBO's history--has become a breakout hit. If you've never seen the show, or followed Tim Robinson, this review may or may not be worth your time--in which case I highly, highly recommend you check out the series! It's really something else.
* * *
It wouldn't be inaccurate to say I'm a fan of comedian, actor, and writer Tim Robinson. But "fan" may not fully convey my [regard](https://substack.com/redirect/7253164e-1dc6-47af-94be-0f5f6957c67e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for him, or that of many of my closest friends. It's not a parasocial relationship we have, exactly. It's more like we have developed what might be characterized--somewhat ridiculously, but not totally untruthfully--as a civil religion around Robinson's work. We share a liturgy of favorite quotes, an iconography of memes, a commitment to passing these traditions on to the next generation (truly, you haven't lived until you've seen a four-year-old boy shout "[Let's slop 'em up!](https://substack.com/redirect/0cf9dd85-c1ba-471a-a0cd-ead4e5d239da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" while pouring a glass of water over his dinner plate).
And though my friends and I may lay it on a bit thicker than most, we're certainly not alone in our obsession. Robinson's contorted face--the confused grimace, the creepy grin, the manic scream--have dominated the internet since 2019; his turns of phrase, in their characteristic grammatical uncanny valley--"[You sure about that's not why?](https://substack.com/redirect/bc648271-30c8-4477-98ee-b9d9473217d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"--have become the language through which millions respond to the world around them.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/86ec988a-0df3-4e3c-b6ff-d295e547c09a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Whether or not you've heard of Tim Robinson, if you've been on the internet over the last six years, you've probably seen memes from his work, like this one.
What explains our fascination with this weirdo comedian? The simplest response--the guy's stuff is super funny--provides much of the answer, of course. But I don't think it's the whole story. For me, at least, Robinson's shows hold a legitimate claim to being the contemporary art that most effectively captures the alienation and absurdity of our current moment.
Take "[Darmine Doggy Door,](https://substack.com/redirect/9fe35a88-a624-40ac-819e-a1ecf91dcba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" a sketch from the third season of Robinson's hit Netflix show _I Think You Should Leave_. What starts off looking like a classic ad parody quickly takes a turn into horror when Robinson's character has a flashback to the incident that inspired his new dog door design: a monster crawling into his house. It turns out the "monster" was just a pig in a Richard Nixon mask, sent by a neighbor as a prank--but, as Robinson explains with increasingly delirious energy, "When you can't sleep and you see that thing, you're not just like right away, 'That's a pig with a mask.' You're like, 'That's gonna kill me. That's real. That lives with us on Earth. I thought I was gonna get eaten."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9fe35a88-a624-40ac-819e-a1ecf91dcba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Then the sketch gets to its true subject. Robinson [relates](https://substack.com/redirect/5d204e24-0a3d-435c-b520-349d2192690c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that his first thought upon seeing this nightmarish apparition was, "Great, I don't have to go to work tomorrow"--and we finally see that the real nightmare here is the implication of that unconscious response. "You're relieved you don't have to go to work cause you thought you were gonna get eaten? What the fuck is this world?" he says, grasping his head in disbelief. "What have they done to us?" And again, yelling at the top of his lungs and pointing directly at the camera: "What did they do to us?!" Finally, a cut to Robinson looking dejected with his hands in his pockets. He concludes the dog door commercial: "My life is nothing I thought it should be and everything I was worried it would become because for 50 seconds, **I thought there was monsters on the world**." End scene.
"Darmine Doggy Door" is more explicit with its social analysis than most of Robinson's work, in which the commentary tends to pop up chaotically here and there through the funhouse mirror of his invented worlds. But the newest show from Robinson (and his longtime writing partner, Zach Kanin), HBO's _The Chair Company_ , which wrapped up its first season last week, expands these past moments of weirdly incisive inquiry into a longform treatment of that primal scream of a question, "What did they do to us?"
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/28ae40c7-a869-4e2f-b834-8c652114aa01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Here's the basic outline of _The Chair Company_ : Ron Trosper, played by Robinson, is a recently-promoted middle manager at an Ohio company that designs shopping malls. After giving a successful speech to kick off a new construction project, he returns to his seat onstage, which collapses. Ron cannot let go of this embarrassing incident--as he shouts at a customer-service representative, "I blasted through a fucking chair at work yesterday in front of all my bosses and my employees, and everybody laughed at me because I'm a fucking joke!" When Ron is unable to get in touch with Tecca, the eponymous chair company, to demand an apology, his questions grow, until he becomes convinced that he is uncovering a "vast criminal conspiracy." Viewers are left to question whether this conspiracy actually exists or not, at least until the season's penultimate episode. But Ron is dissatisfied with his humdrum job and fresh off a mid-life crisis--he tried to start his own business doing offroad Jeep tours in suburban Ohio, which went as well as you'd expect--and so he latches onto this mystery as a chance to finally do something "important" with his life.
Hilarity, thrills, and horror ensue, alongside all sorts of sociological observations particularly visible to those of us who are partial to a little Ron Trosper-like conspiratorial thinking. Great essays have already been written on what _The Chair Company_ has to say about the [modern workplace](https://substack.com/redirect/44a309ea-1483-467a-8174-14623def7e29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [masculinity](https://substack.com/redirect/6ade652d-22df-4ac0-9569-2bda33e0a434?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [Big Tech enshittification](https://substack.com/redirect/5082b195-f979-41bf-9d5e-9682f1367050?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), among other topics. But for me, the skeleton key to the show appeared in a scene about halfway through Episode 3. Ron is once again stuck on hold, trying to get through to Tecca, when he loses his temper, shouting out what could be the thesis for the entire series: "These fuckers never pick up! That's the problem with the world today. People make garbage, and you can't talk to anybody! You can't complain to them, you can't get an apology. I want to scream at 'em!"
We've all been there, right? Whether it's the [gym](https://substack.com/redirect/0dc8d24d-a9f4-4ca1-943d-5beadabbff29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that won't let us cancel our membership, the [airline](https://substack.com/redirect/0103c5d8-a955-4e84-9b32-cc1d4c208ec6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that involuntarily bumped us, the [shrinkflation](https://substack.com/redirect/c76f0d50-a76c-4021-8374-3aed5772c68b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) pushing up our grocery bills, the [planned obsolescence](https://substack.com/redirect/2ee3f385-8538-4931-b3c9-56fe55078b56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) degrading our phone and computer, the AI slop taking over our digital lives, the hidden [junk fees](https://substack.com/redirect/69967418-3fb4-4346-a8e8-56dd28b0d3e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) we got stuck with (like in _The Chair Company_ clip below), or any of the countless other death-by-a-thousand-cut indignities that corporate America subjects us to every day.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/19ec7bbe-3b7a-45dd-9f48-9629ce826ef3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In all these scams, it's not simply that a shitty corporation is ripping us off--what really burns the most is knowing how utterly impervious these bad actors are to any sort of accountability for their abuse. It's certainly enough, now and then, to inspire a daydream or two about dropping everything to make them pay. But at some point we rein in our frustration and move on with our lives.
Ron Trosper doesn't do that. He does drop everything--his job, his family commitments, and anything else that might get in the way of his pursuit of justice, his quest to "scream at 'em."
Now, to be clear, _The Chair Company_ does not valorize that frenzied choice. We're definitely not supposed to see Ron as a role model. And yet (and here's where I have to give a **spoiler alert** : Consider not reading on if you haven't gotten through at least the penultimate episode--it's a better show if you don't know what the hell is going on), it cannot be denied that, ultimately, _Ron was right_. He wasn't being a dope. He wasn't inventing a criminal conspiracy in a desperate bid to feel like he'd done something worthwhile with his life (or at least, he wasn't _just_ doing that). In the end, the threads he pulled on all led somewhere; the scheme was real, and, as we get hints of in the season finale, potentially just as vast as Ron had feverishly imagined
I was extremely pleased with _The Chair Company_ 's reveal that there was, in fact, a conspiracy--that this wasn't just a show about a middle-aged guy's mental breakdown, but rather a show about a man's attempt (however maladjusted or unadvisable it might be) to get a grip on an actual scam by actual bad actors seeking to profit from other people's misfortune. Though that choice takes us to some surreal places, it also makes _The Chair Company_ a truer reflection of our actual reality. Because the world today is lousy with Teccas. Everywhere you look there's graft, there's corruption, there are forces that stand to profit when we blast through a fucking chair, that line their pockets by making us into a fucking joke.
And again and again we see how impervious these forces are to accountability. Elite impunity is perhaps the defining feature of our economy and government today--and rage at that impunity, not unlike the rage motivating Ron, may be the most potent political force out there. The banks got bailed out, we got sold out, and an angry America elected and reelected an angry reality TV conman who built a movement, ostensibly, to drain that swamp--a movement that now seems to be [splintering](https://substack.com/redirect/35300c2b-b3b4-4e75-b103-35c8cd4098ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over Jeffrey Epstein, the [literal embodiment](https://substack.com/redirect/7e2ccd63-b932-49d4-88a6-36a80d51dccd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of elite conspiracy.
Because here's the nightmarish truth at the heart of _The Chair Company_ : It's not all in our heads. It's not just a pig in a Nixon mask--there really are monsters on the world. Robinson's latest show lets us imagine what it would look like if we didn't simply accept the scams of these fuckers who never pick up the phone, who refuse to apologize, who make garbage. The picture it paints of that path is not a pretty one--_The Chair Company_ is not necessarily recommending that we follow in Ron's disgruntled footsteps. But, by my read, it's not necessarily saying we shouldn't, either. Ron is maladjusted, for sure. But look at his world. Is it one he _should_ be well-adjusted to? Is ours? I'm not so sure. Neither, I think, is Tim Robinson--and that's part of what makes his art so special.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c21dcca1-4f6c-4d54-a485-994c9f47d3b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hYXJvbnJlZ3VuYmVyZy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjE4MDcyNzY5MCwicyI6NDk4MTE3MCwiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTc2NTM5NTc5NCwiZXhwIjoyMDgwOTcxNzk0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.MmPQs4Dd77VifkIGYbQN4eL4VrDLT2lpRz4HcfE55I0?)

We’d like to submit your response to Trump before midnight!

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Is there anything I can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hear me out, Derek
| | |
---
Derek – is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in $5 split between John Fetterman and my Senate campaign today?
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52388?t=1&akid=10468%2E434096%2ElklFO8)
| | [Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52388?t=2&akid=10468%2E434096%2ElklFO8)
---
What if I told you that not one, but _two_ polls show me with a slight lead in this race?
What if I told you that experts at _MSNBC_ say the Senate is “in play,” and that Ohio is one of the states we must win?
What if I told you that _The Cook Political Report_ has increased our odds of flipping this seat – but that corporate special interests are gearing up to spend millions to defeat me?
**The momentum is behind our grassroots movement. But misleading attack ads have already hit the airwaves, and whether we’re able to counter the smears and reach voters with the truth depends on folks like you.**
**[So please, will you chip in $5 – or even $15 – split with John Fetterman to fuel our campaign, protect our lead in the polls, and win in Ohio?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52388?t=3&akid=10468%2E434096%2ElklFO8)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Sherrod Brown and John Fetterman:_ | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52389?t=4&akid=10468%2E434096%2ElklFO8)
---
| | [DONATE $25 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52390?t=5&akid=10468%2E434096%2ElklFO8)
---
| | [DONATE $50 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52391?t=6&akid=10468%2E434096%2ElklFO8)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52388?t=7&akid=10468%2E434096%2ElklFO8)
---
Thank you for all that you do.

Sherrod
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk347-bu-fl-footer&t=8&refcode2=10468_434096_lklFO8&akid=10468%2E434096%2ElklFO8)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://X.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: NH GOP
subject: They just put New Hampshire on their hit list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee, Chairman Jim MacEachern
body:
The DNC and DLCC have launched a $50 MILLION campaign to flip state legislatures — and they just added New Hampshire to their target list.

| | | | | [|
---](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=ddf11932b8&e=f3aa6419cd)
| | | | | |

Friend,
**We just got word: The DNC and DLCC have launched a $50 MILLION campaign to flip state legislatures — and they just added New Hampshire to their target list.**
This is not “business as usual.”
**This is Washington dark money flooding into our state** to buy the Legislature, rewrite our laws, and **force New Hampshire to look a whole lot more like Massachusetts.**
Their plan is simple: Drown our elections in out-of-state cash, topple Republican majorities, and shove through the income tax, sales tax, and big-government agenda Granite Staters have rejected for decades.
We cannot — and will not — let DC Democrats buy New Hampshire.
But we’re going to need every grassroots Republican to step up _now_ , before their money hits the airwaves.
**Pitch in any amount today to defend New Hampshire from the DNC’s $50 million assault.**
---
| [DEFEND THE NEW HAMPSHIRE ADVANTAGE](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=1b68eedbb3&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| |

Republicans have kept this state the safest, most prosperous, and most free in the country.
The DNC wants to tear that down — and they’re willing to spend whatever it takes. If we get outspent, we get outrun. If we get outrun, we lose our majorities.
And if we lose our majorities, the Left gets everything they’ve been dreaming of:
* An income tax
* A sales tax
* Higher tolls
* Bigger government
* More mandates
* Less freedom

You know what’s at stake.
**They’re bringing $50 million to the fight. We need you.**
Chip in below to help us hold the line:
---
| [DONATE $25](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=47b8dde8a1&e=f3aa6419cd)

New Hampshire has stopped the Left before — but only because our grassroots refuse to back down.
Let’s do it again.
For the Granite State,NHGOP

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Trump’s FBI is targeting me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
I recently got word that the FBI’s Counterterrorism Division appeared to open an inquiry into me and five of my colleagues—all because we made a video stressing the power of the oath to the Constitution and that service members can never be forced to follow illegal orders.

| Peter,

I recently got word that the FBI’s Counterterrorism Division appeared to open an inquiry into me and five of my colleagues—all because we made a video stressing the power of the oath to the Constitution and that service members can never be forced to follow illegal orders.

**To be honest, the President's reaction—calling for our arrest and death, the FBI being deployed against us—tells me exactly who he is and how little he respects the Constitution.**

The FBI is being used as a tool to try and intimidate and harass members of Congress.

He is wielding the power of government to punish dissent. That’s authoritarianism—plain and simple.

But here’s the truth: No amount of harassment, threats, or abuse of power will stop us from doing our jobs or honoring our oath.

We swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States. That oath lasts a lifetime, and we intend to keep it. We will not be bullied. We will never give up the ship.

**While Trump goes after us, I need your help to show that we are not backing down — that people across this country are standing with those defending our Constitution, not those trying to break it.** [_**So, will you step up and stand with me? subject: I'll always fight for Granite Staters.

body:
| | | John Sununu officially jumped into the race for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire — **a move orchestrated by national Republicans desperate to cling to power.**

[**I need your help to fight back against this latest opponent. Will you split a contribution between me and the DSCC today to win this race, keep New Hampshire blue, and take back the Senate majority?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21818?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20251210-ChrisPappas-PappasSununu2Tandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20251210-ChrisPappas-PappasSununu2Tandem-Pros-sl1&akid=22029%2E9716520%2EUmKkj6)

Our opponents know our grassroots movement threatens everything they stand for: cashing in with corporations, working for special interests, and selling out New Hampshire.

I will take on anyone to do what's best for New Hampshire, and I'll keep fighting to make health care more affordable, protect Granite Staters' hard-earned benefits, and defend reproductive freedom.

National Republicans are going to throw everything at us to flip this seat – including recruiting a former one-term Senator like Sununu, who made millions after selling out New Hampshire to corporations and working for special interests. We must protect this seat if Democrats want any shot at flipping the Senate and putting a stop to the GOP's extreme agenda. But we can't do it without you.

With Sununu officially in, GOP megadonors and corporate PACs are already lining up to flip this seat red. **_Now it's up to us to fight back._**

[**Can you split a donation between my campaign and the DSCC today to power this movement, defend this Senate seat, and take back the Senate majority?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21818?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20251210-ChrisPappas-PappasSununu2Tandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20251210-ChrisPappas-PappasSununu2Tandem-Pros-sl1&akid=22029%2E9716520%2EUmKkj6)
