name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/10/2025
body:
Inside the Erie Mail Threats That Resulted in No Charges
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Colorado politics shifted as multiple lawmakers seats need filled, prompting a [rapid series of vacancy appointments](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Douglas County reported a troubling [surge in sex-crime cases](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—including five teachers charged. [Courts split on TABOR](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with one ruling weakening taxpayer protections and another offering a rare win. Boulder’s climate case moved toward the U.S. Supreme Court, raising warnings that [one county could impose nationwide energy mandates](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). A Regis nursing student [punished for sharing the gospel](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) challenged the university’s decision in an open letter. And in Erie, twenty conservatives received [powder-filled political threats](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), yet prosecutors declined charges despite a confession—fueling outrage over unequal justice.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** A new housing forecast shows the [market cooling in 2026](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with prices expected to fall in 22 major metros—mostly in the South and West—as mortgage rates ease and the market becomes more buyer-friendly.
🗣️**Commentary Spotlight...** Today’s commentary criticizes Secretary Jena Griswold for refusing to provide the DOJ unredacted voter data, arguing [she’s blocking lawful federal oversight](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) meant to verify citizenship and keep voter rolls accurate—putting Colorado in the same legal crosshairs as other states resisting election-integrity checks.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, December 10, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[A Town on Edge: Inside the Erie Mail Threats That Resulted in No Charges](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
In early October, residents across Erie and in Virginia, began opening their mailboxes to find sympathy cards inside plain envelopes. The message referenced the assassination of Charlie Kirk, accompanied by an empty packet of Gushers candy taped to the card, glitter and a loose powdery substance that spilled when handled. Twenty residents in total received the cards. Many were former candidates, business owners, volunteers, and known conservatives within the community.
One envelope opened in Virginia triggered a full hazmat activation. Loudoun County Fire & Rescue’s official report shows responders in Tychem suits isolating the scene, testing the substance, and alerting federal authorities. Their lab equipment detected plastics and ephedrine. The Erie Police report later acknowledged that “at least one incident had prompted a hazmat response.”
Investigators located a suspect by tracing the cards to purchases made at Walmart-using the numbers on the cards. When the FBI and Erie Police visited the home of 46-year-old Erie resident Skylar Weitzel, he admitted to mailing them. Weitzel repeated that admission under oath at a PPO hearing. Yet...despite the confession, the evidence, and the multi-state response, prosecutors at both the federal and local levels declined to file charges.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Probation for preaching: Scarboro challenges Regis with an open letter after disciplinary ruling](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **Regis disciplined a student simply for sharing the gospel:** Nursing student Hunter Scarboro was placed on probation after administrators reclassified vague “comfort” complaints into a charge of “disruptive conduct,” despite offering no evidence that his peaceful, voluntary faith conversations disrupted anyone.
* **Scarboro says the university is abandoning its Christian identity:** In his open letter, he argues Regis is suppressing biblical truth to appease modern ideological pressures, noting that nothing he did met the school’s own definition of improper proselytizing, which bans coercion—not open discussions about faith.
* **He challenges Regis to repent and restore religious freedom on campus:** Scarboro accuses the administration of redefining the gospel to fit cultural trends and urges the university to return to its stated Jesuit values—while encouraging fellow Christians not to be silenced by institutions hostile to traditional belief.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Secretary Griswold’s Reckless Assault on Election Integrity](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MICHAEL J BADAGLIACCO "MJB", [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **Griswold rejected a lawful DOJ request for voter data:** Colorado’s Secretary of State dismissed the DOJ’s citizenship-verification effort as an attack on democracy, even though the information requested is standard, already held by federal agencies, and essential for confirming only eligible Americans are voting.
* **Federal law clearly gives the DOJ authority to demand these records:** Statutes like HAVA, the NVRA, and the Civil Rights Act explicitly empower the DOJ to inspect voter-registration data to ensure accurate rolls, and courts have repeatedly upheld this authority—making Griswold’s defiance legally baseless and politically motivated.
* **Colorado now risks joining other states sued for obstruction:** Fourteen states have already been taken to court for similar refusal to comply, and Griswold’s stance—driven more by partisan rhetoric than law—could waste taxpayer dollars while weakening election integrity and allowing ineligible votes to persist.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**Caught between two governments: Whistleblower says Colorado’s DEI system collides with a federal ban**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | DECEMBER 8** _When managers in the Colorado Department of Agriculture (CDA) logged into their Nov. 6 virtual meeting, the agenda read like a standard operational update. But on the list sat two items that created angst: the statewide EDI/Colorado for All report due in December and the launch of a 2026 Inclusive Leadership cohort._
__
[**Colorado families hit from every angle as taxes and fees outpace income growth**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY SHAINA COLE | STATE | DECEMBER 8** _The latest analysis from the Common Sense Institute shows Denver-area households feeling a real financial squeeze, and it’s not just higher prices driving it. The report finds that since 2016, the typical household’s tax and fee load has jumped 48 percent while pre-tax income has grown only 27 percent._
__
[**Do You Really Understand Conservatism or Common Sense?**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY RUSS MINARY | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 8** _“You keep using that word. I do not think it means what you think it means.” In the very funny 1987 film, ‘The Princess Bride,’ the character Inigo Montoya clearly identifies a problem that plagues both culture and politics today: people use words without thinking, understanding or agreeing upon their meaning, which leads to needless mistakes, arguments and division._ __

**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---
|
---
⚕️**DID YOU KNOW?** Lyndon B. Johnson created Medicare and Medicaid in 1965.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "A leader is someone who helps improve the lives of other people or improve the system they live under." – Sam Houston
|

# [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121018772/588090663/1733485174?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzFiNDMyZDUtMDJkNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SoBYUTfXL9CGl4xODmZYYEGzp_Dddz3w6iBPc6f1QXU=)
Hi friend, I'm the Democrat running for Congress in California’s 22nd District -- one of the most competitive races in the country, and a seat that could decide control of the House. Most don’t know this, but while I’m running for Congress, I’m also teaching students at my local community college. These aren’t your typical four-year college students. They’re moms. They’re immigrants. They’re folks holding down night shifts, raising families, but still showing up because they believe in building something better. **That’s the story of the Central Valley. It was my family’s story -- and it’s the story my opponent David Valadao has turned his back on.** He’s voting for the interests of billionaires and the far-right -- not the working people I see every day. Our communities deserve a voice that understands their struggle, and won’t sell them out. clean_body: | = Hi friend, I'm the Democrat running for Congress in California’s 22nd District -- one of the most competitive races in the country, and a seat that could decide control of the House. Most don’t know this, but while I’m running for Congress, I’m also teaching students at my local community college. These aren’t your typical four-year college students. They’re moms. They’re immigrants. They’re folks holding down night shifts, raising families, but still showing up because they believe in building something better. That’s the story of the Central Valley. It was my family’s story -- and it’s the story my opponent David Valadao has turned his back on. He’s voting for the interests of billionaires and the far-right -- not the working people I see every day. Our communities deserve a voice that understands their struggle, and won’t sell them out. That’s why I’m running. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being a part of this movement, Randy Villegas | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress PO Box 1346 Visalia, CA 93279 United States

Hi Friend, There's a lot happening this time of year. Even the good things like family gatherings, traditions, and even Christmas services can leave us rushing from one moment to the next. And if we're not careful, we'll miss the one story that changes everything.

Christ's coming for _you. _ At PreBorn!, we created a simple devotional to help us pause and focus again. It's called **[_Unto Us a Child Is Born: 12 Scriptures to Prepare Your Heart for Christmas._](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/yu0wXUD-sMkYwqn1JJkSYFpTxTDFOTontQYkWqtQ2ZqDKuA6YCK6LuwBAEscoZDitiJ0-zCA0XxqIoJ-19drOtGVzeDyxGXvIKOilfq415tOo1izjRGLt43TJ1dULlVMs5HyPJ7LZkuSuBqwxBZxMOxzbpkQUAIPYCPnMVj8b8F9pW7RodH8Nv7dDbdPiUiJFIXmJeL-MsgNjnyMDzxvKxoiqXdh13zHITZ28GD5k653EpQUyNgcwD2A_wJrAMGKnseYo84LGCh6it5N76t5A2aA3feydp_EVx5QPfHHICmYFIu5L8_0sas045jXYQPZcaJCClBYBR4V4ssF-GUny6IVZYgQ2NSWHvMqvTpXet0I45Smx5dNIyEMFLq5tLJ7sNYFjfL3J8PsdX9Tgnb_dIHomG7e_fF3XIRikinkZ8PLRxE2stwH4CYT5cSIKrNHeUin8RbirsNjxcXdY69FGVVoWzK1ON4ZyWN0TNCVLaHkGg8wl-fO5dZ1hYjoAeGeXpoXxbs1vSbg9LNy4DAc_0f3Dx-1hBI1YRP8goZnagwv-nWxW45Tq9t3bvDvOvYOqgvJ0Z5EuzMn2PM24tg3vDbWWJ0l1EfivDGKrvhCEZU8h7mX7X_b-Co3kIRI-kTFbC4kvtKsJj55nmt-YA/I-KaZczT-6-07Cqlp4hRf8EAOgeaypQF/15)** It walks through the full biblical Christmas story from the prophecies in Isaiah to the wonder of the manger. Each day includes a full Scripture reading, a short reflection, and a prayer to help you worship and rest in the truth of Christ's coming. No fluff. Just God's Word and space to remember why it matters so much. You can get your copy here: [https://resources.preborn.com/unto-us-a-child-is-born ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/1e0yMa75egM3X5jUoGcWHpq2IEkvJYcVQuZ6UlW8xKweSUU2Ko6diHb0Bsc7RI8kKQy02FpSgXipT9y1Y8qhiG-V5i5AQOBTgHUWkyXYWzWWsYFU-7H-PjeLhJwhhVqa0EvFvHbEgQ7-MywS77rerj15PhxZPXyj3F0Wuf_CcUOugMJ91b2leuYWIRdiKoA8hjFdnsTk66QD-kmzlbaSuW0qKCnCTvAshQd9pigDMmn-FxRUK9i9kSYdALF08IuGxhvzdmJKzNQiEIYMqJNFReC41KC86pbMBdycmv7ebM_BYrnT55jxx89hEwIuNqjg5e4Y2WqAa95_BDPZTnEYqD4hOJ5er1XiAACyllQGbQQUCdrGZYvWPlyQR-fl-YLxBy-sfepEtZR5fbTBavJ_7s6y6_XckkjxqODTGz2u7uI_PJ0YAq1Gdxkxw0WR-bs0NJFZeds-JsHToTA-myqil-GcWV3ksZksWXBMFd3FWpNUuVvD4AlHQ-kMNsEuMThZ8Qf5-xi_qe7ibThMls9eXX84qFWLUKz2L_J0bYaizEkiEiJgeWwC2k-21L6-8yk6-UIu-QlUZ30LxmjuEl_ZyFMKmteO9ajfMejfKuZMRkVJIkAEigW3ZYJNWlF5brRLV3s6vbhPuLH_8pOLmA/GB_fjyffDQQReqZa7yKYIu4d_789tcBL/15) We hope it's an encouragement to you. Because this season isn't about what we give, plan, or accomplish. It's about the Savior who came. And that's a truth worth slowing down for. Wishing you and your loved ones a Merry Christmas,

The PreBorn! Team

body:

Peter,

We’ll get right to it. **This is one of the most competitive House seats in the entire country and our grassroots support will determine whether we can hold it in 2026.**

Control of the House is down to a handful of seats and Laura represents New York’s only toss-up and is the most vulnerable Democrat in the state. National Republicans know this and they are already raising huge sums and pouring money into this district.

National Republicans know this and they are already raising huge sums and pouring money into this district. | And now the opponent Laura narrowly defeated by 2 points is moving toward another run. That means the big spending is coming. We need to be ready before it hits. | If everyone reading this chips in $25, we will hit our goal and show Republicans that Laura is not falling behind. = | = | = | = | = | = | Thank you, – Team Gillen * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Gillen for NY PO Box 774 Rockville Centre, NY 11571 United States | = If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above.

name: Powered by People
subject: Last night was energizing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240523%2E444211%2Eka03tR)
Last night, Beto brought our Powered by People community together for an All Volunteer Call, and it was definitely an energizing and inspiring moment.
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251210.dlmlHw&refcode=ema20251210-240523&t=3&akid=240523%2E444211%2Eka03tR)
We talked about how we’re doing the work to reach and register the voters who will decide the closest races in our state—and how our 2024 organizing helped drive young voter turnout up across Texas. That didn’t happen by accident. It happened because volunteers like you spent your evenings, weekends, energy, and heart connecting with voters, getting new people registered, and having the conversations that truly matter.
During the call, Beto also shared clear, immediate ways to plug in and make a difference right now with so much on the line. And the response spoke volumes:
* More than **550 people attended,** with folks joining from every region of Texas and even across the country.
* People gathered together at **8 in-person watch parties** in Houston, Dallas, Fort Worth, Austin, the RGV, San Antonio, Tyler, and Bryan-College Station.
* More than **200 people signed up for trainings** before the night was over.
* More than **50 people** were so eager to get going that they signed up for in-person organizing events that are taking place in the next week.

[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251210.dlmlHw&refcode=ema20251210-240523&t=4&akid=240523%2E444211%2Eka03tR)
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251210.dlmlHw&refcode=ema20251210-240523&t=5&akid=240523%2E444211%2Eka03tR)
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251210.dlmlHw&refcode=ema20251210-240523&t=6&akid=240523%2E444211%2Eka03tR)
These moments where people come together and raise their hands to get involved are how we build the kind of statewide grassroots power that overcomes voter suppression and changes Texas for the better. This is how we win in 2026: together, in community, one conversation at a time.
But to keep this momentum going and to support our newly added volunteers, we need to make sure our organizing program has the resources to reach every voter we can—especially in the places that will decide the balance of power in Texas.
[**Will you chip in $3 today to help fuel this organizing and voter registration work, and ensure we have the resources to win in 2026?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251210.dlmlHw&refcode=ema20251210-240523&t=7&akid=240523%2E444211%2Eka03tR)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251210.dlmlHw&refcode=ema20251210-240523&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=26&akid=240523%2E444211%2Eka03tR)**
Thank you,
Powered by People

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20251210-240523-footer&t=27&refcode2=240523_444211_ka03tR&akid=240523%2E444211%2Eka03tR)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/update-contact-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/)

name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: Hoping you can add $3 for James
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
$3
That’s the donation we’re hoping you’ll make to James Talarico’s campaign for the U.S. Senate.
$3 because polling shows James in a statistical tie with both Cornyn and Paxton. Doesn’t matter who Republicans nominate — he can defeat either.
$3 because our race just got a lot more expensive with the field growing — and with right-wing super PACs spending millions in Texas, it’s going to take significant resources to get James’ message in front of voters.
$3 because the primary is less than 12 weeks away, and the only chance we have to win, take back power for working people, and flip the Senate majority is with the largest grassroots movement Texas has ever seen.
Peter, it may not seem like $3 can make much of a difference in a state and a race as expensive as this one. But we’re in a strong position today because this movement is powered by lots and lots of people giving $3 at a time.
We’ve had a big week. Thousands of folks have already chipped in $3, and they’re hoping you’ll do the same. We can’t slow down right now.
[**Can you add your $3 donation to help us take back Texas? None of this works without people like you. Please. Do it for James and the movement we’re building.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251210-1-ak&t=1&akid=309%2E1347274%2E9nNQq0)**

name: Brandon Herrera
subject: It's official: I'm on the ballot.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
body:
Patriot,
It's official. Last week I went to our state capitol to register as a candidate and my name will now be on the ballot.
And despite the many controversies surrounding him, Tony Gonzales also registered as a candidate along with his three million dollars cash on hand that he raised from the DC swamp by selling out his voters.
Will you help me celebrate this landmark of getting on the ballot with a contribution today? Please support my campaign at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/Q763IYJjLIU8iTixr892yAiKOw/A0ZiMAEHfCIIL6Jkt80qLQ)?
Our giveaway for an AKG Occam Warfighter rifle is still on, a firearm I personally built for one lucky donor. Every five dollars you donate earns an entry (so one hundred dollars earns twenty entries, etc.)
The game is set and the fight is on. Are you in?
Respectfully,

Brandon Herrera

Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/unsubscribe/M3dKmjvhR8CwRJ801N0zlTlDygVorb8PbaawXpI4LLQ/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg/A0ZiMAEHfCIIL6Jkt80qLQ)

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Trump’s approval is in the gutter with young voters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Right now, Dems are just as unpopular as the president.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251210-1&t=1&akid=2925%2E587540%2ErE4O2T)
Peter, young people have officially turned on Donald Trump.
**Trump’s approval with young people plummeted by 46 points in a recent poll.**
Another poll shows that nearly half of registered voters want to see Democrats take back Congress. But there’s a troubling stat that should light a fire under us:
Right now with young Americans, Donald Trump’s approval rating is one point _HIGHER_ than Democrats in Congress. That’s right — **Democrats are _JUST AS_ unpopular as the president!**
Why is this? It's because young voters' views are driven much more by frustration than party loyalty. From devastating student loans to an over 10% Gen Z unemployment rate, our generation is drowning. Last election cycle, young voters reached for the hand they thought would bring them to the surface fastest. As this poll shows, millions are now realizing Trump and Republicans aren't throwing them a life preserver — they are tossing them an anchor. They’ve raised prices, destroyed the job market, demolished research universities and opportunities to innovate, and rents are higher than ever.
Young voters are starting to show signs they are willing to give Democrats a chance. While it certainly has a lot to do with Trump's total failure to lower prices, we also believe it has to do with young voters seeing people like Zohran Mamdani who come to them with a real plan to _truly_ improve their lives instead of saying: “Hey, I know you’re 10 feet underwater. But the Republicans want to push you down to 11, so you should vote for me! And maybe I’ll pull you up to just 9 feet underwater!” Young voters aren’t accepting being underwater anymore. We want to be able to breathe. We want to be at the surface.
That’s where Leaders We Deserve comes in. We’re here to bring fresh blood into the party. We need more leaders who have actually paid rent in this century, who have been students in active shooter drills, who know what it's like to pay off student debt in _today’s_ economy, and leaders who care most about the climate crisis but they will actually have to live with the effects of it. It doesn’t matter how poll tested a message is if the messenger is not a credible source on the subject. We need a new generation of leaders who can properly represent our generation in government because they are living the same struggles.
The work we’re doing at Leaders We Deserve is key to turning this trend around. We’re replacing ineffective politicians with a new generation that’s ready to lead and isn’t controlled by the same special interests that brought us here. So we need your help.
**[If you’re with us, can we count on you to donate $5 or anything you can?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251210_1_approval.E17TTl&refcode=em20251210-2925&amount=5&t=2&akid=2925%2E587540%2ErE4O2T)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251210_1_approval.E17TTl&amount=5&refcode=em20251210-2925&t=21&akid=2925%2E587540%2ErE4O2T)**
Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251210-1&t=22&refcode2=2925_587540_rE4O2T&akid=2925%2E587540%2ErE4O2T)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

**👉 **He _fired_ the CDC Director and replaced key health leaders with anti-vaccine extremists.
💉 He _canceled_ vaccine campaigns and downplayed deadly measles outbreaks as cases surged across the country.
🧬 He _shut_ down critical mRNA vaccine research, halting work on pediatric cancer, HIV, and public health innovation.
😷 He’s _blamed childhood vaccines and prenatal Tylenol for autism_ – even as real experts call his claims junk science.
📉 And his agency laid off hundreds of CDC staffers, crippling our response to the respiratory illness season.
Enough is enough, null.

subject: Tomorrow, we put this behind us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, The full Indiana State Senate will vote tomorrow on redistricting, and decide the fate of the proposed new districts that carve up our state. _**No matter how the vote turns out tomorrow, I want you to be the first to know that I will not stop working for Hoosiers.**_ They cannot redraw my ambition to keep working for every single person in Northwest Indiana, and all across our state. There is too much on the line. Too many Hoosiers are struggling to make ends meet, pay their utility bills, keep their healthcare coverage, and feed their families. **[The Republican majority know their Big Bad Bill and agenda are hurting our families. That’s why this fight is so important, and why hours ahead of the vote tomorrow I’m asking if you would rush a donation split between my re-election campaign and the Indiana Democratic Party?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121021558/588099841/-969499340?refcode=251210tomorrow&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODg0MDkzNC0wOWQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1jxux-SYA3oDbWKGuzZ64FsV0Gncme89H4qMVs6cMIA=)** No matter the result of tomorrow’s vote in the State Senate, I will be running for reelection to the U.S. House because the stakes are far too high to stop standing for Hoosiers. I go to Washington D.C. thinking of every single person that calls Indiana home. I want to keep lifting up our vulnerable, supporting our children, and bringing critical dollars back home to Indiana where they belong. **[Their effort to unseat me by changing the lines in the middle of the decade only makes me work harder on behalf of every Hoosier. Will you split a donation today between the Indiana Democrats and my congressional campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121021559/588099844/-969499340?refcode=251210tomorrow&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODg0MDkzNC0wOWQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1jxux-SYA3oDbWKGuzZ64FsV0Gncme89H4qMVs6cMIA=)** With gratitude,
Frank

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Thank you to our volunteers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251210-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251210-email]
Hi there,
Every strong campaign is powered by people – not headlines, not polls, but the everyday dedication of volunteers who choose to stand up for our democracy.
As we celebrate volunteers , I want to take a moment to say thank you . Thank you to everyone who has made calls, shared a post, shown up at an event, or helped in any way. Your time, energy, and belief in this work are what keep our campaign moving forward.
I meet volunteers across the state who tell me the same thing: they’re here because they believe Colorado deserves an Attorney General who will defend our rights and stand up to extremism. That commitment inspires me every single day.
But as we head deeper into this critical election cycle, we need even more people to join our grassroots team. Whether you have an hour per day or an hour per month, there’s a place for you on this campaign.
Will you sign up to volunteer and help us protect Colorado’s future? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/YlbBAO3FvUCFmmSRJ4yexQ2]
SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/YlbBAO3FvUCFmmSRJ4yexQ2]Your support — your action — makes all the difference. Thank you for everything you’ve already done, and thank you for being part of this movement.
With deep gratitude,
Jena
P.S. First-time volunteer? We’ll make it easy! Our team provides training, support, and activities you can do from home or in your community. Sign up today, and we’ll get you started! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/YlbBAO3FvUCFmmSRJ4yexQ2]

Hi there, it’s Haley.

I’m writing to ask directly: What can I say to convince you to [_**chip in $15**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121021676/588100279/-873513011?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-12-10_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjRkNzk3Yi0wYWQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W6FOo-hIsJ_yzhRuD1W7d6JF0_mop6vJ-XirENJAPRc=) to help me win this battleground Senate race and keep Michigan blue?

What if I told you this race is the tipping point for Democrats – and experts agree the path to flipping the Senate runs straight through Michigan?

What if I told you I was born and raised here, and I’m in this fight for the Michiganders I know and love, not billionaire donors like the ones backing my GOP opponent?

What if I told you Donald Trump’s chaos agenda is just getting started – and the surest way to stop him is by flipping the Senate?

What if I told you Republicans spent more than $80 million last cycle trying to turn Michigan red – and they’re getting ready to do it again?

What if I told you my FEC deadline is in just 21 days, and right now I’m on track to fall short of my $200,000 goal?

clean_body: I’m writing to ask directly: | = Hi there, it’s Haley. I’m writing to ask directly: What can I say to convince you to = to help me win this battleground Senate race and keep Michigan blue? What if I told you I’m the only Democrat consistently polling ahead of Republican Mike Rogers – and even GOP strategists admitted I’d be their toughest opponent? What if I told you this race is the tipping point for Democrats – and experts agree the path to flipping the Senate runs straight through Michigan? What if I told you I was born and raised here, and I’m in this fight for the Michiganders I know and love, not billionaire donors like the ones backing my GOP opponent? What if I told you Donald Trump’s chaos agenda is just getting started – and the surest way to stop him is by flipping the Senate? What if I told you Republicans spent more than $80 million last cycle trying to turn Michigan red – and they’re getting ready to do it again? What if I told you my FEC deadline is in just 21 days, and right now I’m on track to fall short of my $200,000 goal? This is real. This is winnable. But only if we stand up and fight – together. That’s why I’m asking: = | | | = | = | = | = | = With grit and gratitude, Haley * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . body:
With a little under 6 months to go until our primary election, a lot can change.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40552%2E3422442%2Ejskzb8)
Peter,
A new poll is out and Katie Porter is the Democratic frontrunner. Take a look ⤵️
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251210_1_ak.J60upY&refcode=em20251210-40552&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40552%2E3422442%2Ejskzb8)
She’s leading the pack, but other candidates—including two MAGA extremists—are close behind. **[Can you rush $5 to help us pull ahead?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251210_1_ak.J60upY&refcode=em20251210-40552&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40552%2E3422442%2Ejskzb8)**
With a little under 6 months to go until our primary election, a lot can change. More candidates will probably enter and leave this race, support will shuffle around, and voters will be up for grabs. **Our campaign has to be ready to capitalize on every moment.**
21% support puts us in a good position for now, but that likely won’t be enough to win come primary day. We need to hustle to earn more votes _today_. But in a state as large as California, those efforts are expensive. That’s where you come in, Peter.
**[A donation of $5 or any amount you can afford will help us win over voters and send Katie to the Governor’s Office. Chip in today!](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251210_1_ak.J60upY&refcode=em20251210-40552&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=40552%2E3422442%2Ejskzb8)**

Thank you,
Katie Porter HQ

* * *
**Republicans will not stop until they have fully defunded SNAP, and they’ve almost accomplished that goal.** When Republicans passed their Big Brutal Budget last summer, they included the largest cut to SNAP in the program’s history―$187 billion over ten years. These cuts range from increasing states’ costs to administer SNAP and forcing harsher time limits on benefits for veterans, older adults, people with disabilities, and families with children. The SNAP plays a crucial role in reducing poverty and improving health and economic outcomes, and is THE most effective anti-hunger program. **BUT there’s a chance to stop attacks on SNAP.** Democrats in the House and Senate have just introduced a bill with broad support from organizations across the country, the Restoring Food Security for American Families and Farmers Act of 2025. This will reverse the SNAP cuts enacted in the Big Brutal Budget. The shutdown showed us how painful it is when families are denied SNAP. Congress needs to hear from you. **[Write to demand that Congress reverse the cuts made to SNAP.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_5hbu1DV_K1a9EsXVVRCLGzNDN9RaChIjhs_BjC-rapuJ8xJOSNHWxgZz33uQNrri6fbPF5CfAUIzcoEm4eQw8cUk-uPFDyRs-2ExKnM-wXERiRJQfK-L7IhKFcHBjRCxWXlDkKNwyTCVsJT6Quoi3iAho2Y-Vevz-ujNdcxlixJOgusKZC6qAtn6x57mEsTIvRx7b15thtxyN1HxVebFNIoEiaIeaUlivGAqC1qcnBhNwbEKzAIU1r05LVfZMYvb5mnmwwjzyWQO7-2J_LNBHBolN4aUDgbvYlcXLJ5tyK-1FzGhE4d-Mfn9YG3rlO3QAW3yM5m93U6IV60F0idcXiyIP3h-y8ueE9aAilnYg45__0vGlIzNldqfzJl7lFwKt9mZoCuyXaWal4JhCQp6hlipQk2VeiT2hVRnRXkMWFKKiTqHNAPCrUydvJ6hFWJwmLfv8_ErfQ-6GatPei8hJRdBnd6v3Vo17UCwoQ52EfJTr0XEstYVE_V676HgwvX1CtpncnvtWFXM_dIh2pIvC5bj7ToM-JrLtrwfe95gprbJC7p2e6y8jUN-We1ZPpR8/4mb/Tsp1qgS3RratTQTdTxP6og/h2/h001.tRm_BhWZshaVxKKWeyxfsEqbeBlkV8L2Q7h0z6ipy0g)** Thanks for your support. -Able Dems | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOgVMt4ILOU5XjfT4p_6sEAb79QnWaw-M3UMwAmxjEoeOV8lwzX88fZ2OZItcYBFESN4YJWI0rNron8xNh-Nmgl9AC_P5aQZqcTp8XSg78l-ViXMeqdHESG4xe9SWF4Xw-unkF2jOwwwhjvF0f3srvTK8mVb_9Om_dKMFam7PF5Gj-TyhCCrJBhSCqzFHKIPcrgc7D5gsL0FA0YcUyifV4S4KLNuLZNuuPeLWhIYGP0yaZ19IVcCXctKYSKmpmTBoERaHaxIEgrOtQArC0kzwN17QW_ABIIp7O1yxbcWEAbFSKsTu93CDeZko03pHWECG-YkBJBobXYTVaOZmQ4iKrPjo6BSZ9GKfcBDVryrpcWifsEU6Zy2b2VAkle5w_b9qr0wh7arywdhGRNEaBQhWxpV9l4VVH4KwQdFwZm3Zo_lk/4mb/Tsp1qgS3RratTQTdTxP6og/h3/h001.9vXXcCNNSu7hCJh614T9rqoioBHKL6szbAUDXXilHIA)

clean_body: | | | People will starve. Republicans will not stop until they have fully defunded SNAP, and they’ve almost accomplished that goal. When Republicans passed their Big Brutal Budget last summer, they included the largest cut to SNAP in the program’s history―$187 billion over ten years. These cuts range from increasing states’ costs to administer SNAP and forcing harsher time limits on benefits for veterans, older adults, people with disabilities, and families with children. The SNAP plays a crucial role in reducing poverty and improving health and economic outcomes, and is THE most effective anti-hunger program. BUT there’s a chance to stop attacks on SNAP. Democrats in the House and Senate have just introduced a bill with broad support from organizations across the country, the Restoring Food Security for American Families and Farmers Act of 2025. This will reverse the SNAP cuts enacted in the Big Brutal Budget. The shutdown showed us how painful it is when families are denied SNAP. Congress needs to hear from you. ** Thanks for your support. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. Peter,
Congresswoman Lauren Boebert has once again broken the internet for doing something immoral.
Recent filings with the Federal Election Commission show that she spent over $6,000 in campaign donor funds on traveling to and attending a Kid Rock concert. Many speculate that the two are dating.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019-KD3m1zT7XGcRlyJR7kIIjnKNvpQSsqCSgnZAtdrgwH_5rT2B40DG1PLJbp9M0KlW6ibfpoEAZg47GCexUlX3bwL-gUzk2iZVlJZxQJLvAR22hrBfIKKHmych5C7cXf3TfgL4VhSbyi-J-stBvI-p8chYkEM1_rLknexPZg6V0hvPkjw43iBtXFE8deoNvVtuk0qhC6sWgnEnmqX9xDpV60ka2Y6Y9p5xMguVZGwoM=&c=bRhPieqtoO8hb8OEsEBXH3WgytY7c3Oc-YWRlD9KE9KYaISKlVnpyQ==&ch=GussFn3sKz1js_A3PvmbWq9YB__zMY2hQBVCUWrZvhxlj2fJsSayQg==)

While she was busy lighting her donors' money on fire at the concert, a tornado hit two towns in her district, Elizabeth and Bennett. She couldn't be bothered to leave Texas and help coordinate the response to the disaster.
While she left the survivors to fend for themselves, her Democratic opponent Trisha Calvarese was on the ground doing what she could when our Congresswoman wouldn't.
It's no surprise that Boebert's campaign just reported its lowest ever fundraising haul. Her donors know that this money isn't going to anything political, they know she doesn't care about the district, and they've stopped giving.
Boebert was only reelected by 546 votes. In 2024 when Trisha and Boebert went head to head, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts, whereas Boebert underperformed Trump in every county.
All the signs are here -- Colorado's 4th is ready to reject Boebert by a landslide and we will make it happen but only if we can continue growing this campaign. name: Team Taylor
subject: We’re facing a public finance deadline later this month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
We need to show strength now.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251210-901&t=1&akid=902%2E294397%2EH4x9uZ)
Hi there,
We’re hoping you can contribute $4 to fuel our campaign today, but before we ask, here are four reasons why earning your support matters:
**1️⃣ Our election is in April, just four months from now.** We’re quickly running out of time to build the grassroots strength needed to win.
---
**2️⃣ Far-right billionaires like Elon Musk could flood this race with cash, and we’re counting on grassroots support to stay in this fight.** Dark money groups have spent millions of dollars trying to prop up extreme candidates running for justice, and they’re ready to do it again to boost Maria Lazar.
**3️⃣ Nomination papers are already circulating.** As you read this, we’re organizing across Wisconsin to officially get Judge Chris Taylor on the ballot, and that takes real resources, which grassroots support covers.
**4️⃣ We’re facing a public finance deadline later this month.** Everything we’ve raised up to Dec. 31 will be made public in early January — and Maria Lazar and the dark money groups backing her will use our numbers to decide how much they need to spend to try to buy this seat. [**We need to show strength _now_. Pitch in $4 to support our campaign through this crucial stretch.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/201?c0=em_ms_jct_20251210_1_ak.jEJz46&refcode=em20251210-901&t=3&akid=902%2E294397%2EH4x9uZ)
**[Donate $4 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/201?c0=em_ms_jct_20251210_1_ak.jEJz46&refcode=em20251210-901&t=22&akid=902%2E294397%2EH4x9uZ)**
Thanks so much,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251210-901&t=23&refcode2=902_294397_H4x9uZ&akid=902%2E294397%2EH4x9uZ)**

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. # [The Numbers Don't Lie: Why Two-Thirds of Latinos Now Feel Pessimistic About America](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5227558&post_id=181272546&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMjcyNTQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjU0MDA5MzgsImV4cCI6MTc2Nzk5MjkzOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMjc1NTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.XTvABbAHZrAeX1gGKqBrCGqg7bTFJsbEnIi3nJLhdvo)
### New Episode of the Latino Vote Podcast with Pew Research's Dr. Mark Hugo Lopez reveals record breaking shifts in Latino sentiment
| | [The Latino Vote Podcast](https://substack.com/@thelatinovotepodcast)

| Dec 10

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/thelatinovotepodcast/p/the-numbers-dont-lie-why-two-thirds?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/91f0d920-e774-4529-b518-1445d49ecd4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click Here to Read the Report](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e1a3454f-7622-4a67-9a9b-6eccac29432e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
If you've been following the wild swings in Latino voting behavior--the dramatic rightward shift in November 2024, followed by an equally dramatic correction in 2025--you've probably been asking yourself: _**What 's really going on here?**_
Today's episode of the Latino Vote Podcast cuts through the noise with hard data from someone who has been tracking the Latino community longer than almost anyone in this business: **Dr. Mark Hugo Lopez, Director of Race and Ethnicity Research at the Pew Research Center**.
* * *
## The Most Striking Findings in Pew Research History
What Dr. Lopez reveals is something we've never seen before in all the years of observing Latino public opinion.
"_We have never recorded Latino pessimism this high._ " -- Dr. Mark Hugo Lopez
According to Pew's latest data:
* **68%** of Latinos say the situation for Latinos in America is worse than a year ago -- the highest level of pessimism ever measured since Pew began tracking it in 2008.
* **70%** disapprove of Trump's job performance
* **65%** disapprove of his handling of immigration
* **61%** say the economy is worse
* **1 in 3** Latinos admit to struggling with paying for either utilities, food, medical care, rent, child care, or transportation costs.
* **Over half** fear deportation for themselves or someone they know

And perhaps most shocking: **1 in 3 Latino adults has thought about leaving the United States in the last six months** , with U.S.-born Latinos even more likely to say so than immigrants.
These numbers aren't just political polling. They're a portrait of a community under stress.
* * *
## The Trump Voter Question
One of the most fascinating parts of the conversation centered on Latino Trump voters. Yes, Trump won 48% of the Latino vote in 2024 but his approval among Latino Trump voters has already declined from 93% to 81%.
More tellingly, even Latino Trump voters are increasingly saying immigration enforcement has gone "too far"--even as their personal worry about deportation remains lower than other Latino groups. They're seeing the policy impacts differently than the personal impacts, creating a cognitive dissonance that could shape future political behavior.
Mark makes a fascinating point: Latino Trump voters actually look **more** like non-Latino Trump voters than Latino Republicans historically have looked like other Republicans. That suggests something unique about the Trump coalition and how it attracted Latinos who weren't necessarily traditional Republicans.
* * *
## The Latino Demographic is Changing
Dr. Lopez has been tracking Latino demographics through massive changes: 72 millions immigrants have arrived in the US since 1965, half from Latin America, a quarter from Mexico alone.
But here's what most people don't know: we're now witnessing the first decline in the Latino immigrant population in 50 years. Think about what that means for voting behavior of U.S.-born Latino voters with a very different relationship to the immigrant experience.
Dr. Lopez raises a question that should keep political strategists up at night: With 40% of U.S.-born Latinos marrying outside their ethnicity, and a growing third-plus generation that's further removed from immigration, what does "Latino voter" even mean going forward?
* * *
## What This All Means?
What we're witnessing is a community in profound transition. The optimism that has historically characterized Latino voters--driven by youth, recent immigration, and faith in the American Dream--is giving way to something darker and more uncertain.
Mark's work serves as a crucial guide through this transformation. As America becomes a non-white majority country (and yes, that's happening), the breadcrumbs he's leaving will help future generations understand how we got here.
* * *
_**Don 't forget**_: Like, subscribe, and share this with every political operative who needs to understand what actually works with Latino voters.

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Mergers are complicated. Protecting LA's economy isn’t.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121022565/588103479/-1798313451?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UwZjY5NzEtMGNkNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yfYxQxImrDcjb8fZ8rA8bElW8CuPN5q6YEm5OGCUH8c=) Friend, I'm sure you've seen the headlines, and are wondering what these potential mergers mean. Netflix’s proposed purchase of Warner Bros., and Paramount's late counter-offer, is complicated; but what is clear are the troubling impacts this corporate consolidation could have on consumers, our creative climate, on the rule of law, and for jobs and the economy in our region. [**Recently, I had the opportunity to speak with NBC Los Angeles to break down this situation. I encourage you to watch:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121022566/588103480/-803653937?v=ShAiFe4u3a4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UwZjY5NzEtMGNkNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yfYxQxImrDcjb8fZ8rA8bElW8CuPN5q6YEm5OGCUH8c=&emci=e3a86b6b-0cd6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3e0f6971-0cd6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8447100) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121022567/588103481/-803653937?v=ShAiFe4u3a4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UwZjY5NzEtMGNkNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yfYxQxImrDcjb8fZ8rA8bElW8CuPN5q6YEm5OGCUH8c=&emci=e3a86b6b-0cd6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3e0f6971-0cd6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8447100) | ****[Watch](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121022568/588103482/-803653937?v=ShAiFe4u3a4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UwZjY5NzEtMGNkNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yfYxQxImrDcjb8fZ8rA8bElW8CuPN5q6YEm5OGCUH8c=&emci=e3a86b6b-0cd6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3e0f6971-0cd6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8447100)****

Netflix’s proposed purchase of Warner Bros., and Paramount's late counter-offer, is complicated; but what is clear are the troubling impacts this corporate consolidation could have on consumers, our creative climate, on the rule of law, and for jobs and the economy in our region. | ** I am fighting to make sure the hardworking folks who are the lifeblood of our economy are centered in these discussions, and that consumers are protected from price increases. Peter,
Another political heavyweight has joined our fight to stop Trump from rigging congressional maps and locking in decades of MAGA rule:
Senator Michael Bennet just came out in favor of emergency redistricting in Colorado, saying Trump has taken us "down this dangerous path" and that Dems must "fight back" now.
---
| [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y4nsMjEsiGsMAqOnxtV89GeJ44NxrHee8S1LCbfQy7DY0ePYNjz9DlEkgPIHJgH6RcCxJa0ZBZaDWBOXgqPdWjoE2lZqZHZlD03Z9TyspzJgClYszSouhMOu-_1aNQ8PnaNZI7mxKmPuB5fssgi_HjaRCNv3c_prf2slHhjtrqCmhhGDQNJp32DYxX3ZM3kMplqgG4hRkknD6O1y4klCPkF6fxeLalBmJ-X1rLA2Z4k=&c=T74GiSRA-cpukpg1aAuPDpnDfMHVnHnxs9Lsf-ejgfJJJya_R4ZG6Q==&ch=pOBIAmGIYE1X7HS6JyebGih_wBRJwW2gMYLyNfQZp4ql_ln4IiAL9A==)

Fair Fight Colorado is the organization that is introducing the ballot initiative to let Coloradans decide on a new congressional map that makes Colorado bluer.
Senator Bennet now joins Colorado Attorney General Phil Weiser, Congressman Jason Crow, Secretary of State Jena Griswold, and countless other Colorado elected officials who are coming out in droves in support of the effort to redistrict Colorado.
We're making huge progress in our mission to ensure blue state Colorado fights back but success is far from assured. The real fight still lies ahead.
We need to raise millions in a short timeframe to fund an unprecedented push to gather the hundreds of thousands of signatures we will need to get this on the ballot. name: Team Trisha
subject: Boebert did something immoral to see alleged lover Kid Rock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
While she was busy lighting her donors' money on fire at the concert, a tornado hit two towns in her district, Elizabeth and Bennett.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-5HJfhTVogHgyjJmoW8WStOo_Ndoa9CyZEcXD-XsG3FBUv97m5YXA1NeBc883oE_wC-6YcNuTpRfUfy1YoS5gOSmYWlk5Lk2Nsk1cBJ0ki1hREtHAf2m_uY5ITNmR134s5UrwxdbUcZ7pBaRqJCBZJ7iM0hOtOm8fUFR6BtXp395cXrZg-dSc_bKTZdDhq7gzyUuCXsoBc5GM7fDi8sg7W5_Ab-K-hij&c=q7pg1T0xX47e_84JVQPmGX79blydqWi7Tzh-TNetJGl7DOwWWTMwag==&ch=NvxeuHF_p-J2uW09asB4mXbgBrb4ogiVpgmucD0NfMA4I3YUBU340g==)

|

Peter,
Congresswoman Lauren Boebert has once again broken the internet for doing something immoral.
Recent filings with the Federal Election Commission show that she spent over $6,000 in campaign donor funds on traveling to and attending a Kid Rock concert. Many speculate that the two are dating.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-5HJfhTVogHgyjJmoW8WStOo_Ndoa9CyZEcXD-XsG3FBUv97m5YXA1NeBc883oE_wC-6YcNuTpRfUfy1YoS5gOSmYWlk5Lk2Nsk1cBJ0ki1hREtHAf2m_uY5ITNmR134s5UrwxdbUcZ7pBaRqJCBZJ7iM0hOtOm8fUFR6BtXp395cXrZg-dSc_bKTZdDhq7gzyUuCXsoBc5GM7fDi8sg7Xgu9aLY3KWM&c=q7pg1T0xX47e_84JVQPmGX79blydqWi7Tzh-TNetJGl7DOwWWTMwag==&ch=NvxeuHF_p-J2uW09asB4mXbgBrb4ogiVpgmucD0NfMA4I3YUBU340g==)
---

While she was busy lighting her donors' money on fire at the concert, a tornado hit two towns in her district, Elizabeth and Bennett. She couldn't be bothered to leave Texas and help coordinate the response to the disaster.
While she left the survivors to fend for themselves, her Democratic opponent Trisha Calvarese was on the ground doing what she could when our Congresswoman wouldn't.
It's no surprise that Boebert's campaign just reported its lowest ever fundraising haul. Her donors know that this money isn't going to anything political, they know she doesn't care about the district, and they've stopped giving.
Boebert was only reelected by 546 votes, or less than 0.5% of the vote. In 2024 when Trisha and Boebert went head to head, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts, whereas Boebert underperformed Trump in every county.
All the signs are here -- Colorado's 4th is ready to reject Boebert by a landslide and we will make it happen but only if we can continue growing this campaign. [Can you please make a donation of $50, $25, or even $5, to help us fire Boebert, flip Colorado's 4th, and reclaim the House? ](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-5HJfhTVogHgyjJmoW8WStOo_Ndoa9CyZEcXD-XsG3FBUv97m5YXA1NeBc883oE_BCsxycrLOWln3jdSc__jAitUqnfdtvloY2bWkW8SYWiIR923QTQX_GWYYNh8eVYoEBfsrQdOnMuMkR1TMvG1oZ3X8F6wg-SNZPwJbWUqUCpHsFJUMik-Z8cxdHHf-zqiC7JLa9YPur2ugFZoNAI_7y4oDTUjk2BqGY5I9oYl-KhWTUUyrSiFeQ==&c=q7pg1T0xX47e_84JVQPmGX79blydqWi7Tzh-TNetJGl7DOwWWTMwag==&ch=NvxeuHF_p-J2uW09asB4mXbgBrb4ogiVpgmucD0NfMA4I3YUBU340g==)

Team — 86% of all voters support banning Members of Congress from holding individual stocks. Yet, current legislation **fails** to properly address Congressional stock trading. Certain lawmakers are leveraging non-public information to profit from public office and beef up their stock portfolios. At the same time, Supreme Court Justices are accepting lavish gifts from Republican megadonors, including luxury vacations and flights on private jets. As a Senator from New Mexico, I’m focused on delivering for my state, our country, and the legacy we will leave our children and grandkids. The same should go for ALL members of Congress, who were elected to represent their constituents, not their personal investments. We must ban stock trading by Members and root out corruption in Washington. **This reform is long overdue.** [_**If you agree, please sign on to stand with me in the fight for accountability and transparency in Washington.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121022758/588104221/-1544283084?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWJhYmE0Ni0wZGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnIJazMRS8HnitXxLh-mIvlV4wYNYRADiYTESAhsLG0=&emci=88baba46-0dd6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=89baba46-0dd6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=252045) | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121022759/588104222/-1544283084?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWJhYmE0Ni0wZGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnIJazMRS8HnitXxLh-mIvlV4wYNYRADiYTESAhsLG0=&emci=88baba46-0dd6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=89baba46-0dd6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=252045)

name: Team DASS
subject: This goes way beyond the FTC…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121022977/588104935/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2U3N2E4Zi0wZGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=546bPJ49DkMnSH49oJc7ycMlEN3P_zyoCO4FRsvcrzs=)
**➤➤ BREAKING: Trump case at SCOTUS could destroy independent watchdogs** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121022978/588104936/-248329304?refcode=em-12.10.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2U3N2E4Zi0wZGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=546bPJ49DkMnSH49oJc7ycMlEN3P_zyoCO4FRsvcrzs=)
* * *
Friend, Donald Trump’s assault on democracy isn’t just about elections anymore. Now he’s targeting the agencies that hold him accountable. **The Trump administration is asking the Supreme Court to eliminate the very concept of independent federal agencies, starting with the FTC, but the consequences could ripple out to the FEC, FCC, and more.** In short: If Trump wins this case, **future presidents could fire any official who stands in their way,** and agencies meant to protect consumers, regulate elections, or police corruption would become extensions of executive power. subject: Not yet, but soon
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Hegseth ordered a report to be delivered to him by today, and when it does, we’ll learn if he’s going to try to court-martial Mark Kelly.
#

It hasn’t dropped yet, team.
But it could come at any time.
Hegseth ordered a report to be delivered to him by today, and when it is, we’ll learn if he’s going to try to court-martial Mark Kelly.
[**Before that happens, we’re asking you to rush a contribution so we have all the resources we need to respond.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.FHtwNx&refcode=em251210-2-1mil&t=1&akid=6289%2E6688874%2EFJTY5X)

Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I know this feeling well
body:
Every family deserves to have a fair shot. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121023016/588105063/-793564535?refcode=WUEFHL19_20251210_DebSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1057422&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjVkNjdiNS0wZGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bes2WapyHYbK4O_HxR3ajEKuX8HirNrV4EkF6wFgn_E=) Hey Peter — it’s Deb Haaland. When I think about the holiday season, I think about the parents who are putting on a brave face for their children while they try to make ends meet. I know that feeling well.

About fifteen years ago, my child and I were struggling. The only food in our cupboard was pinto beans and flour, and I wanted to give them a real holiday meal. I applied for emergency food stamps, but I was denied. I broke down in tears because I didn’t know how to tell my child: It’s expensive to be poor.

That night, we ate what we had, and I tried to keep their spirits up. **This year, many families are doing the same thing, trying to stay strong for their kids even when things feel uncertain. It shouldn’t be this hard.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121023017/588105064/-793564535?refcode=WUEFHL19_20251210_DebSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1057422&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjVkNjdiNS0wZGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bes2WapyHYbK4O_HxR3ajEKuX8HirNrV4EkF6wFgn_E=) Peter, these moments shaped who I am. It’s why I strongly believe leaders should make people’s lives easier, not harder. We all want good roads, safe communities, strong education, access to parks and affordable, healthy food to eat. [**This campaign is about giving every family in New Mexico the fair shot they deserve. If you’re able, will you split a donation of $20, or anything you can, between EMILYs List and our campaign to help us keep New Mexico moving forward?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121023018/588105065/-793564535?refcode=WUEFHL19_20251210_DebSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1057422&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjVkNjdiNS0wZGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bes2WapyHYbK4O_HxR3ajEKuX8HirNrV4EkF6wFgn_E=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121023019/588105066/-793564535?refcode=WUEFHL19_20251210_DebSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1057422&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjVkNjdiNS0wZGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bes2WapyHYbK4O_HxR3ajEKuX8HirNrV4EkF6wFgn_E=)
---
I know the fights we face today are bigger than ever – and I’m prepared to get to work immediately. On Day One, I will begin tackling the rising affordability crisis and healthcare costs, so we can build a state where every single person is safe, healthy, and can thrive. But I can’t do this work alone.

Our grassroots-powered campaign was built for the people, by the people – and that includes you, Peter. [**So please, can I count on you to split $10, $20, or whatever you can comfortably spare between EMILYs List and my campaign to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in New Mexico, and build a better future for working families?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121023020/588105067/-793564535?refcode=WUEFHL19_20251210_DebSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1057422&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjVkNjdiNS0wZGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bes2WapyHYbK4O_HxR3ajEKuX8HirNrV4EkF6wFgn_E=)

clean_body: Every family deserves to have a fair shot. | = Hey Peter — it’s Deb Haaland. When I think about the holiday season, I think about the parents who are putting on a brave face for their children while they try to make ends meet. I know that feeling well. About fifteen years ago, my child and I were struggling. The only food in our cupboard was pinto beans and flour, and I wanted to give them a real holiday meal. I applied for emergency food stamps, but I was denied. I broke down in tears because I didn’t know how to tell my child: It’s expensive to be poor. That night, we ate what we had, and I tried to keep their spirits up. This year, many families are doing the same thing, trying to stay strong for their kids even when things feel uncertain. It shouldn’t be this hard. = Peter, these moments shaped who I am. It’s why I strongly believe leaders should make people’s lives easier, not harder. We all want good roads, safe communities, strong education, access to parks and affordable, healthy food to eat. = | = I know the fights we face today are bigger than ever – and I’m prepared to get to work immediately. On Day One, I will begin tackling the rising affordability crisis and healthcare costs, so we can build a state where every single person is safe, healthy, and can thrive. But I can’t do this work alone. Our grassroots-powered campaign was built for the people, by the people – and that includes you, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your split contribution will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Be fierce, Deb = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I know this feeling well
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Every family deserves to have a fair shot.
#
Hey Peter — it's Deb Haaland. When I think about the holiday season, I think about the parents who are putting on a brave face for their children while they try to make ends meet. I know that feeling well.
About fifteen years ago, my child and I were struggling. The only food in our cupboard was pinto beans and flour, and I wanted to give them a real holiday meal. I applied for emergency food stamps, but I was denied. I broke down in tears because I didn’t know how to tell my child: It’s expensive to be poor.
That night, we ate what we had, and I tried to keep their spirits up. **This year, many families are doing the same thing, trying to stay strong for their kids even when things feel uncertain. It shouldn’t be this hard.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98489?refcode=em20251210-9815&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9815%2E614464%2EnDCcb0)
Peter, these moments shaped who I am. It’s why I strongly believe leaders should make people’s lives easier, not harder. We all want good roads, safe communities, strong education, access to parks and affordable, healthy food to eat.
**[This campaign is about giving every family in New Mexico the fair shot they deserve. If you’re able, will you split a donation of $10, or anything you can, between State Democrats Committee and our campaign to help us keep New Mexico moving forward?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98490?refcode=em20251210-9815&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=9815%2E614464%2EnDCcb0)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98489?refcode=em20251210-9815&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9815%2E614464%2EnDCcb0)**
I know the fights we face today are bigger than ever – and I’m prepared to get to work immediately. On Day One, I will begin tackling the rising affordability crisis and healthcare costs, so we can build a state where every single person is safe, healthy, and can thrive. But I can’t do this work alone.
Our grassroots-powered campaign was built for the people, by the people – and that includes you, Peter. **[So please, can I count on you to split $10, $25, or whatever you can comfortably spare between my campaign and State Democrats Committee to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in New Mexico, and build a better future for working families?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98489?refcode=em20251210-9815&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9815%2E614464%2EnDCcb0)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98490?refcode=em20251210-9815&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=5&akid=9815%2E614464%2EnDCcb0) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98490?refcode=em20251210-9815&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=6&akid=9815%2E614464%2EnDCcb0) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98490?refcode=em20251210-9815&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=9815%2E614464%2EnDCcb0) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98490?refcode=em20251210-9815&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=9815%2E614464%2EnDCcb0) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98490?refcode=em20251210-9815&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=9815%2E614464%2EnDCcb0) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98490?refcode=em20251210-9815&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=9815%2E614464%2EnDCcb0) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98489?refcode=em20251210-9815&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9815%2E614464%2EnDCcb0)
---
Be fierce,
Deb
