name: Becca Balint
subject: I need to speak honestly about this moment.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121023967/588107952/-785282667?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTQwMDM3YS0xMGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d4qlTdnwPdsgIDvKdQ8Fo54GpScRXBbrxmgELZwsNos=)
---
Peter, **I want to talk with you about something that’s been weighing on me.** You may have seen the news about Admiral Rachel Levine. **Trump officials went back and erased her name from her own official portrait and replaced it with the name she no longer uses.** Think about the time and energy it takes to do something like that—something meant only to hurt and divide. And while families are struggling with rising costs, and health care keeps sliding further out of reach for too many, this is what Trump is choosing to focus on: **attacking people instead of solving the real problems facing Americans.** **But here’s the thing... I’m fighting back. I’m working every day to push for policies that actually help people: lowering costs, expanding mental health care, and protecting every person’s dignity and right to access the health care they need and deserve.** [**If you’re with me, I’m asking you to click here and chip in whatever you can today. Your support gives us the power to push back on these attacks and keep fighting for a country where EVERYONE is treated with basic respect.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121023968/588107953/-1248919484?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTQwMDM3YS0xMGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d4qlTdnwPdsgIDvKdQ8Fo54GpScRXBbrxmgELZwsNos=) **[CLICK HERE IF YOU'RE WITH ME!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121023969/588107954/-1248919484?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTQwMDM3YS0xMGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d4qlTdnwPdsgIDvKdQ8Fo54GpScRXBbrxmgELZwsNos=)** **I spoke about this the other day because I felt it in my bones.** When Admiral Levine came to Vermont, she showed up everywhere she went with kindness, professionalism, and a focus on serving the American people. And that’s what leadership looks like. What we’re seeing now isn’t strength, It’s a deep sense of insecurity. It’s smallness. It’s a government lashing out instead of doing the real work, like lowering costs, strengthening mental health care, fixing our broken housing market, and protecting our freedoms. **And here's the truth: moments like this hit close to home for me.** I’m the first woman and first openly gay person to represent Vermont in Congress**. I know what it’s like to have people question your place in the world. I also know what it means to keep standing tall anyway.** I ran for Congress as a fighter and an empath. Vermonters know me. _You know me_. **I don’t back down from bullies, and I don’t lose sight of people’s dignity—ever.** This fight is about whether we keep moving toward a country where everyone gets to live with safety, respect, and opportunity... or whether we let cruelty and chaos continue to take the wheel. [**If you’re with me in this fight, I’m asking you to help power this work today. clean_body: | = Peter, I want to talk with you about something that’s been weighing on me. You may have seen the news about Admiral Rachel Levine. Trump officials went back and erased her name from her own official portrait and replaced it with the name she no longer uses. Think about the time and energy it takes to do something like that—something meant only to hurt and divide. And while families are struggling with rising costs, and health care keeps sliding further out of reach for too many, this is what Trump is choosing to focus on: attacking people instead of solving the real problems facing Americans. But here’s the thing... I’m fighting back. I’m working every day to push for policies that actually help people: lowering costs, expanding mental health care, and protecting every person’s dignity and right to access the health care they need and deserve. = = I spoke about this the other day because I felt it in my bones. When Admiral Levine came to Vermont, she showed up everywhere she went with kindness, professionalism, and a focus on serving the American people. And that’s what leadership looks like. What we’re seeing now isn’t strength, It’s a deep sense of insecurity. It’s smallness. It’s a government lashing out instead of doing the real work, like lowering costs, strengthening mental health care, fixing our broken housing market, and protecting our freedoms. And here's the truth: moments like this hit close to home for me. I’m the first woman and first openly gay person to represent Vermont in Congress. I know what it’s like to have people question your place in the world. I also know what it means to keep standing tall anyway. I ran for Congress as a fighter and an empath. Vermonters know me. You know me. I don’t back down from bullies, and I don’t lose sight of people’s dignity—ever. This fight is about whether we keep moving toward a country where everyone gets to live with safety, respect, and opportunity... or whether we let cruelty and chaos continue to take the wheel. = Thanks for reading. Thanks for caring. And thank you for believing in a movement that lifts people up, instead of putting them down. — Becca If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: I just launched this historic campaign, and I need you with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
Texas deserves a fighter who won’t back down.
#
Y'all, it's Jasmine.
I’m running for the United States Senate because Texas deserves a fighter who won’t back down.
You know me. I didn’t come to Congress to play it safe. I came to raise hell for working families, protect our freedoms, and call out extremism wherever it rears its head. Now, with the stakes higher than ever – a madman in the White House and his most loyal foot soldiers in Congress giving him carte blanche – I’m stepping up again. This time, to flip a Senate seat that Republicans have held for far too long.
**Let me be blunt: Texas is ready.**
**[If you’re ready, watch my launch video and then rush a donation between my campaign and Robert Garcia to help us have a historic first week>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121024006/588108073/185592584?refcode=251210em-launch-long&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2Q0OGE4MC0xMGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UO054XRZDElJuip2ImNnxK4zGqI0qTEY-0hAKEmpTlU=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121024010/588108078/185592584?refcode=251210em-launch-long&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2Q0OGE4MC0xMGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UO054XRZDElJuip2ImNnxK4zGqI0qTEY-0hAKEmpTlU=)
[WATCH NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121024014/588108082/185592584?refcode=251210em-launch-long&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2Q0OGE4MC0xMGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UO054XRZDElJuip2ImNnxK4zGqI0qTEY-0hAKEmpTlU=)
Texas is younger, more diverse, and more energized than at any point in our history. We’ve seen what happens when Republicans hold all the power – attacks on voting rights, a near-total abortion ban, book bans, cruelty, and a government run for the wealthy and well-connected.
Meanwhile, everyday Texans are working harder than ever and falling further behind.
_Folks, I’m over it._
I’m running because I believe Texas deserves a Senator who actually gives a damn.
A Senator who shows up.
A Senator who fights for justice, for working people, and for the truth.
A Senator who isn’t afraid to say the quiet part out loud when extremists in Austin and Washington come after our rights.
But I’ll be honest: this race will not be easy. Not by a long shot. Republicans will spend whatever it takes to stop us. They know that if Texas flips, the entire national map changes for 2026 and beyond.
**That’s why I need you. Not next month, not later this week._Right now_. _We need a historic first week._**
**[If you’re with me, show that you have my back today by splitting a donation of any amount between my campaign and Robert Garcia to help me kick off this campaign with the strength we need to win in Texas.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121024018/588108086/185592584?refcode=251210em-launch-long&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2Q0OGE4MC0xMGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UO054XRZDElJuip2ImNnxK4zGqI0qTEY-0hAKEmpTlU=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121024021/588108089/185592584?refcode=251210em-launch-long&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2Q0OGE4MC0xMGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UO054XRZDElJuip2ImNnxK4zGqI0qTEY-0hAKEmpTlU=)
I’m running because I believe Texas is worth fighting for. And I know that with the momentum Democrats have right now combined with the power of this team, we can make history next year.
With gratitude and fire,
Jasmine Crockett

* * *

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Failed U.S. Plan to Rebuild Afghanistan Cost $145 Billion with Hundreds of Millions Going to Taliban
body:
For nearly two decades the U.S. government spent a breathtaking $145
billion on a failed plan to rebuild Afghanistan and at least $26
billion of it was lost to waste, fraud and abuse, according to the
final report published by the Special Inspector General for
Afghanistan Reconstruction (SIGAR).

[alt_text]

[*****]
December 10, 2025

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78219&L=36637&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmFpbGVkLXBsYW4tdG8tcmVidWlsZC1hZmdoYW5pc3Rhbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=5275e8cb2d7fe10c64dacd2d359205b508bda06129296d617a8171b5151b6c0c]

For nearly two decades the U.S. government spent a breathtaking
$145 billion on a failed plan to rebuild Afghanistan and at least $26
billion of it was lost to waste, fraud and abuse, according to the
final report published by the Special Inspector General for
Afghanistan Reconstruction (SIGAR). The United States also left behind
over $38 billion in military equipment and military and civilian
infrastructure, the audit reveals, offering enraging details about the
U.S. government’s costly debacle to restore a terrorist nation that
promptly returned to Taliban rule the moment American troops left in
2021.

clean_body: For nearly two decades the U.S. government spent a breathtaking $145 billion on a failed plan to rebuild Afghanistan and at least $26 billion of it was lost to waste, fraud and abuse, according to the final report published by the Special Inspector General for Afghanistan Reconstruction (SIGAR). [alt_text] [*****] December 10, 2025 [article-image] [] For nearly two decades the U.S. government spent a breathtaking $145 billion on a failed plan to rebuild Afghanistan and at least $26 billion of it was lost to waste, fraud and abuse, according to the final report published by the Special Inspector General for Afghanistan Reconstruction (SIGAR). The United States also left behind over $38 billion in military equipment and military and civilian infrastructure, the audit reveals, offering enraging details about the U.S. government’s costly debacle to restore a terrorist nation that promptly returned to Taliban rule the moment American troops left in 2021. I'll be debating the virtues (or lack thereof) of Big Tech. I'll be teamed up with my Breaking Points co-host Emily Jashinsky and we'll be taking on two libertarians, one my former co-host at Rising, as well as Elizabeth Nolan Brown.
It's at 7 pm tonight at The Miracle Theatre (535 8th St SE) if you don't have plans. [Tickets ](https://substack.com/redirect/5efde103-3eb7-4205-a206-f791a5f8c86e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)are $30 but if you use the promo code **RVBTFRIEND** the tickets are just $10. After the show, the venue turns into a little gathering where we'll mingle with the folks there.
[Get the tickets here](https://substack.com/redirect/5efde103-3eb7-4205-a206-f791a5f8c86e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

Peter, it's Charlie Bailey, and I have some exciting news to share. Last night, Georgia saw a stunning political upset: **Eric Gisler’s victory in the HD-121 special election.** This win sends a powerful message: Georgians are rejecting failed Republican leadership and rallying behind Democrats who are fighting to lower costs, keep health care affordable, and put people first. What makes this victory even more remarkable? It happened in a Trump +12 district. This is a massive momentum boost for our movement, and it proves that when we invest in our candidates and our message, we can win anywhere. Georgia Democrats invested $50,000 into this race, and it paid off. Now, we’re just 10 seats away from taking the majority in the State House. But the real test is ahead, and we can’t do it without you, Peter. Our mission for 2026 is clear: we must flip more seats to push back on Republicans’ majority and expand Democratic wins statewide. To make that happen, we need to build our infrastructure now. [We have the momentum — let’s build on it. Will you chip in $10 today to help us carry this energy into 2026 and secure critical victories all across Georgia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121024408/588109294/-871074936?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_121025_ELECTIONRESULTS_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmZmMTNiZi0xMWQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3QjcxrnrPBJ3t3Yir17qYJ-SdyaeoySVHFf03Lz_7iY=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Last night, Georgia saw a stunning political upset: Eric Gisler’s victory in the HD-121 special election. This win sends a powerful message: Georgians are rejecting failed Republican leadership and rallying behind Democrats who are fighting to lower costs, keep health care affordable, and put people first. What makes this victory even more remarkable? It happened in a Trump +12 district. This is a massive momentum boost for our movement, and it proves that when we invest in our candidates and our message, we can win anywhere. Georgia Democrats invested $50,000 into this race, and it paid off. Now, we’re just 10 seats away from taking the majority in the State House. name: LeVar Burton
subject: Endorsing Mandela Barnes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
I’m supporting Mandela Barnes for Governor
| [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=SBD_MB_EM_FR_121025_LeVarBurton_Tier1_D1_S1&t=2&akid=5704%2E196590%2EpzrCxm) Hi , LeVar Burton here. You might know me from Roots, Reading Rainbow, or Star Trek: The Next Generation. **Today, I’m more than proud to share that I'm endorsing my good friend Mandela Barnes to be the next governor of Wisconsin.** This is a critical moment in our country — no one can deny that. Mandela’s bold leadership is exactly what we need to tackle today’s problems with creative, innovative solutions. **[Will you chip in to Mandela’s campaign today?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=SBD_MB_EM_FR_121025_LeVarBurton_Tier1_D1_S1&t=3&akid=5704%2E196590%2EpzrCxm)** I come from a family of educators, and it has been my life’s mission to make sure that future generations have the skills to learn, grow, and be civically engaged. Education and the arts have been under constant attack by this current administration. And after hosting Reading Rainbow for more than 20 years on PBS, I was devastated to see federal funding for public broadcasting completely decimated. I believe that protecting services like these is vital. Hearing each other’s stories brings us together, fosters connection, and keeps us engaged with our communities. I know that as governor, Mandela is going to do just that. You don’t have to take my word for it — Mandela has an important story to tell. I look forward to seeing him on the campaign trail as he shares his vision for a Wisconsin where everyone can live up to their fullest potential. **[I hope you’ll join me in supporting Mandela with a contribution of $15 or $27.](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=SBD_MB_EM_FR_121025_LeVarBurton_Tier1_D1_S1&t=4&akid=5704%2E196590%2EpzrCxm)** _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6574?amount=15&refcode=SBD_MB_EM_FR_121025_LeVarBurton_Tier1_D1_S1&t=5&akid=5704%2E196590%2EpzrCxm)

clean_body: I’m supporting Mandela Barnes for Governor | Hi , LeVar Burton here. You might know me from Roots, Reading Rainbow, or Star Trek: The Next Generation. Today, I’m more than proud to share that I'm endorsing my good friend Mandela Barnes to be the next governor of Wisconsin. This is a critical moment in our country — no one can deny that. Mandela’s bold leadership is exactly what we need to tackle today’s problems with creative, innovative solutions. I come from a family of educators, and it has been my life’s mission to make sure that future generations have the skills to learn, grow, and be civically engaged. Education and the arts have been under constant attack by this current administration. And after hosting Reading Rainbow for more than 20 years on PBS, I was devastated to see federal funding for public broadcasting completely decimated. I believe that protecting services like these is vital. Hearing each other’s stories brings us together, fosters connection, and keeps us engaged with our communities. I know that as governor, Mandela is going to do just that. You don’t have to take my word for it — Mandela has an important story to tell. I look forward to seeing him on the campaign trail as he shares his vision for a Wisconsin where everyone can live up to their fullest potential. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | | | | | | | | | | Until next time, LeVar Burton | | Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin P.O. Box 90541 Milwaukee, WI 53209

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: My latest endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Brad is the real deal.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2728%2E4032634%2E34O3uE)
---
Friend, **I'm endorsing Brad Lander for New York's 10th Congressional District.** Let me tell you why: First, Brad is the real deal. Whether it was fighting for affordable housing as city councilor or rooting out corruption as comptroller, **Brad has always shown up for New Yorkers. He has the experience, the values, and the grit to not just win this race, but deliver for working families.** After Trump’s ICE agents kidnapped New Yorkers, Brad put his body on the line to stop them. When Trump and Musk stole $80 million from New York, Brad uncovered it and forced the City to get it back. This moment in history needs leaders who fight, not fold. The people of NY-10 don't want leaders who think it’s business as usual. We deserve a Member of Congress who will fight like our lives depend on it, because they do. [**We need more fighters in Washington now more than ever, and Brad is a fighter. Can you split a donation between Brad and our campaign today?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3287?t=8&akid=2728%2E4032634%2E34O3uE)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Call to Action: Tell Congress NO on Extending Obamacare COVID Subsidies
body:
Subsidies costing taxpayers billions and raising premiums
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/0100019b0a491952-52b13b26-18f8-4728-888e-c8783143b7ed-000000/UNePd_aWR77Ih0_7156xG6XHCnP3DqEaWVU8op6eKkg=435)Patriot–**Obamacare is an abject failure.** For years, Washington promised that Obamacare would make health care more affordable. Instead, American families are stuck with skyrocketing premiums, shrinking options, and coverage that fails when people need it most.During COVID, Congress doubled down on Obamacare failures and poured hundreds of billions of dollars into subsidies to hide rising insurance premiums caused by Obamacare.The COVID-era subsidies have resulted in massive fraud, including 160,000 applications that included unauthorized changes made by insurance brokers or agents.Also, over 1.5 million people making 400 percent of the Federal Poverty Level received taxpayer subsidies. Even worse, households earning up to $600,000 a year are receiving taxpayer-funded health insurance!Insurance companies also reaped the rewards, receiving hundreds of billions of taxpayer dollars while raising our premiums, denying care, and making our health care system worse and more expensive.Now, **_Democrats and several Republicans in Congress want to continue fleecing American taxpayers and driving our nation further into debt_** by extending the “temporary” expanded Obamacare subsidies. This is a massive shift given how many times Republicans have vowed to repeal the disastrous legislation.If $1.3 trillion over 10 years hasn’t made Obamacare affordable, _another half-trillion won’t fix it either._[_**Call your member of Congress**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Fno-to-obamacare-covid-subsidies%2F/1/0100019b0a491952-52b13b26-18f8-4728-888e-c8783143b7ed-000000/-mOMgO4YwDPO2DBO0FKu-CRPp_fQFHLaDakKIL9_MyM=435)**and urge them to end the wasteful COVID-era subsidies NOW.**[ TAKE ACTION: CONTACT CONGRESS](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Fno-to-obamacare-covid-subsidies%2F/2/0100019b0a491952-52b13b26-18f8-4728-888e-c8783143b7ed-000000/UG2mhKjk8f2kiNyD9nBwliwj3f8av5vKED1IbnWkvPc=435)In liberty,Jenny Beth Martin[CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/0100019b0a491952-52b13b26-18f8-4728-888e-c8783143b7ed-000000/Pw7sJ0SJenYhkLifDjjQujQHzxD2rphieGJkxX8khoA=435) _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved.__Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:[_**Tea Party Patriots Action**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/2/0100019b0a491952-52b13b26-18f8-4728-888e-c8783143b7ed-000000/ovZ62WtKUAo9D4H8655n7WLRzbrPNR3GctU85M0YWtA=435)
2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314
Woodstock, GA 30189Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [unsubscribe](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/1/0100019b0a491952-52b13b26-18f8-4728-888e-c8783143b7ed-000000/w2klnuypuzZR7nrG0dPPanEqxLfEmxNWzXeyy8XmeQs=435) or [update your preferences](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/2/0100019b0a491952-52b13b26-18f8-4728-888e-c8783143b7ed-000000/gPbEFJjM1ZGATRRTbA2TXQO8u04ONL_P8thCaawU1lk=435).

subject: BREAKING: Why Conservatives Are Rallying Behind Reeves
body:
The Bull Elephant just confirmed what Virginia conservatives already know.
| | |

| |

| Peter, The Bull Elephant just spotlighted something every Virginia conservative needs to hear – and it confirms exactly what we've been saying: **Bryce Reeves is the conservative warrior who can finally take down Mark Warner.** _Here 's why people across Virginia are fired up:_
* **A real U.S. Army Ranger – not a career politician**
* **Former narcotics detective who fought cartels on Virginia streets**
* **Small business owner who 's lived the struggle of regulation**
* **A proven conservative who** _**delivers**_**results**
* **Endorsed by Virginia 's strongest conservative leaders**

And that's only scratching the surface.
---
| | [SUPPORT REEVES FOR U.S. SENATE](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fleader-va-needs%3Futm_campaign=20251209_Reeves_LeaderVANeeds%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/2/0100019b0a4932ab-d70ca5b6-3853-4a97-84d7-e037d080edd0-000000/UUn70aYZVkC90KtvLWr6qG6bQiQ=456)

| Bryce's story isn't the typical Washington resume – it was built through grit, service, and standing up for Virginians every single day. ** _He 's _****_NOT_**** _another politician. He 's a fighter. A protector. A leader who's lived what Virginians are living._** And the contrast in this race couldn't be clearer. **Reeves vs. Warner is the starkest choice Virginia has seen in years.** One spent decades in Washington. The other spent decades on the front lines. That's why conservatives are uniting behind Bryce – _and why this race is quickly becoming one of the most important in the entire 2026 cycle._

name: Tobias Read
subject: Add your name: Oppose President Trump’s plan to block food assistance for Oregon families
body:
I will never bow down to President Trump — and neither should you| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121024967/588111350/-569431239?refcode=251210em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGMwY2NiMy0xM2Q2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_NZQ2W1iY48flERqP_y7f-wNkIJsp73c4k3-tgXjh5A=)
---
| | Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read. **The Trump Administration recently announced that it will withhold SNAP food assistance from families in Oregon and other Democratic-led states — unless we hand over private data about our residents, including names and immigration status.**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121024968/588111353/-430637131?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGMwY2NiMy0xM2Q2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_NZQ2W1iY48flERqP_y7f-wNkIJsp73c4k3-tgXjh5A=&emci=adc0ccb3-13d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b8c0ccb3-13d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=30662126)
---
Let me be absolutely clear: This is political blackmail. It’s unlawful. And it will take food off the tables of kids, seniors, and working families. **[That’s why I’m launching an emergency petition, and I need your immediate response. Do you oppose President Trump’s plan to block food assistance for Oregon families? Add your name now.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121024970/588111355/-430637131?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGMwY2NiMy0xM2Q2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_NZQ2W1iY48flERqP_y7f-wNkIJsp73c4k3-tgXjh5A=&emci=adc0ccb3-13d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b8c0ccb3-13d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=30662126)**
---
[ **ADD YOUR NAME** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121024972/588111357/-430637131?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGMwY2NiMy0xM2Q2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_NZQ2W1iY48flERqP_y7f-wNkIJsp73c4k3-tgXjh5A=&emci=adc0ccb3-13d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b8c0ccb3-13d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=30662126)
---
Oregon has already said **NO** to President Trump’s unlawful demand — _loudly and clearly._ Oregon will not be complicit in taking food away from kids and families so a billionaire politician and his lackeys in D.C. can take revenge on their opponents. But here’s the truth: Donald Trump will keep pushing, threatening, and trying to punish states like ours for daring to stand up to him. That’s why we’ll need a strong grassroots foundation to keep up the fight in the months ahead. **So right now, I’m gathering as many signatures as possible to show that Oregonians — and Americans everywhere — refuse to let any president weaponize hunger for political gain.** [**Will you add your name to say loud and clear: NO, Trump cannot take food away from Oregon families?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121024973/588111358/-430637131?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGMwY2NiMy0xM2Q2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_NZQ2W1iY48flERqP_y7f-wNkIJsp73c4k3-tgXjh5A=&emci=adc0ccb3-13d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b8c0ccb3-13d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=30662126) Thank you,Tobias Read

name: Phil Weiser
subject: On Dec. 21, we’re whisking up something good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado
body:
I’m excited to share this recipe with you.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121025335/588112675/1239926708?refcode=em_WEI_FR_Rugelach1_121025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGY4NjgzMi0xNGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sxm3Aa6j4nuAj7YUV7dERLaOStoFK830cDy1w2Sr4-k=&emci=fe131ae1-10d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=60f86832-14d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=51844520) It’s that time of year, friends. Holiday treat season is here! 🥐 The support you’ve shown this campaign has been full of sweetness, and we’d like to give back. **[If you make a contribution of any amount, you’ll get an exclusive invite to our virtual rugelach-making class on December 21 — plus a copy of my grandmother’s recipe. Save your seat at our virtual rugelach class! >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121025336/588112676/1490691382?refcode=em_WEI_FR_Rugelach1_121025&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGY4NjgzMi0xNGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sxm3Aa6j4nuAj7YUV7dERLaOStoFK830cDy1w2Sr4-k=)** In case you aren’t already a devotee, rugelach is a traditional Jewish cookie often made around holidays like Hanukkah (which is just around the corner). They’re commonly filled with raisins, jam, and chopped nuts. That’s how my Bubby made them. We have added the innovation of making them with chocolate chips. Between the buttery, flaky dough and the sweet filling, it’s the perfect way to end a meal. | **DATE:** December 21, 2025
**TIME:** 12:00 p.m. MST
**DURATION:** 1 hour
**WHERE:** Your Zoom link will land in your inbox once you’ve RSVPed
**HOW TO PREPARE:** Once you’ve RSVPed, check the recipe card you receive for a full list of ingredients and tools, and grab your favorite apron!
---
Can’t make it on December 21? No worries. Make a contribution, and we’ll send you a downloadable recipe card, so you can join the fun and make rugelach when you’ve got the time. (We hope you share on social and tag us when you do!)
**[Help our campaign _rise_ by giving _proof_ you support this movement. RSVP today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121025337/588112677/1490691382?refcode=em_WEI_FR_Rugelach1_121025&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGY4NjgzMi0xNGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sxm3Aa6j4nuAj7YUV7dERLaOStoFK830cDy1w2Sr4-k=)**
| [YES, I'LL BE THERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121025338/588112678/1490691382?refcode=em_WEI_FR_Rugelach1_121025&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGY4NjgzMi0xNGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sxm3Aa6j4nuAj7YUV7dERLaOStoFK830cDy1w2Sr4-k=)
---
See you soon,
Phil

subject: Peter, did you fall asleep again?
body:

I've tried reaching you for DAYS with an urgent & dire message, and I’m hoping I finally caught you at a good time.

subject: Concerned about healthcare?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
Healthcare or trillionaire Elon Musk? |
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121025397/588112828/-1175830425?refcode=header&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc0ZTI5MS0xNGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gr_uwDmnXgd7JdQuyTV80u4KWkNpXBINAqwBW8eVSvs=)
---
| **We know this is a very important issue for millions of Americans** : Rising healthcare premiums. Many people have already received notices that their premiums are going up next year, and it’s hard to blame anybody but President Trump and Congressional Republicans. Their so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” cut healthcare benefits to pay for tax cuts for billionaires. And when Democrats fought for months this fall to lower costs, Republicans dug in their heels and refused to lift a finger. **[But we need to hear from you if this is as big of a concern as we think it is: Will you take our 90-second survey about your healthcare costs and concerns for 2026?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121025398/588112829/-801607162?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc0ZTI5MS0xNGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gr_uwDmnXgd7JdQuyTV80u4KWkNpXBINAqwBW8eVSvs=&emci=319f3b4a-98d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=7774e291-14d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=560478)** [SURVEY HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121025399/588112830/-801607162?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc0ZTI5MS0xNGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gr_uwDmnXgd7JdQuyTV80u4KWkNpXBINAqwBW8eVSvs=&emci=319f3b4a-98d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=7774e291-14d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=560478) For some Americans, healthcare costs might double (or more!) starting in January. While Democrats don’t have majorities in either the U.S. House or the Senate, our party has been fighting hard to address this problem. But Republicans — including GOP Members of Congress in California — have simply kowtowed to Donald Trump and his desire to cut healthcare benefits for everyday Americans to finance tax cuts for multi-millionaires and billionaires. _In the coming years, Elon Musk could become the world’s first trillionaire, and cutting his taxes is more important to President Trump than your family affording healthcare._ **[So, we feel very strongly about this topic. But we want to know what YOU think. Will you take our quick survey and let us know how concerned you are about healthcare costs skyrocketing going into next year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121025400/588112831/-801607162?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc0ZTI5MS0xNGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gr_uwDmnXgd7JdQuyTV80u4KWkNpXBINAqwBW8eVSvs=&emci=319f3b4a-98d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=7774e291-14d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=560478)** [SURVEY HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121025401/588112832/-801607162?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc0ZTI5MS0xNGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gr_uwDmnXgd7JdQuyTV80u4KWkNpXBINAqwBW8eVSvs=&emci=319f3b4a-98d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=7774e291-14d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=560478) Thank you for sharing,
\- CADEM HQ

clean_body: Healthcare or trillionaire Elon Musk? | = | We know this is a very important issue for millions of Americans : Rising healthcare premiums. Many people have already received notices that their premiums are going up next year, and it’s hard to blame anybody but President Trump and Congressional Republicans. Their so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” cut healthcare benefits to pay for tax cuts for billionaires. And when Democrats fought for months this fall to lower costs, Republicans dug in their heels and refused to lift a finger. For some Americans, healthcare costs might double (or more!) starting in January. While Democrats don’t have majorities in either the U.S. House or the Senate, our party has been fighting hard to address this problem. But Republicans — including GOP Members of Congress in California — have simply kowtowed to Donald Trump and his desire to cut healthcare benefits for everyday Americans to finance tax cuts for multi-millionaires and billionaires. In the coming years, Elon Musk could become the world’s first trillionaire, and cutting his taxes is more important to President Trump than your family affording healthcare. Thank you for sharing, \- CADEM HQ | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121025574/588113442/1949054306?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.10_Mark-Kelly-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmU4YjlmYi0xNGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-yIElmE5brA8L1bnK5PMDAHrjEWg2CYLG22hOgU62kQ=) Hey, it’s Mark Kelly.

Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate.

I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy.

But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something.

So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too.

I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help.

We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.

After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do.

clean_body: We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. = Hey, it’s Mark Kelly. Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate. I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy. But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something. So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too. I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help. We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. name: Climate Hope Together
subject: A Better Future — by Jim Ball
body:
| |
---

Let’s make hope together! | [View in browser](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTczNDM5NjE5MDAwNDM2MjM2LFwiclwiOjE3MzQzOTYzMzMzNzYxNTk1Nn0iLCJzIjoiYTg1ZGU1Y2YwMDkwYTU0NSJ9)

|
# [](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTczNDM5NjE5MDE5MzEwNjA5LFwiclwiOjE3MzQzOTYzMzMzNzYxNTk1Nn0iLCJzIjoiYmEyNDEzZjdiYmMwYzA0MSJ9)A Better Future For Every Child

Dear : In this season of hope we are anticipating a better future. Every one of us has a part to play in creating this brighter future, in making this world a better place, especially for today’s children and their children. We hold this truth to be self-evident: it is part of our calling as human beings to strive to leave a better world for today’s children and subsequent generations. It is their due, which is why making things better is part of justice. This **Better Future Assumption** is made real through faithfulness to the **Better Future Covenant**. A covenant is where one party with power over the future of another makes a promise to ensure their future wellbeing. The **Better Future Covenant** is a promise by the older generation to make a better future for their children and subsequent generations. The latter have no power to make their future better; they must rely on today’s parents and adults to keep their promise. In our climate context the [Better Future Covenant](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTczNDM5NjE5MDI0NTUzNDkwLFwiclwiOjE3MzQzOTYzMzMzNzYxNTk1Nn0iLCJzIjoiODBmNjFjYzQxNjVkNGE1OSJ9) promises that: _together we will leave today’s children and their children and subsequent generations a better world free from pollution and the threat of climate change, a world with[justice](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTczNDM5NjE5MDI5Nzk2MzcxLFwiclwiOjE3MzQzOTYzMzMzNzYxNTk1Nn0iLCJzIjoiYmE1Y2NlZWM2Yzk3OTNjOSJ9) and [prosperous sustainability](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTczNDM5NjE5MDMzOTkwNjc2LFwiclwiOjE3MzQzOTYzMzMzNzYxNTk1Nn0iLCJzIjoiNTk0ZTE3YTA5Y2MwODM2MyJ9) where everyone and everything has what they need to live the lives intended for them, where everyone can become who they were meant to be_. In our acceptance of the Better Future Assumption and our commitment to the Better Future Covenant there is hope. It is actually built right in because we are striving to make a better future filled with [beauty](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTczNDM5NjE5MDQwMjgyMTMzLFwiclwiOjE3MzQzOTYzMzMzNzYxNTk1Nn0iLCJzIjoiYzA5ZTBhYTgxNzlhODUxMSJ9). And that gives us hope.
Together, as we strive to do our part in fulfilling our Better Future Covenant we make hope happen. We are hope-makers and beauty-creators. We are the hope we’ve been waiting for.
[Subscribe](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTczNDM5NjE5MDQ0NDc2NDM5LFwiclwiOjE3MzQzOTYzMzMzNzYxNTk1Nn0iLCJzIjoiNDBmMjM1MjZhYzcyZjc3YiJ9) to the [Climate Hope Together Substack](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTczNDM5NjE5MDQ5NzE5MzIyLFwiclwiOjE3MzQzOTYzMzMzNzYxNTk1Nn0iLCJzIjoiY2QxZjk2YzcwZjE3MjZlNSJ9) and stay plugged in to hope! Thanks for all you’re doing. And may you have a blessed Holiday Season. Jim Ball _
__Climate activist and thinker since ‘92. ”Together as we pull our destiny into the present we make the impossible possible and the possible actual and the actual beautiful and our future come faster.”_
---

Fellow Conservative,

There is no doubt that we’re a country divided.

Democrats blame Republicans for what they say is the current dismal state of affairs in the country.

On the other side of the coin, Republicans blame Democrats for stalling progress, losing sight of what it means to be the “loyal opposition,” and throwing every roadblock in the way of President Trump and his administration that they can.

You know that I’m a Republican member of the Senate, and can infer what I think - or you can just visit my Twitter profile, my website, or my official Facebook page.

**But I want to know what YOU, Fellow Conservative,** think about the first 11 months of the Trump Presidency, the recent government shutdown, and, in general, the direction of our country.

[**cast your vote now →**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9769c24c31a943cc9c622ea88ae96671&_e=YNHzk3sb0M7u1YHGoH2wwFM9OnSVokBoUuoaXWshuSqLhQn6eGbjbI_Oxw9wFvLm394eL7dLUR04ymyNOAM-h-1tOx0Pf_h7j7O3-hmChekUiOwbDRmvGwY9RyrtCmKE3OppABPkAlzN9-YLVamf6sR6qGNvtioVcNPPOsUGd4wlE_EVUzXtF1fI77BiLWafm6tew6fOMiEfET80id5sHpA0z9s0AoMng6ZEm0Gd5zxs_gPCG9fg44QuH2wYIEmKnsI4RzAuZVP7ZlL_8p1KCZhPN1HWhy-1s4QvSeZcdls_J_PEy2RumfSRhqCr_r7VL6pzrq3ZSveNDuscg62FA5jPG6zu-TH4u2S4vjfJt8sNq8XceMCF3ABqWtvmSxb-sYkXZxGxoc829nsQO8NdmuYAzPzDMImgVdf3rzDB4eI8YTgZ428j2HZKEcZLZ2yGHmaPw8UG74UBOFl_6_dyoDgdhRxL8omyXoAlIZ_YesNjWjSOA_eLFKJNTc7Uathi0ePAImDzeAlyFau6C1TZrwUjRhI1C3f8aTSeUWQOIxFsgfVoQM6EgamWVQVY0Krh0k-x6GYR5Shb5FdXPHhBNdrZAtofWMlRgL_2PYqcf5nSU3RB1TOKMttyM6SB7A6B1j3EB8tAnQf-Cpn_kXcIWgY9qCUFpiUKTfKjl4uw7ZHtM_QViDdpwXq8-BRBiq1479i-onX4eNY6zTtyDiBYy3Rav1xGMLKJYwLI4t3xB7XV7LRt8qj2hDi9y6O1k74B7_YIrtYPbPbwRU8h6bA2nQ%3D%3D)

I’m hearing that a large number of voters are placing blame on Republicans for the recent 43-day government shutdown, but in all honesty, I’m struggling to see how.

_**[Can you answer some questions that will give our team a better insight into the nation's current mood?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9769c24c31a943cc9c622ea88ae96671&_e=YNHzk3sb0M7u1YHGoH2wwFM9OnSVokBoUuoaXWshuSqLhQn6eGbjbI_Oxw9wFvLm394eL7dLUR04ymyNOAM-h-1tOx0Pf_h7j7O3-hmChekUiOwbDRmvGwY9RyrtCmKE3OppABPkAlzN9-YLVamf6sR6qGNvtioVcNPPOsUGd4wlE_EVUzXtF1fI77BiLWafm6tew6fOMiEfET80id5sHpA0z9s0AoMng6ZEm0Gd5zxs_gPCG9fg44QuH2wYIEmKnsI4RzAuZVP7ZlL_8p1KCR6jI3mqytXBsDrxAsNjLjV5AurOqplSZkjMLp1TN_GNxUcxUBXJqoJ53ctsUetUwNsXKtJ5b_FqddjPmrQWVcoMW07vFDz4_rgP1TkkVU98-lqgDszQr2m90gxgrpgN0egBFdd_G1IxC0mzZ9UDwbkhKuUCHm7C6EEoWXzNUVYzns83_odfR3AaLJqYaaMK0cJ6rkGrJ6czGDowXH1k4k1hAnucECVoqDPjXhPYf01jJugKZpM6fSER1kQv5fit52P-2eRQ3-yNWecD1aWsFB6xwEZip-Taap9ySjYjTWsLCkuaGrvvSf5RojGRVmrnMoso7kuPxz_qjsOCMqVZ8F6ZXW5J3nQ57DCfJ_45cGYlLN5lu4kbyD6bOqjgKpgMYyyb0Rzv6ttRK7VqukwH3sZeXuO6EhiwhtDjAOpoQvSRYN694T8t5XWtqdAn-CDAxSD845rYDUdqzXwNxaNRLJOjKW55efaQPMUTT3ScKJKk8_qrEdSCpyTtrAdG_n_EPw%3D%3D)**_

Are Democrats better messengers than we are? Do we need to refine our communication with the American people during times of national emergency?

Last year, President Trump led Republicans to one of the most historic victories of our time. I know you don’t want to see our majorities in Congress crumble, so **[I’m imploring you to let me know you’re thinking on several big questions of the day.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9769c24c31a943cc9c622ea88ae96671&_e=YNHzk3sb0M7u1YHGoH2wwFM9OnSVokBoUuoaXWshuSqLhQn6eGbjbI_Oxw9wFvLm394eL7dLUR04ymyNOAM-h-1tOx0Pf_h7j7O3-hmChekUiOwbDRmvGwY9RyrtCmKE3OppABPkAlzN9-YLVamf6sR6qGNvtioVcNPPOsUGd4wlE_EVUzXtF1fI77BiLWafm6tew6fOMiEfET80id5sHpA0z9s0AoMng6ZEm0Gd5zxs_gPCG9fg44QuH2wYIEmKnsI4RzAuZVP7ZlL_8p1KCZAsrPdEUWPSCEE5MeMB8xJYaMyRpv6WwOaUcxnXSqZ5aJtn1RdIUJMvKtowSeInmTfp4AtOw5hGUGXWk-rJRsdfN-lqhZtj-yKCaiHxK9uds2ktorOeq18kPig0op8aNso5PStGYSbc7AAkz77d5htS4HHK-chNkZHMazC9A_R9n1LGlg1yxNhzmEPKSVYV3NxqY89SGl0969lcxxebAB6TRRBd8k6X4LO3T-DLuspG1L3ViCGjZqi3vp_pDgvIQHmb59tzp-LTQrH5LORGMGwCCJxNt4NJQPdh0uCALoE6UNRPp_bZhKbXHshzureZTZbAwT9GbPsAmpbX7u2yuICT-6zfPoRQMDnD57BEMprPfBkwNdjam-AfUfSaMF0ZbsUKWwNGuJ7p-_-ysnYcCS-jVJ1lqQ7P-51AFHIs0nN2jTF8kLRQ7zkzDWmHenQldFBHrKuVUyZq8gVYbQSfsDcNKY7k1nVHhm262yS8rVVfT8bN5Wi2oCeq7avlTdamvw%3D%3D)**

name: Jen Kiggans
subject: Coming to you as a Mom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
I’m feeling a little sentimental and wanted to share some pictures with you!!!
I'm coming to you as a Navy Veteran, Nurse Practitioner, GOP Congresswoman, but most importantly as a MOM.
I was looking through some old photos recently and wanted to share a few with you. They help tell my story, but also explain why I'm the Democrats #1 target in the upcoming midterm elections!! clean_body: I’m feeling a little sentimental and wanted to share some pictures with you!!! I'm coming to you as a Navy Veteran, Nurse Practitioner, GOP Congresswoman, but most importantly as a MOM. I was looking through some old photos recently and wanted to share a few with you. They help tell my story, but also explain why I'm the Democrats #1 target in the upcoming midterm elections!! That photo above is me and my husband, Steve. He is a retired F-18 pilot, and I'm a proud Navy wife and mother to four amazing children. As the granddaughter of a veteran, daughter of a veteran, spouse of a veteran, and mother of future veterans, I come from a PROUD military family. I also served in the Navy. That photo above is my helicopter with my call sign on it - "Blossom." I was winged as a naval aviator in 1995 and served our nation for a total of 10 years as a helicopter pilot flying H-46 and H-3 helicopters, completing two deployments to the Persian Gulf. After serving in the Navy, I used my GI Bill benefits to go back to school and become a Geriatric Nurse Practitioner. It was an honor to care for our Greatest Generation, and I helped them fight the system to get the healthcare they deserve. Over time, I got frustrated watching the evening news and just hearing about all the dysfunction and radical agendas in our government. But I'm not one to just complain about problems. I like to solve them. So I got off my couch, and I ran for office. I served three sessions in the Virginia State Senate, where I used my real-world experience to actually solve problems. I was proud to champion legislation to promote election security, establish a Military Spouse Liaison, and advocate for patients, families, and caregivers in long-term care facilities. Eventually, I realized a lot of the problems facing my family, our neighbors, and our community were actually coming from Washington. We were represented by a Democrat who voted with Nancy Pelosi 99% of the time, and I felt we needed a representative who would actually put our values and community first. So, I once again decided to stop complaining and actually do something about it. So I ran for Congress! When I commit to something, I give it my all, and that's what we did with the campaign. We were up against a lot. National Democrats poured over $10 million into my opponent's campaign, and big money PACs spent even more attacking me. But, we stayed focused on the task at hand and never lost sight of why I was running. On Election Night, we won by about 10,000 votes in one of the closest races in the entire nation. And in Congress, we've been able to make a big impact. I'm leading the charge to lower prices, cut taxes, get better care for our veterans, support military families, and secure the border. We're making good progress, but all our progress could be in jeopardy if we lose in the upcoming elections. See, that same Democrat I defeated in 2022 is back for revenge. She just announced her campaign against me, and she raised over $500,000 from Democrat activists in just a few days. The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee has announced my seat is one of their top targets, and they are already spending big on attack ads. If you want to see more regular, everyday citizens in office instead of career politicians, then I need your urgent help. Can you spare anything to help me defeat the Democrats in this #1 Battleground race? I can't stand sending messages like this. Sometimes I wonder what would have happened if I never got off the couch and ran for office...but then I remember that America is always worth protecting...no matter what! Thanks for reading my message. I hope I was able to earn your support. -Jen I would not be where I am today without the help of my incredible and faithful supporters like you. Because of your support, I can keep fighting to make our country stronger. Together we will get our country back on the right track and secure America's success! | | Paid for by Kiggans for Congress Use of military images or rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Department of War or the Navy P.O. Box 5042 Virginia Beach, VA 23471 To unsubscribe from Kiggans for Congress,

body:
Hochul’s actions speak louder than words...
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1dd89ad9c9164faaa11143b95afc26b1&_e=XBa2L_XBUAMOzbzrX4LOR28vF9JjGgoWpTC28zPLW2p-PSU6REE9lWcDT8YKyDlEV5kUGhTY92AzoDFgbJV-fGToTuQAL31VbB8zY2LwRUhoZz9fXl7uHiobJF-G2142zdvAjTav047H6u2h4QXsiUXO4hnwYKkKdnitlOAJFvTskmPsMLWBGxRRVgIwguIA8x2WFtUVN2mPtMz7jXQMgYhKYw0TwMr0T3zp5acMxNkfBqUVHi2xPdGWCYK1AjDIz2ZHLGrzd5V76vpXe8AkylJgXHLr-x-vA6UNtO3g_3muRwVRbOSityXOBFpNnQRrW4RAM88qCvazeIiHESg_5gXJ4J3mqH37i_JWz152hYDT-Y5QeXz-wbhDK7PUr16rE5YqlmLDQpniTGIeyhwS2csavSEXRq2jmORzDfOS-qOuLPOTcYNEMrS6YJwpNMLKldUIZIOKnSS7-sLAq2ShkXgN2MxbuQU5COzIYhaFDnn3P3vTh40gBhpZusWlVdjCtj3mMsMwFqjnLWqSdxWdi9Ks2g_V8p3rial2LniiYfgNNAe6b07_u6aq0m-r2woKzp95A8frJcAWOm9fFn4w0bmlwLdZNDlASL7etA1vtnKnrJ-dscHH3YAACIfhExdR)
---
Fellow Patriot,
---
Kathy Hochul is still _saying_ that she’ll comfortably win the governor’s race.
---
But actions speak louder than words – _and behind the scenes, Hochul is _acting_ like a candidate running in one of 2026’s **TOP battleground races**_!
---
Her latest move is bringing on veteran Democrat operatives who have worked on other recent top battleground races – including Michigan, Georgia, and Wisconsin – in a desperate bid to boost her struggling reelection campaign.
---
Yes, you read that right... The Democrats are so threatened by our grassroots campaign, that they’re now treating New York state like _Michigan, Georgia, and Wisconsin_!
---
**_New York Post_ : “Hochul beefs up campaign staff with battleground political veterans in sign of looming GOP threat”**
“Gov. Kathy Hochul is filling the upper echelons of her re-election team with alumni of campaigns in battleground states and other recent high-stakes political fights – a signal she may be **_expecting a tough race_** even in deep-blue New York.”
---
This PROVES what I’ve been saying all along: No state has moved further to the right in recent years than New York!
---
Forget all the conventional wisdom about New York being a “blue” state...
---
**With Hochul at the top of the ticket, New York is a TOP 2026 battleground – and like the polling shows, the governor’s race is currently a _TOSS-UP_. **
---
But winning a toss-up race like this means leaving no stone unturned.
---
_That starts with raising the funds needed to reach every last voter, ensure our message isn’t drowned out by the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys, and build a voter turnout operation that can compete with the Left’s Obama-funded ballot-harvesting machine._
---
With our campaign’s FIRST and ONLY end-of-year deadline rapidly approaching, we need to keep our foot on the gas to ensure we CRUSH our goal.
---
_Fellow Patriot, as one of my top grassroots supporters who’s ALWAYS had my back when I needed it most, can I count on _YOU_ to stand with me in the fight to FIRE Hochul at this pivotal moment for our campaign? _
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution to help me WIN what is rapidly becoming the TOP battleground race in the entire country for the midterms – and help unlock a 600% MATCH.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1dd89ad9c9164faaa11143b95afc26b1&_e=XBa2L_XBUAMOzbzrX4LOR28vF9JjGgoWpTC28zPLW2p-PSU6REE9lWcDT8YKyDlEV5kUGhTY92AzoDFgbJV-fGToTuQAL31VbB8zY2LwRUhoZz9fXl7uHiobJF-G2142zdvAjTav047H6u2h4QXsiUXO4hnwYKkKdnitlOAJFvTskmPsMLWBGxRRVgIwguIA8x2WFtUVN2mPtMz7jXQMgVtcB3zLJH9R9LNALsKN-DAzvndxgHNoGOL_sHx-aKtx7exvO-OKToWZ1F5y55AMJJymo2NfvfrFphon4PHTfkTVkNJ8bq-hDp-9bEl3fuDfXxGl81SB-pOUJg3hJiJXyXuGsShV-vWEtkXuvs_xHX_wGtH7n0dMpy45Qpg0uM9D8weRSuM4_20S_IHTj_D7p5C84fGM98Cx6kqKTR3KHYLv3Z7Pu6Py4Oahxq-zJV6lMBTH-CG8zD9O1CcWxSi4BM1bwB1gp41b7u-n66aygik66QVlK0Q7pH41ZDYovzjdEkicIny3E2-45pMi_L2PsTI6eAHCbBI8FddaNDclwsYmKJr5DCx9dYMPt6QoNlFdnColJYgtEYcSqJA3DBEEOgfxsO1g1PPiFwJj-7x-fUaa0hhYKOAFXQY76BGPzaiZ)

clean_body: Hochul’s actions speak louder than words... | Fellow Patriot, Kathy Hochul is still saying that she’ll comfortably win the governor’s race. But actions speak louder than words – and behind the scenes, Hochul is acting like a candidate running in one of 2026’s TOP battleground races! Her latest move is bringing on veteran Democrat operatives who have worked on other recent top battleground races – including Michigan, Georgia, and Wisconsin – in a desperate bid to boost her struggling reelection campaign. Yes, you read that right... The Democrats are so threatened by our grassroots campaign, that they’re now treating New York state like Michigan, Georgia, and Wisconsin! New York Post : “Hochul beefs up campaign staff with battleground political veterans in sign of looming GOP threat” “Gov. Kathy Hochul is filling the upper echelons of her re-election team with alumni of campaigns in battleground states and other recent high-stakes political fights – a signal she may be expecting a tough race even in deep-blue New York.” This PROVES what I’ve been saying all along: No state has moved further to the right in recent years than New York! Forget all the conventional wisdom about New York being a “blue” state... With Hochul at the top of the ticket, New York is a TOP 2026 battleground – and like the polling shows, the governor’s race is currently a TOSS-UP. But winning a toss-up race like this means leaving no stone unturned. That starts with raising the funds needed to reach every last voter, ensure our message isn’t drowned out by the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys, and build a voter turnout operation that can compete with the Left’s Obama-funded ballot-harvesting machine. With our campaign’s FIRST and ONLY end-of-year deadline rapidly approaching, we need to keep our foot on the gas to ensure we CRUSH our goal. Fellow Patriot, as one of my top grassroots supporters who’s ALWAYS had my back when I needed it most, can I count on YOU to stand with me in the fight to FIRE Hochul at this pivotal moment for our campaign? Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

Give us a moment to explain why Senator Sherrod Brown deserves our attention.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121026524/588116219/-736798564?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20251210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjM4Y2RjNC0xN2Q2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLFLeGuxvpwJ2Uh8zJY0TDm6OnxEGFrCCnEdGW4ZGwg=)
**Sherrod Brown was born and raised in Ohio. He’s dedicated his life to fighting for Ohioans and the Dignity of Work.** He believes that hard work should pay off for everyone — no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do.
Years ago, a union steelworker gave him a pin of a yellow canary in a birdcage. It’s a reminder of a time when miners would bring canaries into the mines to check for dangerous levels of gas.
If the canary died, the miners knew to get out. At that time, workers didn’t have strong unions or a government that would fight for them.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121026526/588116221/-736798564?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20251210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjM4Y2RjNC0xN2Q2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLFLeGuxvpwJ2Uh8zJY0TDm6OnxEGFrCCnEdGW4ZGwg=)
Sherrod has worn this canary pin ever since to remember the workers he’s fighting so hard for every single day. It’s a reminder that the fight is still going — to support our country and the people who make it work.
Sherrod has taken on the tough fights in the U.S. Senate — working to stand up for working men and women against big corporations.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121026527/588116223/-736798564?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20251210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjM4Y2RjNC0xN2Q2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLFLeGuxvpwJ2Uh8zJY0TDm6OnxEGFrCCnEdGW4ZGwg=)

clean_body: [] I’ll keep this as short as possible, Peter: The GOP is outraising us. Right now, the Republican National Committee is sitting on an $86 million war chest — and we’re bracing for overwhelming spending to defeat Democrats like me. To make matters worse, we just learned that Elon Musk is planning to return to politics, spending HUGE sums to prop up MAGA Republicans in 2026. To be honest, I’m concerned. To fight back against the MAGA Money Machine, I rely on grassroots supporters like YOU, Peter. We’re gearing up for our massive end-of-year FEC deadline goal to fight back, but we’re currently on track to fall significantly behind. So I’m asking you directly: Can you please rush $15 or more before midnight to give the GOP something to be concerned about? name: Justice Democrats
subject: Build a Congress powered by moral courage, not corporate PACs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251210-mk.vMtvWW&refcode=em20251210-37266&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37266%2E1203867%2ETMv9Vy ]Tweet from journalist Akela Lacy featuring a photo of Melat Kiros
smiling outdoors with blurred buildings in the background. The tweet
reads: 'NEW: She was fired for speaking about Palestine. Now she’s running
for Congress against a 30-year incumbent and is the 6th candidate to win
the endorsement of Justice Democrats. I interviewed Melat Kiros on her
campaign to end U.S. military aid to Israel.'

Voters in Colorado’s 1st district have had the same Congresswoman for 28
years, yet prices keep rising and far-right authoritarianism is here.

Clearly, the Democratic Party — including corporate-backed incumbents like
Rep. Diana DeGette — is on autopilot.

Working-class progressive Melat Kiros is challenging DeGette in next
year’s Democratic primary to change that, and Justice Democrats proudly
has her back.

Check out the buzz our sixth 2026 Democratic primary endorsement is
making:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251210-mk.vMtvWW&refcode=em20251210-37266&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37266%2E1203867%2ETMv9Vy ]Tweet from NBC News featuring a close-up photo of Rep. Diana DeGette
speaking, with an out-of-focus American flag in the background. The tweet
reads: 'Justice Democrats, a national progressive group, endorses Melat
Kiros, a lawyer and barista, in her campaign against Democratic Rep. Diana
DeGette in Colorado's 1st District.'

We’re on a mission to replace out-of-touch Democrats like DeGette with
real fighters for the people in the halls of power. Melat — a barista and
renter who lost her job as a lawyer for defending pro-Palestine protests —
will bring new leadership to Denver rooted in moral courage and unburdened
by corporate PACs.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251210-mk.vMtvWW&refcode=em20251210-37266&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1004&akid=37266%2E1203867%2ETMv9Vy ]Tweet from Max Cohen (@maxpcohen) reading 'New: @justicedems is
endorsing Melat Kiros’ challenge to Diana DeGette in #CO01. Kiros: 'Even
Democrats who say they vote the right way are beholden to the same
billionaires who keep our prices high, burn our planet and profit from a
genocide.' It include a preview of a YouTube video titled 'Justice
Democrats endorse Melat Kiros'

Take it from Melat: “Denver deserves leadership with a backbone, not
backed by corporations. I lost my law firm job when I refused to stay
quiet about the genocide happening in Palestine. That’s the urgency and
moral clarity I’m bringing to this race, and it’s why I’m proud to be
endorsed by Justice Democrats.”

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251210-mk.vMtvWW&refcode=em20251210-37266&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1005&akid=37266%2E1203867%2ETMv9Vy ]If you believe in building a Congress powered by moral courage instead
of corporate PACs, join us in supporting Melat and keeping up the
momentum: split $5 to her campaign and Justice Democrats
today →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251210-mk.vMtvWW&refcode=em20251210-37266&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1024&akid=37266%2E1203867%2ETMv9Vy ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251210-37266-footer&t=1025&refcode2=37266_1203867_TMv9Vy&akid=37266%2E1203867%2ETMv9Vy

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=37266%2E1203867%2ETMv9Vy

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

We need to make early investments to defend Michigan’s Senate seat, win back a Democratic trifecta at home, and elect new leaders who will shape the future of this country for years to come.
**And now, as the newly elected Vice Chair of the Democratic Governors Association, I’ll also be working hard to help elect Democratic governors across the country.** We’ve seen how much leadership at the state level matters — and we need strong Democratic governors to defend our rights, protect our freedoms, and keep the country moving forward.
The other side is already spending big, and the truth is that small-dollar recurring donations can have one of the most significant impacts on our success.
It helps us budget better, too. Knowing with confidence that you will be there, working alongside us, allows us to plan more effectively for the future.
I’m grateful to the tens of thousands of people who’ve pitched in what they can to power our work. Grassroots donors are the number one source of donations to our team. **And I know it’s a big ask, but if it’s in your budget, I’m asking you to support this team by becoming a sustaining donor to Fight Like Hell PAC today.**
**[Will you make a monthly recurring donation of any amount to support our work? A few bucks every month adds up, and it means we can invest more strategically to win the important fights ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121027610/588120217/-1313101069?recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251210_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzllZjk0NDUtMWNkNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Gpm3JvBaFjDpMbPUziCTdLKlWt-kQMgzEC_0est9DpY=)**

Together, we’ve lowered costs for families, protected reproductive freedom, expanded voting access, fixed the damn roads, and made record investments in good-paying jobs and infrastructure.
But the work ahead will be bigger and harder than ever. Washington Republicans and their billionaire donors want to flip Michigan red, roll back our freedoms, and take away the progress we’ve fought for.
**If we lose, they succeed. But if we stand strong together, we’ll protect Michigan, win back our majorities, and elect governors who will fight for our values nationwide.**
Thank you again for your continued support. I hope you know how much it means to me.
— Gretchen
