Conservative comedian Andrew Schultz **[demolished the New York Times](https://substack.com/redirect/5dbef9b8-44ba-4326-96d9-95e631c59094?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a panel discussion about the Trump administration and the Russia Hoax.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/679fdaa1-0abc-4f2b-98eb-25d384d44280?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/5dbef9b8-44ba-4326-96d9-95e631c59094?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
When the panel confronted Schultz about his podcast episode with the President and accused him of ""letting the president lie," about Russia's involvement in the 2016 election, Schultz came in hot to defend his honor and what _really_ happened.
"You're not answering the question!!" Schultz sprung at the liberal journalists when they evaded his rebuttal. "I think you're avoiding it because you know the truth!"
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/5dbef9b8-44ba-4326-96d9-95e631c59094?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with American Hartford Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/c86d8f5e-df82-4453-847d-20c1b235aa94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[$2.4T Gone! AI Bubble Has 401(k)'s Trapped in a Firestorm](https://substack.com/redirect/c86d8f5e-df82-4453-847d-20c1b235aa94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
### **Billions are vanishing from the markets by the hour. The window to a safe exit is closing ...**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c86d8f5e-df82-4453-847d-20c1b235aa94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**You 've been warned for years of the underlying risk in your retirement savings account. The three week period between October 29-November 21, 2025 served as your wake up call.**
Seeking Alpha reported a $2.4 Trillion dollar loss for the S&P 500 during this time, sending panic waves across the world. Billionaire Peter Theil's hedge fund dumped the entire firm's holdings of the market darling, NVIDIA. They didn't sell some of it, they sold ALL of it.
When whales and institutions start running for the exits, it means **[the"AI Bubble" isn't just leaking... it's exploding.](https://substack.com/redirect/c86d8f5e-df82-4453-847d-20c1b235aa94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **As the market whales sell off their holdings, stock prices plummet, even those index funds you were told were "safe and reliable".
**If your retirement wealth is held in a 401(k), IRA, TSP, or pension when the market opens next week, you are volunteering to potentially lose much or all of your life savings.**
You can follow the smart money to safety, not by selling for cash, but by moving to the ultimate safe haven... Physical Gold.
Gold is trusted by the wise and wealthy, as it stands firm in value when the paper economy burns.
**You can use a little-known IRS loophole to move your retirement funds into a Gold IRA, backed by physical gold that you own, as soon as today. This loophole allows for a tax-free, penalty-free transfer that gets you out of the fire and into security.**
**[Click Here for Your FREE 2026 Wealth Protection Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/c86d8f5e-df82-4453-847d-20c1b235aa94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and take the path to protection.
**[Get Your Free WEALTH PROTECTION GUIDE](https://substack.com/redirect/c86d8f5e-df82-4453-847d-20c1b235aa94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Get My Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/c86d8f5e-df82-4453-847d-20c1b235aa94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Erika Kirk slams conspiracy theorists
Erika Kirk went off on **[conspiracy theorists](https://substack.com/redirect/f093b581-efa6-4b94-950d-89ade5421f08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** like Candace Owens during Fox News' Outnumbered on Wednesday, calling for them to stop making thousands of dollars off her husband's murder and disparaging her good name and calling it a 'mind virus.'
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0116733d-93fe-4f0c-abbe-2a8938732ddf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Come after me, call me names, I don't care. Call me what you want, go down that rabbit hole, whatever. But...when you go after the people that I love and you're making hundreds of thousands of dollars every single episode going after the people that I love because somehow they're in on this? No."
* * *
# Man praised for defending innocent and elderly on train from drunk illegal
A North Carolina man who protected fellow passengers from a **[drunk illegal](https://substack.com/redirect/432a60e0-dbd6-4821-a828-d5ffc482e61e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/432a60e0-dbd6-4821-a828-d5ffc482e61e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)remains in critical condition after being stabbed in the chest by a twice-deported illegal immigrant with an extensive criminal record.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/432a60e0-dbd6-4821-a828-d5ffc482e61e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Heroic intervention turns violent:** Kenyon Dobie, 24, confronted Honduran national Oscar Solarzano, 33, who was drinking alcohol and harassing riders on a Friday Charlotte light rail train, prompting the homeless migrant to knife him in the chest, leaving Dobie with a tube draining blood from his lungs while hospitalized.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b38e120c-46a1-43d6-b703-069c266888e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Serial offender 's history:** Solarzano had been banned from the transit system and deported twice before illegally returning to the U.S. a third time, with a rap sheet including aggravated battery with a deadly weapon, robbery conviction, destroying evidence, resisting arrest, and using false identification, according to DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia Lockwood.
* **Pattern of transit violence:** The assault occurred just four months after 23-year-old Ukrainian refugee Iryna Zarutska was fatally stabbed multiple times on another Charlotte light rail train by homeless career criminal Decarlos Brown Jr., 34, who calmly walked off after slashing the woman who'd fled war-torn Ukraine seeking safety.

* * *
# **Trump backs GOP bill putting cash into health savings accounts**
President Trump endorsed Senate Republican legislation for depositing up to **[$1,500 into Americans' health care savings](https://substack.com/redirect/adfca772-3427-414f-8e2e-b1f88d1b4b6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** accounts Wednesday.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/adfca772-3427-414f-8e2e-b1f88d1b4b6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Payment structure:** The bill provides $1,000 checks to Affordable Care Act enrollees aged 18-49 and $1,500 to those 50-64 with household incomes at or below 700% of poverty level--$109,550 for individuals or $225,050 for families of four--who have bronze or catastrophic plans, excluding coverage for abortions or gender reassignment procedures.
* **Insurance company critique:** Trump told reporters aboard Air Force One "I don't want to give the insurance companies any money" because they've been "ripping off the public for years," calling Obamacare "a scam to make the insurance companies rich."
* **Broader affordability push:** The measure heads for Thursday's procedural vote alongside an $83 billion Democratic bill extending Obamacare subsidies for three years, as Trump recalibrates economic messaging before 2026 midterms, with promises including tariff rebate checks, child savings accounts, and tax cuts on tips, overtime, and Social Security.

* * *
# **Trump displays economic gains in Pennsylvania as Dems claim affordability crisis**
President Trump spent nearly two hours Tuesday night defending his economic record at a Pennsylvania casino resort, insisting **[prices are dropping](https://substack.com/redirect/28c5ce0a-19af-42f8-b1c6-7d102ea35e41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** despite polling showing most voters remain pessimistic about the economy heading into midterm elections.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/28c5ce0a-19af-42f8-b1c6-7d102ea35e41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Statistical defense:** Trump cited real wage increases of $1,300 for factory workers, over $1,800 for construction workers, and $3,300 for miners under his administration compared to the Biden-era, while highlighting a 25% cheaper Thanksgiving meal cost, according to data from the American Farm Bureau Federation.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/273c8313-3f96-4f99-96fc-858318cff9e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Voter disconnect:** Despite Trump's self-assessed success rates, a November Fox News survey found 76% of voters view the economy negatively--up from 67% in July and higher than the 70% reporting similar concerns at the end of Biden's presidency, with Democrats sweeping 2025 elections through affordability campaigns.
* **Battle rages on:** Trump said in his speech that Democratic economic outcry was like "Bonnie and Clyde preaching about public safety," arguing Republicans don't need to "sell" their policies on cultural issues since bringing down what he called Biden's "highest prices in the history of our country" speaks for itself.
* **No tax on tips:** In another notable moment from the evening, a single mother who has been a waitress since fifteen spoke about Trump's 'no tax on tips' policy, crediting it to changing her and her daughter's financial and educational future, with the extra money now going towards her daughter's education.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/41fa431d-8b2b-4e11-ba0c-c2a465b70419?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

The president also mentioned 22 states hitting their lowest prices in 7 years, $18 trillion in new private investments versus Biden's under $1 trillion, and the bullish stock market performance.
* * *
# **Mace seeks to rename D.C. BLM Plaza after Charlie Kirk**
Representative Nancy Mace is fighting legislation to **[rename the Black Lives Matter Plaza](https://substack.com/redirect/2ebd550d-21ef-48f5-8d74-e9e0fa3742a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Washington DC after Charlie Kirk, three months following his assassination,
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2ebd550d-21ef-48f5-8d74-e9e0fa3742a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **BLM Plaza:** Mace proposed renaming the two-block area previously designated "Black Lives Matter Plaza" in 2020 following the murder of George Flloyd, which was reversed this March amid Republican pressure and Trump's DEI crackdown, calling BLM "a terrorist organization" despite no official designation
* **Uphill battle:** The South Carolina Republican admitted she had little optimism the bill would pass, but vowed to "fight like hell" regardless.
* **Bipartisan mourning, divided votes:** A September House resolution honoring Kirk passed with all Republicans and 95 Democrats supporting, while 58 Democrats opposed and 38 voted present, as prosecutors seek death penalty against accused killer Tyler James Robinson.
* * *

# **Democrat Higgins wins Miami mayor race, GOP 's three-decade streak ends**
Democrat Eileen Higgins defeated Republican Emilio Gonzalez in Tuesday's Miami mayoral runoff, becoming the first woman elected to lead the city while **[ending the GOP's nearly 30-year winning streak.](https://substack.com/redirect/cc90f276-4a56-47ec-92eb-be5e404298e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cc90f276-4a56-47ec-92eb-be5e404298e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump-backed candidate fails:** Despite President Trump's endorsement of Gonzalez--who served on his Homeland Security transition team--and heavy Republican Party of Florida investment, Higgins captured victory in the technically nonpartisan race that drew intense national attention.
* **Democratic momentum continues:** The win follows Democrats' major 2025 election victories and last week's intense Tennessee congressional performance, with DNC Chair Ken Martin declaring the result "yet another warning sign to Republicans that voters are fed up with their out-of-touch agenda that is raising costs for working families."
* **Blue pocket in red state:** While Florida has shifted dramatically rightward with Trump winning statewide by 13 points and Miami-Dade County by 11 points last year, Miami city proper remains Democratic-leaning, where Trump narrowly lost. Higgins' victory suggesting possible erosion of GOP gains among Hispanic and Latino voters.

Higgins, a mechanical engineer and former Peace Corps Belize director who campaigned on affordability, will replace term-limited Republican Mayor Francis Suarez.

Insurance company critique: Trump told reporters aboard Air Force One "I don't want to give the insurance companies any money" because they've been "ripping off the public for years," calling Obamacare "a scam to make the insurance companies rich." Peter,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Peter, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Peter to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: A story that isn't getting enough attention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This is a massive economic bubble.
#
During an Instagram Q&A, someone asked Alexandria:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251210._Bn_fk&refcode=em20251210-10375-P_FND_EXP_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10375%2E2526796%2EeifoA4)
Her response? **AI data centers are massively driving up your electric bills**.
In 2023, data centers accounted for 4% total usage of the country’s electricity, and experts predict that will grow to over 12% in the next three years.
Doesn’t sound so bad, right? **Here’s the catch** :
AI data centers require _massive_ amounts of energy to operate, and our electric grid needs expensive updates to support the increased use.
Unless state and federal regulations require the tech industry to foot the bill for improvements, **those costs are shared by working families and small businesses**.
Since 2020, the average American household has seen a 30% increase in their electric bill. New analyses predict that **electric bills around the country will increase by 8% by 2030, and by as much as 25% in states where the AI boom is leading to more data centers being built** , like Ohio, Virginia, and Texas.1
And while Trump brags about the economy 'booming', almost 40% of economic growth can be attributed to just 7 companies investing in AI, a sector which has yet to turn a profit.
This is a massive economic bubble which is driving up day-to-day costs for everyday Americans and could lead to 2008-style economic instability if it bursts.
And **it’s all funded by the same billionaires and corporations who ushered in the second Trump administration** — Zuckerberg, Bezos, Microsoft, Palantir, and more.2
[You're getting ripped off. All of us are getting ripped off. But our day-to-day actions still matter in this authoritarian regime. Will you make a $5 contribution today so that Alexandria can keep fighting to protect our country from becoming a slush fund for Trump and his billionaire donors? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251210._Bn_fk&refcode=em20251210-10375-P_FND_EXP_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10375%2E2526796%2EeifoA4)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251210._Bn_fk&refcode=em20251210-10375-P_FND_EXP_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=10375%2E2526796%2EeifoA4)**
We will keep you posted as more on this story develops.
Thank you for standing with us.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

2 - [**NY Times** : NY Times: Big Tech’s A.I. Spending Is Accelerating (Again)](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/35244?t=23&akid=10375%2E2526796%2EeifoA4)

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Trump doesn’t get to silence us
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251210-1702-foote&t=1001&akid=1702%2E342411%2EShB4Lc ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Trump is back to doing what he does best: spewing hate and attacking the
very leaders who refuse to bow to him.

Trump called Ilhan “garbage” and added that immigrants like her are
“garbage” too.

Trump called Alexandria one of the “dumbest people in Congress.”

Trump called Rashida “vicious” and a “crazed lunatic.”

Trump called Ayanna and other members of the Squad “not very smart” and
told them to “go back” to where they came from.

These attacks aren’t just insults. They’re racist, xenophobic, dangerous,
and designed to intimidate the boldest progressive women in Congress —
leaders who have spent years fighting for working people, demanding
justice, and refusing to be silenced.

But here’s what Trump still doesn’t understand: He may be loud. But
together, we are louder.

Every time he targets the Squad, we respond with stronger solidarity and a
grassroots movement he cannot drown out — no matter how many lies he
repeats.

The Squad needs us in this moment. Because when Trump attacks them, he’s
attacking our movement and everything we fight for: social, racial,
immigration, and economic justice, and a government that works for all —
not the wealthy and powerful.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251210-movement.PICPHH&refcode=em20251210-1702&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1702%2E342411%2EShB4Lc ]Contribute ››

Let’s make our message unmistakable: Trump doesn’t get to silence us.

The Squad Victory Fund

clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Peter, Trump is back to doing what he does best: spewing hate and attacking the very leaders who refuse to bow to him. Trump called Ilhan “garbage” and added that immigrants like her are “garbage” too. Trump called Alexandria one of the “dumbest people in Congress.” Trump called Rashida “vicious” and a “crazed lunatic.” Trump called Ayanna and other members of the Squad “not very smart” and told them to “go back” to where they came from. These attacks aren’t just insults. They’re racist, xenophobic, dangerous, and designed to intimidate the boldest progressive women in Congress — leaders who have spent years fighting for working people, demanding justice, and refusing to be silenced. But here’s what Trump still doesn’t understand: He may be loud. But together, we are louder. Every time he targets the Squad, we respond with stronger solidarity and a grassroots movement he cannot drown out — no matter how many lies he repeats. The Squad needs us in this moment. body:

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c6c5c8b9a30341a99dccc7a66ea657d8&_e=hXpNTLpcxkGCQp7qvP-5Od5EN7HjVC_pTL65LgVe2qvqd9YOp1JcW-BfbChpmlciwCXae9CYV5PH1u8xDyAQHDaSUIuyxNmV-12HuJDiPTJaW1Z-ZbCb4MJXtiXH7hA8-saf17RGEWPBujXREh0jblMaQrAIflqw2bEUKKkHEDCgXjfUJFWUhfSn05tdsUpIBtdoRajSK860EuGubhu2NJAc7IkwlrfW1SRO5Y5_1utoHXCBEwUymxfRGW9IESoQdZPCooFgUgmEDNzQYpy9I8XAWw3PyBWr26dWZQ4Varzq6JfYtAXANNOhYlwbnzgh9Wm2NyPkGJe-P8uxzjDtsu-vR7VI9_QIa6rPchj5ZbrCBe6j9gsMUxhQMY_LI3nNZKRaSNwA84K9Np6Q4USMZNSfxCJJBN7JfISNRGjY0EeNoJkUBIEp_KRAf2bMxNJkNuDjLvpVKGY_2C9XBcJTF74VclVN-EDr1uJIXU2szcGXt-me0XPCWAdbN83BWNr33AwpiYBKD4RddMS1ZSEaI9DSfPNgYSBescPQeEP7LfKgfUXY9Aft6tyqYSgx7NC2MsFsKXagdTDOR7FWvoD7bZcsLU_n2ocDIlJXPe7h_5Mwy0upup3MN484bfSn-1DyiGSsPYLMkJDgWWojlnEA5sbQb-hV65mgV7D3QWkgFLzgmj1urgHzVUO7W_5EZyGWH4Ha9U7Y7yTxlQS8cWQLvYmjCPhl64fYmFZfVA5lFwa6ehtWJ5rZkvMGdmIIb5sV4b47YZ2sb8T4djSVprMgtQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents...

_No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL..._

_**This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester.**_ I'm proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana.

Winning this race wasn't a "gimme." We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. _**That's because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000**_. He threw money at anybody and everybody who'd smear my good name.

It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life.

_Despite all the obstacles_ , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of _one man_ :

**Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana.**

As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, _**but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority.**_

[**Now I'm writing you because Steve NEEDS our help.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c6c5c8b9a30341a99dccc7a66ea657d8&_e=hXpNTLpcxkGCQp7qvP-5Od5EN7HjVC_pTL65LgVe2qvqd9YOp1JcW-BfbChpmlciwCXae9CYV5PH1u8xDyAQHDaSUIuyxNmV-12HuJDiPTJaW1Z-ZbCb4MJXtiXH7hA8-saf17RGEWPBujXREh0jblMaQrAIflqw2bEUKKkHEDCgXjfUJFWUhfSn05tdsUpIBtdoRajSK860EuGubhu2NJAc7IkwlrfW1SRO5Y5_1utoHXCBEwUymxfRGW9IESoQdZPCooFgUgmEDNzQYpy9IybbSOw8Hj4zKLKBVnI8KC9Hb_VWTpIOFrqnn1P6pSkg5RBmu5xG398B5yxsyY6b0McpeaNKqz8_4ObylSlV484_0rvYOe8nNUAN8MhB4dXcRQKzo9dxxBBWY9l2Oj_Gx_L6NWflQXQXKn9uT_k2vmc5n3T_Axer1hOKDh3z42T1DQkKn-ZCH0tPVyvNsfMznVAqx6ZN8BzJWY8QWHSPnqDjyw1OzOpKN34Ykf0ApswZHxJaWUSpkwBEpqGltAmoTvP5IQhxjAGAIIPVoR-ajKfHC7KLEyShvYtkqPmfeJ3UPKBljCvaP7U4BeVgl_MmOeEBmGV8jhmc77yFBA3NpsS_d1WA0WoEToX4MV-LwJ6q18JI97xnf3Dbqoam3bBoOmMMB0Opg3SS5Hv5x-KsAPLWagHkvu9n1iRMRka6I2IEHjLA-md_Ijgl2dtVhrtWEQBUVC5zb8WjFMbFwfcdl8JHMjsj4agWWkCGYC4kZPpi_Nryz3XxfUI-uyhL5zkCQQ%3D%3D)

[**DEFEND MONTANA
DONATE NOW**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c6c5c8b9a30341a99dccc7a66ea657d8&_e=hXpNTLpcxkGCQp7qvP-5Od5EN7HjVC_pTL65LgVe2qvqd9YOp1JcW-BfbChpmlciwCXae9CYV5PH1u8xDyAQHDaSUIuyxNmV-12HuJDiPTJaW1Z-ZbCb4MJXtiXH7hA8-saf17RGEWPBujXREh0jblMaQrAIflqw2bEUKKkHEDCgXjfUJFWUhfSn05tdsUpIBtdoRajSK860EuGubhu2NJAc7IkwlrfW1SRO5Y5_1utoHXCBEwUymxfRGW9IESoQdZPCooFgUgmEDNzQYpy9I5SbQt21jqsW5_vB-Pe4UgZIhvprorr_iRmbs2KsroejI7BEilkjPsbKTjl2iWkZOV41R-W9dJj0KzbEHE4PJ2FDYZAYhRy7nykgkSUKpU3mIO41fclw2uJ-BZoHcBguPtkHN8VCivWfrasXSGGubIMsg5TLvnzWPxUNBarP6F8LgSaTczMh_egT68i1aSxJ56XIwHQX3pLKAkWcJyxJ6LQbr1kviqJX3EGLck_iYO8AlfZWSGQE-cHHoCOiJcvgbHbn-eCn0fHAbqzn1sMYDKWBD30siasDzlav3_MVSFHt3uEQUn78sWlIJQCld6L3-Wr0mQB_FbcFZ-ruzx0apBUcapZ6i7zIB_NZVXqb212eUCMlsFR3sdd6VrA4P7XMU2tnc2h7arKEwRMWsRED-XtvNdv5x7z2W9Lka1J7poVz_U4FlL5HLGgKQnREPisflL6_Utp7oG4zSru_d1IXexIhpG_f2SjXIn14UoK_1VJHGzCG5BJdUP1RvEj1NVik5g%3D%3D)

clean_body: This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester | Fellow American, TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents... No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL... This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester. I'm proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana. Winning this race wasn't a "gimme." We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. That's because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000. He threw money at anybody and everybody who'd smear my good name. It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life. Despite all the obstacles , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of one man : Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana. As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority. Steve is up for re-election in 2026. Chuck Schumer and every Democrat in the nation would love nothing more than to see Steve Daines - the Republican Senate Majority Maker! - booted from Congress. 2026 is right around the corner. Steve's radical opponent has already told the media that every minute since 2024, she's been building a plan to win in 2026. That means Democrats are already funneling money and resources into this race. The fight to keep this Senate seat in Republican hands will be another knock-down, drag-out fight. For America's Future, Senator Tim Sheehy (R-MT) Former Navy SEAL Purple Heart Recipient P.S. We all have Steve to thank for booting Chuck Schumer out of the Majority Leader's chair! The radicals in the Democrat party are FUMING. They'd love nothing more than to send Steve packing for his role in producing the 2024 Republican Trifecta. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251210_2_kelly.EzBmJO&refcode=em20251210-2&t=1&akid=3945%2E582294%2ED5X9Bz)
Hey, it’s Mark Kelly.
Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate.
I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy.
But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something.
So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too.
I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help.
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.
After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do.
**[I’m asking you to split a donation between Chris Pappas and me, and I hope you know that I wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t important.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251210_2_kelly.EzBmJO&refcode=em20251210-2&t=2&akid=3945%2E582294%2ED5X9Bz)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251210_2_kelly.EzBmJO&amount=5&refcode=em20251210-2&t=21&akid=3945%2E582294%2ED5X9Bz)**
Thank you,
Mark
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251210-2&t=22&refcode2=3945_582294_D5X9Bz&akid=3945%2E582294%2ED5X9Bz)**

body:

Have you seen this? Trump's poll numbers are _NOSEDIVING_ as voters turn against his disastrous agenda.

From surging inflation to mass layoffs, Trump's economy is NOT working for the American people -- and _they're not afraid to show it_.

Now the midterms are fast approaching, and **we need to know where our most active supporters like you stand -- so we've launched an**URGENT Live Poll** to gather your thoughts. ****Please, before the poll closes at midnight, tell us:**

**Who do you trust with the economy?**

Team DSCC

body:
A lifelong Philadelphian, public servant, and fighter for justice. Join Sharif as he brings bold, thoughtful leadership to Washington. **Peter, I’m writing today because I officially endorsed Senator Sharif Street for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 3rd District.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121028237/588122468/-1909680904?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SFU_20251210_FR_Rendell_0_3MO_sharifstreet_NA_NA_Rendell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjM4YmE1Yy0xZmQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jIII8ydVGDgRqp0XszhCLmXwj2kTbHhlT8x96oj-6IM=) In my years as Governor, Mayor, and District Attorney, I’ve endorsed many candidates — but only those who I know can serve honestly, effectively, and with real integrity. My endorsement of Sharif is especially meaningful to me.

I’ve known Sharif since he was a teenager. His father, Mayor John F. Street, was one of the key partners who helped us turn Philadelphia’s finances around. Sharif watched that work up close. Every Tuesday morning John Street, David L. Cohen and I met in John’s office and reviewed the money we had available to deal with the significant problems that beset Philadelphia. Sharif would always be in the office doing his homework because he would go directly from there to school. He listened. He asked real questions. He gained a deep understanding of what public service demands of a leader. He realized sometimes a leader must make choices that are necessary to get the job done and to ensure financial stability for the City. Sometimes these choices are not popular but were necessary to begin to bring financial stability back.

He fought to implement Pennsylvania’s Obamacare exchange, expanding health care access and lowering costs for working families. And he secured hundreds of millions in state investments for grassroots organizations working to reduce violence and strengthen our communities.

**Sharif is already doing the hands-on work of a Congressman.** When he goes to Washington, he will bring not just a name, but a lifetime of preparation and a deep commitment to every neighborhood in our district. **That’s why I endorsed him — and why I’m asking you to stand with him today.** [Will you join me in supporting Sharif Street? Every contribution truly makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121028239/588122473/-406127211?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SFU_20251210_FR_Rendell_0_3MO_sharifstreet_NA_NA_Rendell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjM4YmE1Yy0xZmQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jIII8ydVGDgRqp0XszhCLmXwj2kTbHhlT8x96oj-6IM=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121028241/588122475/-406127211?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SFU_20251210_FR_Rendell_0_3MO_sharifstreet_NA_NA_Rendell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjM4YmE1Yy0xZmQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jIII8ydVGDgRqp0XszhCLmXwj2kTbHhlT8x96oj-6IM=)
---

Sharif has the experience, integrity, and vision to serve this community with real purpose. I’m proud to support him. I hope you will too.

Warm regards,
Governor Ed Rendell

Hi friends — quick request as we hit mid-December.
We have our first fundraising deadline coming up on December 31st, and a strong fundraising number will go a long way toward discouraging potential challengers from jumping in. If you were thinking about supporting but haven’t had the chance yet, I’d be grateful if you could click the link below and chip in [$50, $100, $250 — or whatever you can — by the end of the week](https://nickmelvoin.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e47425f168c0b7b00df186831&id=f82ef32e85&e=3cf484ad56).
And: the more we raise now, the fewer emails we’ll send in the coming weeks.
But stay tuned for some updates on the impact of my cell phone ban (teaser: it’s been amazing) and how I’ve been opening schools on weekends as community parks.
Thanks, as always, for your continued support. And thanks for donating today!

name: Action via Peters HQ
subject: A common-sense fix to lower housing costs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress
body:
---
| | Peter,

San Diego families – and millions of Americans nationwide – are being priced out of homeownership because our country simply isn’t building enough affordable, accessible housing. The solution is clear: we need more homes, and we need to reduce the barriers that keep costs high.

Scott just introduced bipartisan legislation to do exactly that. His bill removes an outdated federal requirement that has driven up construction costs for decades and severely restricted where these homes can be placed.

**By modernizing this regulation, Congress can take one of the most immediate steps to expand housing supply and lower costs for young families, working people, and anyone striving to achieve stable, affordable housing.** [If you agree, add your name today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121028889/588124635/-1990070195?refcode2=39e8d2fa-20d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&refcode=SP_EM_PT_ATO_251210_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWU4ZDJmYS0yMGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VlEP4tDahwnHT-kIBbku7XPp5ESgxY7eZtqTlJYjV1k=&emci=ee002cf4-20d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=39e8d2fa-20d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=5258741) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121028890/588124636/-1990070195?refcode2=39e8d2fa-20d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&refcode=SP_EM_PT_ATO_251210_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWU4ZDJmYS0yMGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VlEP4tDahwnHT-kIBbku7XPp5ESgxY7eZtqTlJYjV1k=&emci=ee002cf4-20d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=39e8d2fa-20d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=5258741)**
---
_Updating this rule will:_
* **Lower construction costs** , making manufactured homes more affordable

* Increase design flexibility to **meet local and regional housing needs**

* **Open more sites** suitable for high-quality, modern manufactured homes

* **Expand homeownership opportunities** for families who have been priced out

Here in San Diego, the housing crisis threatens long-term prosperity and limits opportunities for people who deserve the chance to put down roots. Scott’s common-sense solution will help communities build more affordable housing faster – without increasing costs for taxpayers.

[If you believe housing should be within reach for every family, add your name in support of expanding our affordable housing supply:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121028891/588124637/-1990070195?refcode2=39e8d2fa-20d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&refcode=SP_EM_PT_ATO_251210_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWU4ZDJmYS0yMGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VlEP4tDahwnHT-kIBbku7XPp5ESgxY7eZtqTlJYjV1k=&emci=ee002cf4-20d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=39e8d2fa-20d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=5258741) | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121028892/588124638/-1990070195?refcode2=39e8d2fa-20d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&refcode=SP_EM_PT_ATO_251210_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWU4ZDJmYS0yMGQ2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VlEP4tDahwnHT-kIBbku7XPp5ESgxY7eZtqTlJYjV1k=&emci=ee002cf4-20d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=39e8d2fa-20d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=5258741)**

– Team Peters

name: Team Harder
subject: BREAKING: Trump’s latest attack
body:

name: Team Summer Lee
subject: Let’s make this official
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1993%2E791427%2Edqs5fz)
Friend,
When Summer Lee announced her re-election campaign, the energy, **the power, and the PEOPLE showed up so powerfully that the Super PACs trying to take Summer out are already scrambling.**
And now we have the chance to turn that momentum into something even more powerful: **FOUNDING MEMBERS of Summer Lee’s 2026 campaign.**
That’s why today is critical. **EVERY donation made today — any amount — will make you a FOUNDING MEMBER of Summer’s 2026 re-election campaign.** Your name will be part of the group that stepped up first, fast, and without hesitation.
[**Can you click here and chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can between my campaign and Ihan Omar and become a Founding Member today? Donate now and claim your Founding Member status!**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25-summer-split.g4zEHj&refcode=em251210-2-90&t=2&akid=1993%2E791427%2Edqs5fz)
**[CHIP IN HERE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25-summer-split.g4zEHj&refcode=em251210-2-90&t=3&akid=1993%2E791427%2Edqs5fz)**
Our launch was a statement. You’ll see the photos: the packed room, the excitement, the movement coming alive all over again. It was a reminder that people power is REAL, and it’s ready for 2026.
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25-summer-split.g4zEHj&refcode=em251210-2-90&t=4&akid=1993%2E791427%2Edqs5fz)
But you know who else saw that momentum? **The same dark-money forces who have spent years trying to keep Summer quiet and out of Congress.** The billionaires who fear a people-powered movement rising again.The Super PACs who failed to beat Summer last time but are already gearing up for round two.
And that’s exactly why Founding Members matter.
* Founding Members are the base we build from.
* Founding Members are how we show early strength.
* Founding Members are the proof that this movement is too powerful to silence.

**But this window is short.**
[**Friend, don’t watch this movement take off without you. Click here to become a Founding Member right now and split a contribution between Summer and Ilhan Omar — and help us send a message they can’t ignore!**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25-summer-split.g4zEHj&refcode=em251210-2-90&t=5&akid=1993%2E791427%2Edqs5fz)
Summer didn’t wait for permission when she moved to subpoena the Epstein files. She didn’t wait when she confronted billionaires like Elon Musk in Congress. She didn’t wait when she introduced legislation to abolish Super PACs.
**And today, we can’t wait either.**
This is your moment to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with the people who powered yesterday’s incredible launch — and who will power every victory to come.
Let’s make this official:
[**Become a Founding Member of Summer Lee’s 2026 campaign before midnight. Chip in now to split a donation and add your name to the Founding Member list!**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25-summer-split.g4zEHj&refcode=em251210-2-90&t=6&akid=1993%2E791427%2Edqs5fz)
**[CHIP IN HERE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25-summer-split.g4zEHj&refcode=em251210-2-90&t=7&akid=1993%2E791427%2Edqs5fz)**
In solidarity,
**Team Summer Lee**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=8&akid=1993%2E791427%2Edqs5fz)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=9&akid=1993%2E791427%2Edqs5fz)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=10&akid=1993%2E791427%2Edqs5fz)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=11&refcode2=1993_791427_dqs5fz&akid=1993%2E791427%2Edqs5fz)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Dr. Kristin Hook
subject: Did You See the News?!
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=3aa4ce9524&e=395a33a3d2)
| | | | | |
# Our Time Is Now!
---
| | Yesterday Miami voters made history by electing Eileen Higgins as the city’s first Democratic mayor in nearly 30 years and its first woman mayor, ending decades of Republican control at City Hall!
---
|
---
| | And in Georgia, Eric Gisler flipped House District 121 - a historically Republican and Trump +12 seat - with a narrow but powerful win that shows how much the map is shifting!
---
|
---
| | These victories show a growing rejection of the MAGA extremists who have taken a wrecking ball to our country over the last 11 months.
But these victories didn’t just happen overnight. They took years of losses, blood, sweat, tears, and money. Most importantly, they took years of people never losing hope.
Despite being defeated last November, I never gave up hope. Once the dust settled, the New York Times published a graphic of the partisan changes across our country that stopped me in my tracks.
Let’s see if you notice it too...
---
|
---
| | If you’re seeing a sea of red arrows, look in the dead center of Texas and they disappear.
We did that!!!!
To those who say victory can’t be achieved here in our district or in Texas, I say WATCH US!
We have the momentum, now we just need the resources to strengthen this campaign and finish the job!
If you’re with me, please contribute whatever you’re able to so that we can build the arsenal we’ll need to finish what we started!
Democratically Yours,
---
|
---

name: Roy Cooper for Senate HQ
subject: Peter, did you hear this? 🔊
body:
Adjusting our rabbit ears...
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=151%2E124072%2EF7HWiH)
[ ](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2603?t=7&akid=151%2E124072%2EF7HWiH)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=151%2E124072%2EF7HWiH)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=151%2E124072%2EF7HWiH)

Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Tom Cotton
subject: There’s no path to a Senate Majority without Arkansas

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Can we explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter, we know we’ve sent a lot of fundraising emails. We wish we didn’t have to, but the truth is, emails like this are one of the most important ways Jon Ossoff funds his people-powered campaign.
Of course Jon doesn’t expect supporters to give to every email we send, but he is hoping you’ll consider chipping in to this one.
If that’s all you needed to hear, you can donate any amount to this secure link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ossoff-em-dec25](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251210-1-f-a&t=1&akid=1245%2E5691347%2Eh65skG)**
Otherwise, we hope you’ll give us a chance to explain:
There’s no doubt that this race will likely be the most high-stakes, competitive race in the midterms. That’s because Jon is the most vulnerable Senator _(of any party!)_ up for reelection.
The GOP knows that elections are determined by thin margins in battleground Georgia — and they know Donald Trump won the state in 2024. They’re betting they can win again in 2026 and flip this seat red.
So Republicans are preparing to flood the airwaves with attacks and use every dirty trick in the book to defeat Jon next November. They’ve made Jon their #1 target and will do anything to win.
We know this team can win — we did it in 2021, and we know we can win BIG again in the midterms. But that means building up an unprecedented amount of resources, staff, and money to fight back against MAGA’s warchest.
We just can’t do that without supporters like you, Peter. That’s why we’ve been calling on this team recently and why we need your support once again today.
**[So please, can you make a contribution to Jon Ossoff’s campaign today? Any amount helps us get one step closer to victory when lots and lots of folks step up and support our efforts.](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251210-1-f-a&t=2&akid=1245%2E5691347%2Eh65skG)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.electjon.com/go/1525?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.UdqSSd&refcode=em251210-1-f-a&t=21&akid=1245%2E5691347%2Eh65skG)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://act.electjon.com/go/1526?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.3llSsh&refcode=em251210-1-f-a&t=22&akid=1245%2E5691347%2Eh65skG)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://act.electjon.com/go/1520?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.bGqFYH&refcode=em251210-1-f-a&t=23&akid=1245%2E5691347%2Eh65skG)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://act.electjon.com/go/1521?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.IZ7DFn&refcode=em251210-1-f-a&t=24&akid=1245%2E5691347%2Eh65skG)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://act.electjon.com/go/1522?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.pWvP31&refcode=em251210-1-f-a&t=25&akid=1245%2E5691347%2Eh65skG)**
---
****
| **[Another Amount](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.PyZHDd&refcode=em251210-1-f-a&t=26&akid=1245%2E5691347%2Eh65skG)**
---
****
Thank you.
Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=27&akid=1245%2E5691347%2Eh65skG) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=1245%2E5691347%2Eh65skG) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Dr. Kristin Hook
subject: Did you see the news? ->> Updated Link!
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=b1d26b410d&e=395a33a3d2)
| | | | | |
# Our Time Is Now!
---
| | Yesterday Miami voters made history by electing Eileen Higgins as the city’s first Democratic mayor in nearly 30 years and its first woman mayor, ending decades of Republican control at City Hall!
---
|
---
| | And in Georgia, Eric Gisler flipped House District 121 - a historically Republican and Trump +12 seat - with a narrow but powerful win that shows how much the map is shifting!
---
|
---
| | These victories show a growing rejection of the MAGA extremists who have taken a wrecking ball to our country over the last 11 months.
But these victories didn’t just happen overnight. They took years of losses, blood, sweat, tears, and money. Most importantly, they took years of people never losing hope.
Despite being defeated last November, I never gave up hope. Once the dust settled, the New York Times published a graphic of the partisan changes across our country that stopped me in my tracks.
Let’s see if you notice it too...
---
|
---
| | If you’re seeing a sea of red arrows, look in the dead center of Texas and they disappear.
We did that!!!!
To those who say victory can’t be achieved here in our district or in Texas, I say WATCH US!
We have the momentum, now we just need the resources to strengthen this campaign and finish the job!
If you’re with me, please contribute whatever you’re able to so that we can build the arsenal we’ll need to finish what we started!
Democratically Yours,
---
|

name: Team WFP
subject: Brad Lander just announced his campaign for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, This morning, Brad Lander launched his campaign for Congress in New York’s 10th Congressional District. **And we are so proud to be among his very first endorsements.** Brad has been a trusted ally of the Working Families Party for years. Time and time again, he has stood up for our communities all across New York. He even put his body on the line — literally — in the face of ICE’s abuses earlier this year.1 And he was one of the first NYC politicians to defy the establishment machine and endorse Zohran Mamdani — at a time when other so-called “leaders” were too afraid to risk angering the Cuomo dynasty. But most of all, we’re endorsing Brad Lander because there is a deep, deep hunger in NY-10 for bolder leadership. We’ve spoken with so many community members, and the message is clear: the people want a candidate who not only has deep ties to the district, but an unwavering commitment to build upon our affordability agenda in Congress. **That candidate is Brad Lander.** **[We’re going all in starting NOW, just like we did for Zohran Mamdani. And to pull it off, we need your help. Please give today to NYWFP and equip us with the tools, resources, and organizing-power needed to elect Brad Lander to Congress.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqup5wkEq_T1bndA-1EX7QtoaTbeFPuQTu36PTZzK80179j88wE9jFQqv02U3RSb38PQG4K0A_SlEqD1b_4bKvGWBfbz0b_pKU-fMj4Wa2qG1m2Ot_JpMX6eU9aAxWULe_IXOE0cMUVWPBBwBAiKCvBMkFgdVR3dDgohziL-qPRYd2IZTGhGwNHgEChbINlYboDJzBm20b2N1ePWJHJ0-TzPuu_sjFruclpe_flaHeQs5uss_Ry0M_lSC1_DYEBAAOi73KEFWQbFPYdjrOk6HFGnGPHPseaeRo1X9k8aNN0-R5uS8xntPc2lTioOSCyARUrUcJbma53hsO6TVGTuLQkt_FVdn_iaPpZoV42Qz-eyb1GvTvJ66heSIByExEZzOEM/4mb/lCTB4otWQK2j-agsomdowQ/h0/h001.rGB1vWMQk1x7apLTjNq_OJz2trUtsfVKqoNHUmcOHCE)** **[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqup5wkEq_T1bndA-1EX7QtoaTbeFPuQTu36PTZzK80179j88wE9jFQqv02U3RSb38PQG4K0A_SlEqD1b_4bKvGW364h_IbL1vvng_FXwyRX-3yLnIDRGbd3T3WRDMC6sTawl_27OoCZk_ETEGsEQX7VvRISdg8_zIXO000EHz_H73w_rG6-HWN_J39Ll9259mPFafWB0gRzcT72dFgbv6ygfyNLFhRJOzaJ8xsN-iv8yq3ggbg708rcEhd2YmWTiIyY5OgqXNCGucMMNxtOW8cHKLPKGc_Cx4g1LpJmMisegHa2ehoHQtkRwOR7R0fni5xGOAmqOQkfHu22LAL4Q0HHXC5OvNJVWVmw_Mv5kMDHcX-_cKEpsSYBueobZT0PHU0/4mb/lCTB4otWQK2j-agsomdowQ/h1/h001.f8KzUjPYf97msovguK2-gcx2o6cvLYo35gF5Wir5lPY)** **[Donate $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqup5wkEq_T1bndA-1EX7QtoaTbeFPuQTu36PTZzK80179j88wE9jFQqv02U3RSb38PQG4K0A_SlEqD1b_4bKvGWUBnTAuAwBEbGeOMlgqwCBAqQw_wz3Tml7iio3u4numxFpmOouNl2kKj3rhE1CuJdzaB0DPUNvW8j8Gba7bsDEBQ_ph5TUPfOTkYBH39GftYfDFy0ktMbpSlSyACMKtFxiKTh83ZkFcPRUyy5__nzdhdXyiOQjEhaJ43lQBO3X3-rVqbVVytbWIxlOMkfvqpKyFvTxYCEJeKhLXp7soCnArBFJDMbpyDOzwLtfuGjw7utD5v8kNkhNM2pnpQFpYbzMfAXVmROIx-ipdPDpRcvZSnULiaFZPVsIq_IlVtlpqE7gwhh0GD-Y5Yx7Vk8iCrJ/4mb/lCTB4otWQK2j-agsomdowQ/h2/h001.M0hVXj3EeAaNv_4MLbCRWaLSZUEHCAmJI1Jnh8iLq1o)** With Donald Trump back in the White House, New York is facing major threats. He’s made a routine out of deploying the National Guard into cities that refuse to cooperate with his masked kidnappers at ICE. And he is already on the record threatening to withhold federal funds from New York City if they don’t elect his preferred candidates.2 **These are not reasons to bend the knee, but to fight back even harder. That’s why working families are demanding candidates who truly have their backs.** 2025 has been a historic cycle so far, with WFP champions winning key races all over the state. And these wins happened precisely because the candidates were bold, values-driven, and unwavering in their support of working families. We need to bring that same energy to the 2026 midterm elections. Now is the time to mobilize to protect our communities, stand up for immigrant families, and defend our democracy. **And we know that Brad Lander has the integrity and courage to do just that if elected to Congress** — just like he’s done throughout his decades-long career as a community organizer, affordable housing advocate, City Councilmember, and Comptroller. **[Help us elect Brad Lander to Congress by making a donation to NYWFP today. We’re going to commit everything we can to building a strong, on-the-ground organizing program to support his campaign. clean_body: | | | Peter, This morning, Brad Lander launched his campaign for Congress in New York’s 10th Congressional District. And we are so proud to be among his very first endorsements. Brad has been a trusted ally of the Working Families Party for years. Time and time again, he has stood up for our communities all across New York. He even put his body on the line — literally — in the face of ICE’s abuses earlier this year.1 And he was one of the first NYC politicians to defy the establishment machine and endorse Zohran Mamdani — at a time when other so-called “leaders” were too afraid to risk angering the Cuomo dynasty. But most of all, we’re endorsing Brad Lander because there is a deep, deep hunger in NY-10 for bolder leadership. We’ve spoken with so many community members, and the message is clear: the people want a candidate who not only has deep ties to the district, but an unwavering commitment to build upon our affordability agenda in Congress. That candidate is Brad Lander. With Donald Trump back in the White House, New York is facing major threats. He’s made a routine out of deploying the National Guard into cities that refuse to cooperate with his masked kidnappers at ICE. And he is already on the record threatening to withhold federal funds from New York City if they don’t elect his preferred candidates.2 These are not reasons to bend the knee, but to fight back even harder. That’s why working families are demanding candidates who truly have their backs. 2025 has been a historic cycle so far, with WFP champions winning key races all over the state. And these wins happened precisely because the candidates were bold, values-driven, and unwavering in their support of working families. We need to bring that same energy to the 2026 midterm elections. Now is the time to mobilize to protect our communities, stand up for immigrant families, and defend our democracy. And we know that Brad Lander has the integrity and courage to do just that if elected to Congress — just like he’s done throughout his decades-long career as a community organizer, affordable housing advocate, City Councilmember, and Comptroller. Thank you for all that you do, Peter. In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. , The New York Times, June 17, 2025 2\. , November 3, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it.
